(rds. and bldgs.), Apl., 1929; ret'd., Sept., 1936.

AYYANGAR, S. RANGASWAMI (see Rangaswami, S. A.).

AYYANGAR, SRINIVASA AYYANGAR PARTHASARATHI (see Parthasarathi Ayyangar, S. A.).

AYYANGAR, SRINIVASA RAGHAVA (see Raghava Ayyangar, S.).

AYYANGAR, VALAVARAM BHASHYAM (see Bhashyam Ayyangar, V.).

AYYAR (see also Aiyar).

AYYAR, ABHIRAMAPURAM KHRISHNAMURTI RAJA (see Raja Ayyar, A. K.).

AYYAR, ALLADI KRISHNASWAMI (see Krishnaswami, A. A.).

AYYAR, A. S. PANCHAPAKESA (see Panchapakesa Ayyar).

AYYAR, CALIDAS V. K. (see Krishnaswami Ayyar, C. V.).

AYYAR, C. S. M., (see Mahadeva Ayyar Candamangalam Sitarama).

AYYAR, CHANDRASEKHARA SUBRAHMANYA (see Subrahmany Ayyar C.).

AYYAR, C. V. A. (see Anantakrishna Ayyar, C. V.).

AYYAR, E. R. S. (see Seshu, Ayyar E. R.).

AYYAR, GOPALA V. (see Venkateswara Ayyar, G.).

AYYAR, GOPALASWAMI N. (see Nagaratnam, A. G.).

AYYAR, HARIHARAYYAR ANANTHANARAYANAN (see Ananthanarayanan H. A.).

AYYAR, K. BALARAMA (see Balarama Ayyar.).

AYYAR, K. R. V. (see Venkataramana Ayyar, K.).

AYYAR, KUNNISSAERI S.V. (see Venkatachala-Ayyar).

AYYAR, K. VENKATARAMA (see Venkatarama Ayyar, K.).

AYYAR, MADURA SUBBA AYYAR SUBRAHMANYA (see Subrahmany Ayyar, M. S. A.).

AYYAR, NARAYANASWAMY KUPPUSWAMY (see Kuppuswamy A.N.).

AYYAR, NILAKANTA MAHADEVA (see Nilakanta Mahadeva Ayyar.).

AYYAR, PATHIYADI SESHACHALA VISVANATHA (see Visvanatha Ayyar, P. S.).

AYYAR, P. N. N. (see Poyamani, N. N. A.).

AYYAR, P. N. RAMASWAMI (see Ramaswami Ayyar.).

AYYAR, PERUMALAYYAR RAMAKRISHNA (see Ramakrishna Ayyar, P.).

AYYAR, P. V. BALAKRISHNA (see Balakrishna Ayyar.).

AYYAR, R. RAJAGOPALA (see Rajagopala, A. R.).

AYYAR, RAJAPPAYA NARAYANA (see Narayana Ayyar, R.).

AYYAR, RAMA (see Rama, A.).

AYYAR, R. G. RAMASIVAMI (see Ramasivami Ayyar R.).

AYYAR T. S., SUBRAMANIA (see Subramania Ayyar.).

AYYAR, SWAMINATHA AYYAR MUTHUSWAMI (see Muthuswami Ayyar, S.A.).

AYYAR, T. G. N. (see Tarakad Gopalakrishna Narayana, Ayyar.).

AYYAR, TINNEVELLY SELLAMIER SANKARA (see Sankara, Ayyar, T. S.).

AYYAR, T. V. SESHAGIRI (see Seshagiri Ayyar.).

AYYAR, V. KRISHNAMURTI (see Krishnamurti Ayyar, V.).

AYYAR, VENKATARAMA RAMACHANDRA (see Ramachandra Ayyar, V.).

AZAM, MAKHDUM MUHAMMAD, B.Sc., LL.B., Mil. Accts. Dept. (b. 15th Jan., 1892).—Held non gaz. appts., Aug., 1918 to July, 1926; apptd. officer Cl. II, Mar., 1926.

AZAM, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Azam).

AZIZ, A. (see Abdul Aziz).

AZIZ, MUHAMMAD ABDUL (see Abdul Aziz, M.).

AZIZUR RAHMAN, MUHAMMAD, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A., Assam C.S. (dep. commr.) (b. 16th Oct., 1884).—Joined the service, 21st May, 1910; extra asst. commr., Mar., 1913; dep. commr., July, 1934.

BA, U., late Indian Police (b. 24th Sept., 1880).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 1st Feb., 1904; asst. dist. supt., Jan., 1920; offg. dist. supt., June, 1920; confd., Jan., 1924; retd., Aug., 1934.

BACON, BERNARD MATTHEW, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provinces) (b. 5th Aug., 1909).—Educated at Cardinal Vaughan School, Kensington; Trinity Hall, Cambridge, and School of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Dec., 1935; asst. pol. agent, Nasirabad, Oct., 1936; 2nd. asst. pol. agt., Mekran Oct., 1938.

BACON, ROGER NOEL, O.B.E., Major, I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 25th Dec., 1900).—First commn., 16th July, 1920; in milty. employ to 15th Oct., 1927; asst. pol. agent, N. Waziristan, Nov., 1929; asst. commr., Charsadda, July, 1931, and again, Apl., 1933; asst. dir. intel., Govt. of India, Dec., 1933; on spl. duty with Mohmand force, Sept., 1935; O.B.E., June, 1936; dep. commr., Hazara, Sept., 1937; asst. pol. agent, S. Waziristan, Dec., 1937; pol. agent, N. Waziristan, Feb., 1938.

BADAMI, SURCHANDRA PURUSHOTTAMDAS, B.A., LL.B., late Judicial dept., Bombay (b. 25th June, 1875). Joined the dept. 12th Oct., 1905; sub. judge, Nov., 1907; judge, small causes ct., Oct. 1928; retd. June, 1930.

BADAN SINGH, M.Sc., LL.B., Indian Police (b. 23rd June, 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Prov., on 17th Aug., 1925; offg. supt., July, 1928; and again, Mar., 1933.

BADENOCH, ALEXANDER CAMERON, C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (dep. auditor genl. in India) (b. 2nd July, 1889).—Educ. at Dunfermline High Sch., Edinburgh Univ., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 23rd Nov., 1912, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr., sec., municipal commee., Amritsar, April, 1917; spl. duty, Punjab civil sectt., May, 1918; offg. under-sec. to govt., finl. dept., June, 1918; confirmed, Dec., 1918; dep. acct.-gen., Punjab, March to May, 1919; offg. acct.-gen., Central Prov., Oct., 1919; ditto, Calcutta, Jan., 1923; acct.-genl., post and tels., Calcutta, Jan., 1926; ditto, Delhi, Oct., 1926; acct. genl., central revenues, Nov., 1928; offg. dir. of comml. audit, May, 1929; dir. rly. audit, Apl., 1930; C.I.E., June, 1931; offg. dep. auditor-genl. in India, Apl., 1931; and again, Nov., 1933; confd., May, 1932; offg. auditor genl. in India, Apl., 1933; and again, July, 1935; C.S.I., Feb., 1937 aud. genl. in India (subst.), Apl., 1938.

BADHWAR, G. C. (see Gokul Chand Badhwar).

BADOCK, RONALD WALTER, Ind. Fin. Dept. (examr., local fund accts., Burma), (b. 21st Jan., 1886).—Joined the service, 20th Oct., 1910; asst. acct.-genl., Nov., 1911; examr., local fund accts., Burma, April, 1923.

BAGSHAWE, EDWARD LEONARD, C.I.E., D.S.O., O.B.E., late India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 15th Nov., 1876).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the telegraph service, 1st Oct., 1897, as asst. supt.; supt., April, 1910; transferred to field service, March, 1915 (asst. dir. of telegraphs, Mesopotamia Field Force, April, 1915; dir. of telegraphs, ditto, May, 1916; mentioned in despatches; C.I.E., Aug., 1916; supt., Madras divn., May, 1919; O.B.E., June, 1919; dep. chief engr., telephones, April, 1922; dir. of tel. engrg., Western circle, May, 1925; offg. ch. engr., telegraphs, Aug., 1925; confd., Jan., 1926; retd., Oct., 1931.

BAGULEY, JOHN MINTY, B.A., Barr. Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Rangoon) (b. 21st June, 1880).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1903; arrived 28th Nov., 1904, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; dist. judge, Oct., 1916; actg. judge, high ct., Rangoon, May, 1924; confd., Sept., 1927.

BAHL, MOHAN LAL, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bihar) (b. 10th Oct., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bihar and Orissa, on 29th Mar., 1925; offg. exec. engr., Oct., 1931; confd., Oct., 1934.

BAIG, MIRZA OSMAN ALI, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 9th Jan., 1904).—First commn., 31st Jan., 1924; in milty. employ until 11th Dec., 1930; asst. pol. agent, Sibi, Feb., 1933; ditto, Zhob, Oct., 1934; asst. pol. agent, Mekran, May, 1935; asst. commr., Peshawar, June, 1938.

BAIG, MIRZA SIKANDER ALI, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 22nd Sept., 1909).—Educ. at Clifton College, Trinity College, Cambridge, and the School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Punjab as asst. commr.; sub-divl. offcr., Mar., 1937; secty., Punjab and N.W.F.P. jt. public serv. commn., Apl., 1938.

BAIJNATH KHATTRI, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., United Provs., 31st Oct., 1925; offg. exec. engr., Feb., 1931; confd., Oct., 1935.

BAIKIE, HUGH MACANDREW, B.Sc., Indian State Ry's. (exec. engr., E.B. Ry.) (b. 7th Sept., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1913; on milty. duty from April, 1916, to May, 1919; asst. exec. engr., Feb., 1921; exec. engr., Nov., 1922; offg. dep. agent (works), E.B. rly., Apl., 1935; offg. dep. ch. engr., Apl., 1936.

BAILEY, ARTHUR CHARLES JOHN, C.I.E., Indian Police (dep. inspr. genl., Bombay) (b. 2nd Oct., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. supt. of police, 24th Nov., 1906; supt. of police, Jan., 1918; awarded King's Police Medal, 1st Jan., 1920; offg. dep. inspr. genl., Feb., 1930; and again, July, 1933; confd., Jan., 1934; C.I.E., June, 1931.

BAILEY, ARTHUR HERBERT, late Central Provs., C.S. (b. 20th Feb., 1875).—Joined the service, 2nd March, 1897; sub-judge, Jan., 1908; dep. commr., Dec., 1924; retd., Feb., 1930.

BAILEY, CHARLES HUGH VERNON, late Indian State Ry's. (G.I.P. Ry.) (b. 6th April, 1875).—Joined the service, 6th July, 1893; offg.

asst. traffic supt., April, 1909; confd., Jan., 1911; dist. traffic supt., July, 1917; asst. transportation supt., Nov., 1922; offg. divl. ditto, Oct., 1927; confd., Mar., 1929; retd., Apl., 1932.

BAILEY, FREDERICK MARSHMAN, C.I.E., Lt.-Col., I.A., late Indian Political Service (b. 3rd Feb., 1832).—First commn. dated 28th July, 1900; on mil. duty until Dec., 1905, when appointed offg. British trade agent, Gyantse; asst. to pol. officer in Sikkim and asst. pol. officer, Chumbi, Dec., 1906; British trade agent, Gyantse, Jan., 1908; asst. to agent to gov.-gen. in Rajputana, July, 1909; pol. officer, United Prov., Aug., 1911; served with Abor expdn. from Oct., 1911, to Mar., 1912; pol. officer, Assam, Nov., 1912, to May, 1914; C.I.E., Jan., 1915; asst. commr., Kohat, Jan., 1916; ditto, Thal sub-divn., Mar., 1916; ditto, Kohat, May, 1916; ditto, Charsada, Aug., 1916; on spl. duty, Persian Gulf, March, 1917; spl. duty with Kashgar Mission, from Feb., 1918, to May, 1920; pol. officer in Sikkim, June, 1921; pol. agent in Baghalkhand, Oct., 1930; offg. resdt., Baroda, Mar., 1932; ditto, Kashmir, July, 1932; H.B.M.'s minister, Nepal, Feb., 1935; retd., Apl., 1938.

BAILEY, GEORGE HUBERT PARKE, Indian Police (supv., Madras) (b. 2nd Jan., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Madras, on 31st Dec., 1922; offg. dist. supt., Apl., 1929; offg. dep. commr., Jan., 1934; supt., Dec., 1935; Indian Police Medal, Jan., 1936.

BAILEY, WILLIAM ALFRED, B.A., Indian Forest Service (consvr., United Provs.), (b. 10th June, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., on 13th Dec., 1912; dep. consvr., Dec., 1920; services placed at disposal of railway board, Simla, from Oct., 1927, to Novr., 1929; offg. consvr., Mar., 1931; services placed at disposal of the Govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, Feb.-Oct., 1935; offg. consvr., May, 1936; confd., Mar., 1937.

BAINES, CUTHBERT EDWARD, B.A., late India Office (b. 12th June, 1879).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., and Corpus Christi Coll., Oxford; apptd. junr. clerk, finl. dept., 13th March, 1903; resdt. clerk, April, 1904, to March, 1906; transf. to mil. dept., Jan., 1910; reading clerk to council, Jan., 1910, to March, 1911; senr. clerk, mil. dept., March, 1911; ditto, rev. and stat. dept., Oct., 1911; on mily. service July, 1916; attached to the Ministry of Food, Feb. to Nov., 1918; principal, April, 1921; transferred to public and judl. dept., June, 1923; ditto, economic and overseas dept., Aug., 1926; retd., Mar., 1930.

BAINI PRASHAD, D.Sc. (Edin. and Punjab) F.R.S.E., F.L.S., F.Z.S., Zoological Survey of India (dir.) (b. 13th Mar., 1894).—Apptd. supt. of fisheries, Bengal, Bihar and Orissa, 1917; offg. dir. ditto, 1918; asst. supt., zoological survey of India, 1920, and again 1921; offg. supt. ditto, 1920, and again 1923; offg. dir. ditto, 1920, 1927, and again Mar., 1929; confd., Apl., 1933.

BAIRD, ROY FEARON, M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., B.A., Col., I.M.S. (retd.).—First commn., 28th Jan., 1868; apptd. offg. civil surgn., 28th Provs., July, 1906; asst. plague officer, ditto, Aug., 1907; chief plague officer, Feb., 1908; civil surgn. (temp.) and ditto, March, 1909; civil surgn. (temp.) and supt., dist. jail, April, 1909; confd. as civil surgn., Aug., 1909; on mil. duty

Sept., 1914, to March, 1920; offg. inspr.-gen. of civil hosps., United Provs., Nov., 1923, to July, 1924, and again, Oct., 1926; confd., March, 1927; retd., Mar., 1929.

BAJPAI, SIR GIRJA SHANKAR, K.B.E., C.I.E., B.A., B.Sc., Indian C.S. (sect. to govt. of India, dept. of educ., &c.) (b. 3rd April, 1891).—Educ. at Allahabad and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived 25th Nov., 1915, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr. (jt. mag.). May, 1918; on special duty as sec. to the Right Hon. V. S. Srinivasa Shastri, April, 1921, to Nov., 1922; C.B.E., Jan., 1923; under-sec. to govt. of India, dept. of educ., health and lands, Sept., 1923; offg. dep. sec., ditto, March, 1924; confd., June, 1926; C.I.E., July, 1926; offg. sec., ditto, Dec., 1927; jt. secty., ditto, Nov., 1929; jt. secty., British Indian delegation, round-table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; mag. and collr., Oct., 1931; on spl. duty to S. Africa, Dec., 1931; secty. to govt. of India, dept. of educ., Aug., 1932; K.B.E., June, 1935; temp. member, govr.-genls.' exec. council, Sept., 1935 to Jan., 1936.

BAJPAI, SARDA SHANKAR, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 14th Aug., 1900).—Educ. at Dulwich and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1925; arrived 21st Dec., 1925, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag.; jt. mag., March, 1928; asst. collr., Madras, Aug., 1929; ditto, Calcutta, Oct., 1930; offg. sess. and sub-judge, Sept., 1932; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1934.

BAJPAI, UMA SHANKAR, Judicial Dept., United Provs. (judge, high ct., Allahabad) (b. 22nd Aug., 1884).—Joined the service as govt. advocate, 6th Apl., 1927; offg. judge, high ct., Allahabad, Mar., 1931; and again, Oct., 1932; addl. judge, ditto, variously from July, 1933; judge, (confd.) Apl., 1937.

BAKER, ERNEST BRIAN HINDLEY, B.A. (Oxon), Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 13th Sept., 1904).—Educ. at Westminster, and Christ Church Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 19th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., Aug., 1933; offg. dist. and sess. judge, June, 1934; and gain, Feb., 1936; attd. govt. of India legis. dept., Nov., 1937.

BAKER, HUGH CUTHBERT, B.A., Indian C.S. (secty., lands and rev. dept., Burma) (b. 16th Nov., 1901).—Educ. at Campbell Coll., Belfast, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1926; arrived Dec., 1926, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; offg. under secty. to govt., home and pol. dept., Mar., 1929; offg. settlement officer, Moulmein, Apl., 1932; dep. secty., fin. dept., Burma, Dec., 1936 to Dec., 1937; secty., lands and rev. dept., Dec., 1937.

BAKER, JOHN ALFRED, C.I.E., M.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 14th May, 1882).—Trained at the R.I.E. Coll.; apptd. asst. engr., Central Provs., 1st Oct., 1904; under-sec. to chief commr. in public works dept., March, 1908, to July, 1911; exec. engr., Oct., 1912; suptg. engr., Sept., 1920; offg. chief engr., April, 1924; confd. as chief engr. and sec. to govt., Central Provs., Feb., 1925; C.I.E., June, 1927; retd., Mar., 1935.

BAKER, JOHN LAW, late Indian Forest Service (b. 5th Nov., 1878).—Arrived, 13th Dec., 1900, and served as asst. consvr., prov. sub. dep. consvr., Aug., 1905; confd., Jan., 1909; offg. consvr., Burma, June, 1920; confd., April, 1922; retd. June, 1929.

BAKER, LEONARD YORK, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 30th Jan., 1903).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., United Provs., 18th Oct., 1926; exec. engr., Oct., 1935.

BAKER, PERCY NEVILLE HUMPHREY, A.M.I.C.E., A.M.I.M.E., Indian State Rlys. (transpn. supt.) (b. 19th Dec., 1888).—Joined the service, 7th July, 1922; asst. supt., Feb., 1925; transpn. supt. (power) E.I. Rly., Aug., 1934.

BAKER, SIR WILLIAM THOMAS WEBB, Kt., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 6th Dec., 1873).—Educ. at Rugby, and Exeter Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1896; arrived, 11th Dec., 1897, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag.; 2nd asst., Feb., 1906; 1st asst., Jan., 1910; judge and sess. judge, May, 1914; services lent to govt. of Central Prov. from March, 1923; judl. commr., Central Prov., Sept., 1923; offg. judl. commr., Bombay, April, 1926; addl. judge, high ct., Bombay, Nov., 1926; offg. judge, ditto, June, 1927; confd., Jan., 1929; offg. ch. justice, high ct., Bombay, Feb., 1933; retd., Dec., 1933; knighted, Jan., 1934.

BAKHLE, DATTAPRASANNA SADASHIVA, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 5th Dec., 1907).—Educ. at Bombay Univ., London School of Economics and London School of Oriental Studies; joined the service 10th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; under secty., home dept., govt. of India, Mar., 1935 to Mar., 1938.

BAKHT YAWAR ALI, M.A., Indian Police (b. 29th June, 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, on 11th July, 1924; offg. supt., Dec., 1932.

BAKHS, RAHIM (see Rahim Bakhsh).

BAKSH, ALLAH (see Allah Baksh).

BAKSH, SHAHABUDDIN KHUDA (see Shahabuddin, K.B.).

BAKSHI, JAGANANDA, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Orissa) (b. 15th Oct., 1897).—Joined the service, 1st Nov., 1921; asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1922; offg. exec. engr., May, 1928; confd., Oct., 1931.

BAKSHI SINGH, SIDHU BHAI, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 3rd Sept., 1892).—Joined the service, Sept., 1914; asst. engr., Sept., 1915; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1924.

BAKSI, GIRIJA BHUSHAN, M.A. (Cal.), B.A. (Oxon), Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Central Provs.) (b. 15th Jan., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 30th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Sept., 1927.

BAKSI, NAGENDRABHUSHAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. dollr., Bihar) (b. 30th Nov., 1901).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and St. Catherine's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 28th Oct., 1925; arrived 6th Dec., 1925, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. dep. commr., Dec., 1933; spec. offer., co-op. dept., Jan., 1937.

BAL, NARAYANA KRISHNA, Lt.-Col., M.C., I.M.S. (dist. medl. officer, Madras) (b. 10th Sept., 1885).—First commn. dated 25th Jan., 1913; in milty. employ until 19th Nov., 1923; civil surg., Nov. 1926; dist. medl. officer, April, 1927.

BALACHANDRA KOMAN, MALIKAYAL CHANDAPPA, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Madras) (b. 14th May, 1897).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and Queen's Coll., Camb.; joined the service, 1st Nov., 1923; arrived, 23rd Nov., 1923, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; under sec. to govt., development dept., Mar., 1928; offg. dep. secty., local self-govt. dept., Mar., 1931; sub-collr., Jan., 1932; dist. and sess. judge, May, 1935.

BALAKRISHNA AYYAR, PANDUKARAN VENKU, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub. collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 26th Sept., 1900).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and Oxford (non-collegiate); joined the service, 7th Dec., 1925, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub. collr. and jt. mag., Jan., 1927.

BALAKRISHNA, MENON MADAMPATH, Indian Police (b. 19th Oct., 1913).—Apptd. asst. supt., Madras on probn., 4th Mar., 1938.

BALAKRISHNA PILLAI, VELLAYAMBALAM KRISHNA, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 27th Sept., 1901).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and Exeter Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1925; arrived, 7th Dec., 1925, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1932; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1935; cane commr., Nov., 1937.

BALAKRISHNA, SHETTY SUNNANGAL, Indian Police (b. 14th June, 1915).—Apptd. asst. supt., Madras, on probn., 2nd Mar., 1938.

BALAKRISHNAN, ANANTHANARAYANA, B.A., B.L., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 4th Jan., 1899).—Joined the service, 7th April, 1921; dep. acct. gen. P. & T., Nagpur, Nov., 1936; ditto, Central Provs., Mar., 1937; asst. auditor genl. (Pers.), June, 1938.

BALAKRISHNAMURTI, DUVVURI, Indian Agric. Service (b. Dec., 1876).—Joined the service, 18th Sept., 1901; offg. asst. dir. of agric., Dec., 1915; confd., Nov., 1916; prof. of agric., Coimbatore, June, 1922; I.A.S. from 29th Oct., 1924; dep. dir. of agric., Oct. 1925.

BALARAMADAS, NYAPATI, late Judicial dept., Madras (b. 24th Oct., 1878).—Joined the service as offg. dist. munsif., 24th June, 1904; confd., July, 1905; sub-judge, Oct., 1922; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1928; retd., Oct., 1933.

BALBIR SINGH, KUNWAR, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 12th Oct., 1894).—Joined the service, 14th Sept., 1918; asst. engr., Sept., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1924; exec. engr., Sept., 1928.

BALBIR SINGH, SARDAR, Indian Police (b. 20th Sept., 1912).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., Feb., 1937.

BALDOCK, WILLIAM HENRY, Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 6th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th March, 1921; offg. supt., May, 1924; confd., Sept., 1930.

BALDWIN, ARTHUR CHARLES JOHN, M.A., late Indian Educ. Service (b. 21st Sept., 1882).—Educ. at Cheltenham, St. John's Coll., Oxford, and La Sorbonne, Paris; joined the service, 16th Dec., 1911, and served as principal, Rangoon, Collegiate Sch.; on mil. duty, Apr., 1915, to Feb., 1919; educ. inspr., Rangoon, Feb., 1919; asst. dir. of public instrn., Burma, Apr., 1924; retd., Oct., 1936.

BALKISHAN KAPUR, LALA, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 27th Nov., 1896).—Joined the service, 22nd Nov., 1920; asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1921; offg. exec. engr., April, 1929; confd., Oct., 1932.

BALL, EDMUND LANCASTER, B.A., India Audit Office (auditor) (b. 24th April, 1883).—Educ. at City of London School, and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. junior clerk, store dept., 1st March, 1907; transf. to India audit office, Aug., 1907; senr. clerk, Feb., 1915; asst. to auditor, Dec., 1921; auditor, Mar., 1934.

BALL, GEORGE FALCONER, M.C., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 7th Apr., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 26th Jan., 1921; dep. consvr., Feb., 1924; offg. consvr., Nov., 1936.

BALL, GEORGE WILFRED MORTON, B.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 1st June, 1886).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1908; exec. engr., Oct., 1916; under sec. to govt., irrigation branch, Nov., 1927; retd., Mar., 1933.

BALL, Rev. HENRY, M.A. Indian Eccles. Establ. (junr. chaplain, Bombay) (b. 28th Aug., 1899).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 30th Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1930.

BALL, HENRY FREDERICK, M.C., M.A., late Indian C.S. (Bombay) (b. 13th May, 1891).—Educ. at Blundell's School, Tiverton, and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 28th Nov., 1914, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag.; on mil. duty, March, 1915, to April, 1919; under sec. to govt., rev., &c., depts., July, 1920; asst. regtr. Co-operative Societies, Nov., 1921; actg. supt., Land Records, Aug., 1923; offg. collr., dist. mag. and pol. agent, March, 1926; offg. collr. of Bombay and supt. of stamps, June, 1927; offg. dep. sec., to govt., finance dept., April, 1928; confd., Sept., 1930; retd., Nov., 1931.

BALLARD, BASIL WOODS (see Woods-Ballard).

BALMUKUND, RAI BAHADUR, Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Bihar) (b. 1st Mar., 1884).—Joined the service, 23rd Sept., 1906; asst. engr., Sept., 1907; exec. engr., Sept., 1918; offg. suptg. engr., Feb., 1933; confd., Mar., 1934; temp. dep. ch. engr., irrign. dept., Bihar and Orissa, Mar., 1934.

BALWANT NAG SINGH, Indian Service of Engineers (asst. exec. engr., United Provs.)—Joined the service as engr. student, 25th Aug., 1930; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1931.

BALWANT SINGH, GAREWAL, SARDAR SAHIB SARDAR, B.A., Punjab Civil Service (b. 2nd Nov., 1892).—Extra asst. commr., Punjab, Oct., 1915; sub-div. offcr. (subs. Prov.), Oct., 1936.

BALWANT SINGH, SHIHN, SARDAR
A.M.I.E.(Ind.), late Indian Service of Engrs.
(b. 30th Aug., 1889).—Joined the service,
15th Sept., 1913; asst. engr., Sept., 1914;
asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr.,
Oct., 1923; ret'd., Sept., 1936.

BAMBAWALE, BHARGAO AMRIT, B.A.,
Indian Civil Service (dep. commr., Central
Prov.) (b. 3rd Nov., 1903).—Educ. at Univ.
of Allahabad, and St. John's Coll., Cambridge.
Joined the service 26th Oct., 1926; arrived
5th Dec., 1926, and served in the Central
Prov. as asst. commr.; under-sec. to govt.,
C.P., March, 1930; offg. dep. commr., Feb.,
1933; provl. ditto, Sept., 1938.

BAMBAWALE, TRIMBAK AMRIT, Indian
Police (dist. supt. Central Prov.) (b. 23rd
Mar., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. dist.
supt. on 5th May, 1920; offg. dist. supt., April,
1923; confd., Aug., 1928.

BAMBERGER, ALBERT EDWARD, India
Office (asst. to pol. A.D.C.) (b. 7th Feb., 1894).
—Apptd. clerical officer, 28th Oct., 1921;
higher clerical officer, July, 1935; asst. to pol.
A.D.C., July, 1935.

BAMFORD PERCIVAL CLIFFORD, C.I.E.,
Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Bengal) (b.
28th April, 1886).—Joined the service as asst.
supt. on 8th Dec., 1906; supt., July, 1917; on
deputation as dep. dir. intell. bureau, govt. of
India, from Nov., 1924; offg. dir., ditto, Apl.,
1934; awarded King's Police Medal, 1925;
C.I.E., June, 1931; dep. inspr.-genl., Nov.,
1931.

BAMJEE, SORAB DINSHAW, B.Sc., Indian
State Railways (exec. engr., E.I. rly.) (b. 30th
Nov., 1889).—Joined the service, 4th Mar.,
1914; resdt. engr., E.I. rly., Mar., 1922; exec.
engr., ditto, Jan., 1928.

BAN, BINDRA (see Bindra Ban).

BANARJI, AGHORE NATH, B.L., Judl. dept.,
Orissa (b. 16th Mar., 1888).—Apptd. dist. and
sess. judge, 5th Nov., 1929.

BANARJI, AMIYA CHARAN, M.A., M.Sc.,
Indian Educ. Service (b. 23rd Sept., 1891).—
Apptd. prof. of mathematics, Muir Central Coll.,
Allahabad, 19th July, 1920; with Allahabad
Univ. from 1st July, 1922.

BANARJI, BHOLA NATH, M.A., B.L., Rai
Bahadur, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b.
5th Dec., 1883).—Joined the service as proby.
dep. supt., 20th May, 1908; confd. May, 1910;
supt. (s.p.t.), Dec., 1919; confd., Feb., 1921;
offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Apl., 1932; Indian Police
Medal, 1937.

BANARJI, BHUPENDRA NATH, Rai Bahadur,
late Indian Police (b. 1882).—Joined the service
22nd May, 1905; held non-gazetted appt., prior
to 13th Mar., 1919; offg. asst. commr., Mar.,
1919; confd., Aug. 1920; offg. dep. commr.,
Apl., 1926; confd., Dec., 1926; awarded King's
Police Medal, Jan., 1934; ret'd. Oct., 1937.

BANARJI, DURGADAS, M.A., A.I.E.E., late
India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 22nd Mar., 1875).
—Joined the service as apprentice asst. supt.,
28th May, 1897; asst. supt., May, 1898; supt.,
April, 1911; dep. postmaster-genl., Jan., 1915;
divl. engr., tels., March, 1923; dir., tel. engrg.,
Oct., 1925; offg. postmaster genl., Bombay,
March, 1927; dir. tele. engrg., Bengal and
Assam Circle; ret'd., Mar., 1930.

BANARJI, JATINDRA MOHAN, Rai Bahadur,
late Bengal Civil Service (b. Aug., 1881).
—Joined the service as proby. dep. magte.
and dep. collr., 26th Aug., 1902; confd.,
May, 1903; magte. and collr., Aug., 1929; ret'd.,
Aug., 1934.

BANARJI, KSHIROD GOPAL (see Kshirod
Gopal, B.).

BANARJI, RAGHABENDRA NATH, B.A., B.L.,
Barr., Indian Police (supt.) (b. 2nd April, 1893).
—Joined the service, 20th Jan., 1917; apptd.
to I.P. as supt., Bengal, Oct., 1935; awarded
Indian Police Medal, Jan., 1938.

BANARJI, SHAILENDRA NATH, RAI
BAHADUR, B.A., B.E., late Indian Service
of Engrs. (b. 13th Jan., 1881).—Joined
the service 30th Jan., 1905; asst. engr.,
Jan., 1906; exec. engr., Jan., 1914; offg.
suptg. engr., March, 1921; confd., April, 1926;
offg. ch. engr., Feb., 1931; ret'd., Jan., 1936.

BANARJI, TRIDIB NATH, M.B. (prof. medl.
coll., Patna) (b. 18th Mar., 1890).—Joined
the service as asst. surg., 1st Sept., 1915; prof.
medl. coll., Patna, Dec., 1925.

BANARSI DAS, P.M.S. Supt. Mental
Hospital, Agra (b. 1st Apl., 1887).—Civil surg.
Mar., 1933; supt., Mental Hospital, Agra,
May, 1934.

BANERJEE, ABHAYA CHARAN, M.A.,
late India Posts and Tels. (b. 10th Sept.,
1876).—Joined the service, 2nd June, 1899;
asst. supt., June, 1900; supt., March,
1912; divl. engr., tels., Aug., 1920; offg. dep.
chief engr., tels., Feb., 1925; dir. tel. engrg.,
Dec., 1925; dep. ch. engr. (phones), Dec., 1927;
offg. postmaster-genl. March, 1928; dir. tel.
engrg. eastern circle, Nov., 1928; dep. ch. engr.,
tels., Apl., 1930; ret'd. Sept. 1931.

BANERJEE, BAMA CHARAN, M.A., Indian
Audit Dept. (b. 3rd Nov., 1893).—Joined
the service, 2nd Sept., 1916; asst. acct.-genl.,
posts and tels., Mar., 1929; dep., ditto, Feb.,
1930; exr. local fund accts., Central Prov.,
Sept., 1930; exr., local fund accts., Bihar and
Orissa, Apl., 1934; dep. acct.-genl., Bengal,
Sept., 1936.

BANERJEE, BHABO NATH, M.Sc., Ph.D.,
late Meteorological Dept. (b. 15th Aug.,
1895).—Joined the service as meteorologist,
11th Jan., 1923; ret'd., April, 1935.

BANERJEE, HIRANMAY, B.A. (Cal.), Indian
C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. coll., Bengal) (b. 5th Sept.,
1905).—Educ. at University of Calcutta and
School of Oriental Studies, London; joined
the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived Nov., 1929,
and served in Bengal as asst. coll. and mag.;
jt. mag. and dep. collr., Nov., 1930; offg. dist.
and sess. judge, Apl., 1936.

BANERJEE, NARENDRA NATH, India Posts
and Tels. (p.m.g.), (b. 25th Sept., 1885).—
Joined the service, 26th Sept., 1907; asst. supt.,
Aug., 1910; asst. divl. engr., Feb., 1921; divl.
engr., Feb., 1926; offg. dir. tel. engrg., June,
1931; ditto, Bombay, Sept., 1932; ditto,
Punjab, May, 1934; offg. dir. tels., Mar., 1935;
confd., May, 1935; p.m.g., Bihar and Orissa,
May, 1938.

BANERJEE, RABINDRA NATH, C.I.E., M.A.
(Cal.), B.A. (Cantab.), Indian C.S. (secty. to govr.
of Central Prov. and Berar) (b. 1st Feb., 1895).

—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 22nd March, 1920; arrived, 20th May, 1920, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., April, 1925; regr. of co-op. societies and of indus., Jan., 1929; dep. commr. and ditto, Feb., 1930; secty to govt., C.P., rev. dept., Dec., 1933; ditto, local self govt. dept., Nov., 1936; secty to govt., Apl., 1937; C.I.E., June, 1938.

BANERJEE, SANTOSH KUMAR, Rai Bahadur, late Dept. of Indus. and Labour (b. 7th Sept., 1883).—Joined the service, 14th Nov., 1904; offg. asst. secty., Govt. of India dept. of indus. and labour, Sept., 1928; confd., June, 1930; ditto, lab. dept., Nov., 1937; retd., Sept., 1938.

BANERJEE, SATYENDRA MOHAN, M.A., Indian C.S. (secty., bd. of rev., Bengal) (b. 14th Dec., 1898).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Cambridge Univ. (non-collegiate); joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1923 and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and coll.; and sub-divl. officer, May, 1925; offg. magte. and coll., Mar., 1929; offg. secty., bd. of rev., Bengal, Feb., 1935; confd., Aug., 1935.

BANERJEE SHAMANANDA, B.A., B.Sc. (Cal.), B.Sc. (Tech., Manchester Univ.) (div. engr., wireless) Indian Posts and Telegraphs (b. 29th May, 1897).—Joined the service, 2nd Apl., 1925, as asst. div. engr., wireless (on probn.), confd., Oct., 1925; div. engr., wireless, Apl., 1928; del. to internl. conf., Cairo, Feb., 1938.

BANERJEE, SUDHANSU KUMAR, M.Sc., D.Sc. (Calcutta), Meteorological Dept., (meteorologist) (b. 27th Apl., 1893).—Apptd. dir., Bombay and Alibagh observatories, 11th Apl., 1922; meteorologist, Jan., 1927; offg. dir.-gen. of observatories, Mar., 1933; and again, July, 1936.

BANERJEE, SURENDRA NATH, RAI BAHADUR, I.S.O., B.A., Commerce Dept., Govt. of India (dep. dir. of comm. intelligence and statistics) (b. Nov., 1881).—Held ministerial appts. from 5th June, 1905; supt., Mar., 1911; asst. secty., bd. of industries and munitions, Mar., 1920; ditto, dept. of industries, Feb., 1921; ditto, commerce dept., Mar., 1924; dep. dir. of comml. intelligence and statistics, May, 1932; asst. commr. of inc. tax, Feb., 1935 to Apl., 1936; I.S.O., May, 1937.

BANERJEE, SURENDRA NATH, Rai Bahadur, B.A. (b. 20th Mar., 1883).—Apptd. asst. commr. of income tax, Bengal, Feb., 1926; offg. commr., Feb., 1935; retd., Aug., 1938.

BANERJEE, UPENDRA NATH, Indian State Ry's. (dist. loco. supt., E.B. rly.) (b. 2nd Nov., 1892).—Joined the service, 4th Jan., 1920, as asst. loco. supt.; dist. loco. supt. E.B. rly. (provl.), Aug., 1934.

BANERJI, Sir ALBION RAJ KUMAR, Kt., C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1894; arrived, 19th Dec., 1895, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; head asst., Oct., 1904; transfid. to foreign service, as diwan of Cochin, May, 1907; C.I.E., Dec., 1911; collr., and dist. mag., Jan., 1915; addl. ordinary member of council of H.H. the Maharajah of Mysore, from March, 1916; C.S.I., June, 1921; retd., May, 1922; Kt., June, 1925.

BANERJI, AMRITA LAL, RAI BAHADUR, I.S.O., B.A., Legis. dept. Govt., of India, (asst. regr.) (b. 20th Jan., 1880).—Joined the service, 28th Nov. 1904, and held non-gazetted appts. to 31st Oct. 1914; supt., Nov. 1914; asst. secty., Aug., 1927; I.S.O., June, 1936; asst. regr. fed. ct., India, Nov., 1937.

BANERJI, ANIL CHANDRA (see Anil C.B.).

BANERJI, BIBHUTI BHUSHAN, B.A., Indian Police (assi. supt., Orissa).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Bihar and Orissa, 27th Jan., 1934; confd., Dec., 1934.

BANERJI, JYOTIR MOY, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr.) (b. 24th Oct., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Madras, 19th Nov., 1928; dep. consvr., Nov., 1933.

BANERJI, RADHA BINODE, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 10th Mar., 1896).—Joined the service, 12th May, 1919; attd. officr., acct.-genl., C.P., June and Nov., 1930; asst. A.G., C.P., June 1930; deputy acct.-genl., Bengal, Oct., 1937.

BANERJI, SHISHIR KUMAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., C.P.) (b. 21st Oct., 1913).—Educ. at D.A.V. Intermediate College, Dehra Dun, and Allahabad Univ.; joined the service, 27th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in the C.P. as asst. commr.

BANNERMAN, Sir ARTHUR D'ARCY GORDON, Bart., K.C.V.O., C.I.E., Lieut.-Col., Indian Army (ret'd.).—First commn., 29th Aug., 1885; from April, 1893, offd. as asst. to govr.-genl.'s agent in Central India; confd., Nov., 1896; 1st asst. to ditto, May, 1897; 1st asst. to govr.-genl.'s agent in Rajputana, and chief commr., Ajmer-Merwara, Oct., 1899; offg. pol. agent in Kotah and Jhalawar, April, 1903; C.I.E., June, 1903; confd., Feb., 1905; resdt. at Jaipur and pol. agent in Alwar, Sept., 1910; special duty from Feb., 1911; C.V.O., Dec., 1911; pol. agent, E. States of Rajputana, Nov., 1913; resdt., Kashmir, Dec., 1917; retd. from I.A., Feb., 1921; pol. A.D.C. to sec. of state for India, Sept., 1921, to Sept., 1928; K.C.V.O., Jan., 1928; gentleman usher in ordinary to H.M. the King, Oct., 1928.

BANWARI LAL, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Orissa) (b. 16th Feb., 1903).—Joined the service, 5th Nov., 1924; exec. engr., Nov., 1925; offg. exec. engr., July, 1931; confd., Oct., 1934.

BANWELL, GODWIN EDWARD, O.B.E., M.C., Indian Police (dist. supt., Burma) (b. 31st July, 1897).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., on 26th Jan., 1920; offg. dist. supt., Feb., 1925, confd., Nov., 1928; O.B.E., Dec., 1930; awarded King's Police Medal, Jan., 1931; pers. asst. to dep. insp.-genl. ry's., Sept., 1931; dep. commr., Rangoon city pol., Feb., 1938.

BAPAT, SHRIRAM BALKRISHNA, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 22nd Aug., 1906).—Educ. at Bombay University, Emmanuel College, Cambridge, and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Mar., 1934.

BARBER, CHARLES GORDON, C.I.E., M.B.E.,
A.C.G.I., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr.,
Madras), (b. 18th Jan., 1885).—Joined the
service 1st Oct., 1908, as asst. engr.; exec.
engr., May, 1919; M.B.E., June, 1919; C.I.E.,
Jan., 1935; suptg. engr., Sept., 1936.

BARBER, CHARLES HARRISON, D.S.O.,
M.D., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.) (b. 10th
March, 1877).—First commn., dated 30th
Jan., 1904; in milty. employ to 3rd April,
1912; prof'r. King George's medl. coll., Luck-
now, Aug., 1919; civil surg., Mar., 1921; ret'd.,
Mar., 1932.

BARBER, LEWIS, A.M.I.E.E., Indian State
Rlys. (ch. electrical engr., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 4th
Mar., 1885).—Joined the service as asst.
electrical engr., 22nd Nov., 1912; offg. ch. elec-
trical engr., Sept., 1931; confd., May, 1936.

BARBER, ROBERT CECIL, Dept. of Land
Records, Burma (asst. dir.) (b. 5th May, 1888).—
Joined the service, 16th Dec., 1909, as asst.
supt.; supt., Apl., 1914; offg. asst. dir., Nov.,
1934; confd., Feb., 1935.

BARCLAY, ARCHIBALD GEORGE GRANT,
A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.,
Madras), (b. 6th Aug., 1887).—Joined the service
as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1911; exec. engr.,
Oct., 1919.

BARCLAY, FRANCIS CYRIL, B.A., late
Indian C.S. (b. 10th Oct., 1887).—Educ. at
Winchester, and New Coll., Oxford; apptd.
after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 2nd
Dec., 1911, and served in Burma as asst. commr.;
offg. asst. collr. of customs, Rangoon, June,
1917, to Jan., 1919; offg. dep. commr., from
March, 1919, to April, 1920, and from Aug.,
1920; ret'd., Dec., 1929.

BARCLAY, JOHN BUCHANAN, Indian State
Rlys. (goods supt., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 20th Aug.,
1890).—Joined the service as traffic probationer,
14th Oct., 1911; asst. traffic supt., Oct., 1914;
asst. traffic manager, Nov., 1922; divl. traffic
manager, Aug., 1924; goods supt., Jan., 1931.

BARDSWELL, HUGH ROSSER, M.A., late
Indian C.S. (b. 10th June, 1874).—Educ. at
King's Coll. Sch., London, and Lincoln Coll.,
Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1897; arrived,
15th Dec., 1898, and served in Madras
as asst. collr. and mag.; head asst. collr.
and mag., Nov., 1908; sub. collr. and
joint mag., May, 1910; dist. and sess. judge,
July, 1915; offg. judge, high ct., Madras, July,
1930, and again, July, 1932; confd., May, 1933;
ret'd., June, 1934.

BARING, HON. EVELYN, late Indian C.S.
(b. 29th Sept., 1903).—Educ. at Winchester
and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service,
22nd Oct., 1926; arrived, Dec., 1926, and
served in the United Provs. as asst. mag.
and coll.; secty. to agent of govt. of India in
S. Africa, July, 1929; ret'd., March, 1934.

BARKAT ALI, KHAN BAHADUR, late
Indian Rly. Accts. Service (b. 2nd Feb., 1883).—
Held non-gaz. appts. from 5th June, 1903; confd.
as supt., Rly Board, Dec., 1919; accts. offcr.,
gr. I., E.I. Rly., Nov., 1925; offcr. on spec.
duty, N.W. Rly., Dec., 1926; Khan Bahadur,
June, 1929; confd. as accts. offcr., gr. I.,
N.W. Rly., Apl., 1929; confd. as dep. dir. of
fin., Rly. Board, Apl., 1932; dep. chief accts.
offcr., N.W. Rly., Feb., 1937; ret'd., Feb., 1938.

BARKAT ALI, MUHAMMAD, KHAN BAHADUR,
B.A., India Posts and Tels. (p.m.g.) (b.
Aug., 1885).—Joined the service, 1st Oct.,
1907; supt., Jan., 1909; asst. p.m.g., Punjab,
July, 1930; dep. p.m.g., Bombay, May, 1934;
p.m.g., Aug., 1938.

BARKER, ARTHUR NEAL, B.Sc., A.I.C.,
Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma), (b.
15th Sept., 1898).—Joined the service as asst.
consvr., on 31st Dec., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov.,
1930.

BARKER, BASIL HYDE, B.Sc., Indian
Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Burma) (b. 24th
Oct., 1906).—Joined the service as asst. exec.
engr., Burma, 23rd Nov., 1928; exec. engr.,
Oct., 1937.

BARKER, FREDERICK ALLAN, C.I.E.,
O.B.E., M.A., M.D., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., Jail
Dept., Punjab (inspr. genl. of prisons)
(b. 17th Oct., 1882).—First commn.,
27th July, 1907; in mil. employ till
July, 1910, when he was apptd. jail supt.;
on mil. service in Egypt, Oct., 1914, to Dec.,
1919; O.B.E., June, 1919; senior medical
officer and civil surgeon, Port Blair, Jan., 1920;
offg. inspr.-genl. of prisons, Central Provs.,
Dec., 1925; inspr.-genl. of prisons, Punjab,
Oct., 1927; offg. dir.-genl., I.M.S., Feb., 1935;
on special duty, home dept., Govt. of India,
Aug., 1935; C.I.E., Jan., 1938.

BARKER, PERCY EDGAR, O.B.E., Mil. Accts.
Dept. (b. 11th Apl., 1884).—Joined the service,
as mil. acctn., 2nd cl., July, 1920; dy. fin. adv.
R.A.F., Apl., 1930; dy. fin. adv. mil. fin., Mar.,
1934; O.B.E., 1937.

BARKER, SIR RAYNER CHILDE, Kt., C.I.E.,
India Office, late Indo-European Telegraph Dept.
—Entered the Indian Telegraph dept., 22nd
Sept., 1879, and served as asst. supt. and supt.,
C.I.E., April 1889; transfed. to I.-E. tel. dept.,
May, 1896, as engineer and electrician; dir.,
Persian section, Sept., 1898; ret'd., Nov., 1912;
dir.-in-chief, Indo-Euro. tel., P.W.D., India
Office, Nov., 1912 to July, 1923; Kt. June, 1923.

BARKER, ROBERT, Indian Police (dist.
supt.) (b. 2nd Nov., 1894).—Joined the
service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, on 24th
Nov., 1921; dist. supt., June, 1926.

BARKER, RONALD WILLIAM, O.B.E., B.A.,
Lt.-Col., I.A., Burma Commn. (dep. commr.), (b.
20th Sept., 1883).—Arrived 10th Oct., 1907, and
employed in mil. dept. to Feb., 1912; asst.
commr., Feb., 1912; on mil. service April, 1917,
to Jan., 1920; offg. dep. commr., June, 1924;
confd., Oct., 1924; addl. dep. commr., Port
Blair, June, 1924; offg. dep. commr., ditto,
June, 1924; confd., Jan., 1929; O.B.E., June,
1932.

BARKER, SIR WILBERFORCE ROSS,
K.C.I.E., C.B.—Chairman, public services
commn., May, 1926 to Nov., 1932; K.C.I.E.,
June, 1930.

BARLEE, SIR KENNETH WILLIAM, B.A.,
Barr., late Indian C.S. (b. 29th Nov.,
1877).—Educ. at Warwick Sch. and Dublin
Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1900; arrived,
29th Nov., 1901, and served in Bombay as
asst. collr. and mag., and forest settlm. offcr.;
asst. judge, and sess. judge, Aug., 1906; under-
sec. to govt., pol., judl., etc., depts., Jan.,
1911, to Aug., 1913; judl. asst. to agent to

Govt., Kathiawar, Sept., 1919; judge and sess. judge and ditto, Dec., 1919; member of legisl. council, 1925; offg. addl. judicial commr. of Sind, June, 1926; offg. judge, Bombay high ct., June, 1930; confid., May, 1931; knighted, May, 1937; retd., Nov., 1937.

BARLOW, HAROLD EVERARD, Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 12th May, 1892).—Educ. at Haileybury and Institut Minerva, Zurich; joined the service, 26th Aug., 1920; arrived, 7th Dec., 1920, and served in United Provs. as asst. commr.; jt. mag., July, 1922; city mag., Nov., 1924; offg. mag. and collr., April, 1925; offg. dep. commr., March, 1926; offg. mag. and collr., Dec., 1926; confid., Mar., 1932.

BARLOW, HENRY ARTHUR NORTHEY, Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 11th Aug., 1905).—Educ. at Marlborough and Corpus Christi Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 16th Oct., 1929; arrived, 18th Nov., 1929, and served in the United Provinces as asst. coll. and mag.; asst. commr., Mar., 1931; jt. mag., Mar., 1931; under secty. to A.G.G. in States of W.I., Dec., 1933; vice-consul, Kashgar, Oct., 1934; and again, Aug., 1936; city mag., Peshawar, Dec., 1936; secty. to Resident for Eastern States, Nov., 1937.

BARNARD, ALBERT ALFRED, O.B.E., B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Assam), (b. 5th Aug., 1891.—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1914; asst. engr., Nov., 1914; O.B.E., June, 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1923.

BARNARD, ALBERT WILLIAM STANDFIELD, Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 1st Nov., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 5th Oct., 1920; offg. supt., Mar., 1923; confid., Apl., 1929.

BARNARDO, FREDERICK ADOLPHUS FLEMING, C.I.E., C.B.E., M.D., F.R.C.S.E., Lt.-Col. I.M.S. (retd.), (b. 4th June, 1874).—Joined the service, 26th July, 1902; on mil. duty till Aug., 1906, when he was apptd. civil surgeon, Bengal; on mil. service, Jan., 1915 to March, 1921; C.I.E., June, 1918; C.B.E., June, 1919; principal, medical coll. Calcutta, March, 1922; retd., June, 1929.

BARNE, REV. GEORGE DUNSFORD, M.A., C.I.E., O.B.E., late Indian Eccles. Estabt. (b. 6th May, 1879).—Joined the service, 11th May, 1908; prinpl. and chaplain, The Lawrence Royal Military School, Sanawar, Oct., 1912; O.B.E., Jan., 1919; C.I.E., June, 1923; Bishop of Lahore, Apl., 1932; vice-chancellor of Punjab univ., Jan., 1936.

BARNES, SIR GEORGE STAPYLLON, K.C.B., K.C.S.I.—Educ. at Eton and Univ. Coll., Oxford; barr., Inner Temple, 1883; counsel to the Board of Trade in bankruptcy matters, 1886; official receiver in companies' liquidation, 1893; senr. official receiver, 1896; comptr. of the Companies Dept., Board of Trade, 1904-11; comptr.-gen. of the Labour Dept., Board of Trade, 1911-13; member of the cttee. on the amendment of the company laws, 1906; of royal commn. on sugar supplies during the war, 1914; of Treasury cttee. on new issues of capital during the war, 1915; K.C.B., 1915; member of council of govr.-gen., in charge of commerce and industry and railway depts., Mar., 1915; took his seat on the council, Apl., 1916; K.C.S.I., June, 1920; retd., Apl., 1921.

BARNES, SIR HUGH SHAKESPEAR, K.C.S.I., K.C.V.O., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Malvern Coll.; apptd. after exam. of 1872; arrived, 30th Oct., 1874, and served in the N.W. Prov. as asst. mag. and collr.; transfed. to finl. dept. of govt. of India, Dec., 1876, and apptd. asst. acctnt.-gen. in the N.W. Prov.; private sec. to the finl. member of the govr.-gen.'s council, Dec., 1876; acted as under sec. in the home dept. in 1878; on special duty under the foreign dept., Nov., 1879; asst. to rest., Kandahar, Nov., 1880; served in the Afghan campaign, 1881, as pol. officer with Gen. Wilkinson's brigade; asst. to the govr.-gen.'s agent in Baluchistan, 1881-83; pol. agent in Quetta and Pishin, June, 1883; in charge of arrangements, supplies, &c., for passage of Afghan boundary commn. across Baluch desert, Aug., 1884; under sec. to govt. of India, foreign dept., May, 1890; rev. commr., Baluchistan, Dec., 1890; offd. as govr.-gen.'s agent and chief commr. in 1891 and 1892; rest., Kashmir, Mar., 1895; offd. as sec. to govt. of India, Foreign Dept., Mar., 1896, and again Apl., 1899; rest. and agent for govr.-genl. in Baluchistan, June, 1896; C.S.I., June, 1897; sec. to govt. of India, Foreign dept., Dec., 1900; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1903; K.C.V.O., Mar., 1903; lieut.-govr. of Burma, Apl., 1903; retd., May, 1905; member of the council of India, May, 1905, to Nov., 1913.

BARNES, HUMPHREY ASTON, C.I.E., Major, I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 27th Aug., 1900).—First commn., dated 15th Apl., 1919; in milty. employ prior to 23rd June, 1926; vice-consul, Ahwaz, May, 1927; under sec. to pol. restd. in Persian Gulf, Apl., 1928; asst. commr., Kohat, May, 1928; dep. commr. Hazara (temp.), May, 1930; asst. commr., Charsadda, Aug., 1930; addl. under-secty. to C.C. and A.G.G., N.W.F.P., May, 1931; under-secty., ditto, Sept., 1931; under-secty. to govt., N.W.F.P., Apl., 1932; asst. pol. agent, Malakand, Aug., 1933; ditto, North Waziristan, Sept., 1933; ditto Sth. Waziristan, Oct., 1934; pol. agent, ditto, Feb., 1938; C.I.E., Jan., 1938.

BARNES, REV. JOHN, B.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (junr. chaplain, Bombay) (b. 7th Jan., 1898).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, Bombay, 25th Feb., 1928; junr. chaplain, Feb., 1930.

BARNES, PAUL, Indian Police (b. 5th Jan., 1916).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bengal, on probn., 26th Nov., 1936.

BARNETT, CECIL GUY, C.I.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 7th Nov., 1881).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service, 1st Oct., 1902; arrived, Nov., 1902; asst. engr., Oct., 1902; exec. engr., Oct., 1910, services placed at disposal of chief commr., Delhi, from May, 1913; suptg. engr., Nov., 1921; C.I.E., June, 1923; offg. chief engr., July, 1926; retd., Mar., 1930.

BARNS, C. J., All India Radio (News Editor, Central News Orgn.) (b. Oct., 1902).—Joined the service 9th Sept., 1937.

BARON, CECIL GEORGE, late Indian State Railways (b. 12th Dec., 1881).—Joined the service, 19th June, 1912; dist. traffic supt., E.B. Rly., Mar., 1931; retd., Dec., 1936.

BARR, ARTHUR GUY, O.B.E., late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 25th July, 1877).—Apptd. to fin. dept., 16th Mar., 1901; asst. acctnt.-gen., Bombay, Apl., 1902; inspr. of local fund

accounts, Burma, Nov., 1903; asst. acctnt.-gen., Burma, Dec., 1903; asst. acctnt.-gen., Bombay, Jan., 1907; acting asst. sec. to govt. of India, fin. dept., Nov., 1908; asst. acctnt.-gen., Bengal, Oct., 1909; asst. acctnt.-gen., Bombay, Feb., 1911; employed in Bikaner State from Oct., 1911; on mil. service under War Office from Sept., 1914; on deptn. as audit officer, South Persia Rifles from Apl., 1918; O.B.E., July, 1920; dep. acctnt.-gen., Sept., 1921; dep. auditor-gen., Delhi, Sept., 1923; dir. of army audit and offg. acctnt.-gen., Sept., 1924; acct.-genl. (provl.), Nov., 1925; confd., Jan., 1927; offg. acct.-genl., Bombay, Oct., 1927; dir. of army audit, Jan., 1927; ret'd., July, 1932.

BARR, DAVID COURTNEY, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Bihar) (b. 30th July, 1914).—Educ. at Kingswood Sch. Bath, and Imperial Coll. of Science and Technology, London; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937, confd. 13th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938 and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.

BARRACLOUGH, NORMAN, B.Sc., Dept. of Mines in India (inspr.) (b. 10th June, 1896).—Joined the service as junr. inspr., 31st Dec., 1923; inspr., Dec., 1926.

BARRETT, HAMILTON BERESFORD, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 4th June, 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., on 23rd Dec., 1921; dep. consvr., Oct., 1924.

BARRETT, PAULIN FREDERICK, Indian C.S. (asst. magt. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 19th July, 1913).—Educ. at Ald. Newton's Boys' School, Leicester, Univ. Coll., Leicester, and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 16th Jan., 1937; arrived in India, Mar., 1937, and served in U.P. as asst. magt. and collr.

BARRETT, LEONARD MILLER FRANK, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Orissa) (b. 2nd Mar., 1896).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Mar., 1920; offg. exec. engr., Apl., 1927; confd., Oct., 1928; on depn. to Orissa, Apl. to Oct., 1936.

BARRETTO, WILLIAM LOUIS, O.B.E., B.A., late Burma Commn. (b. 5th Aug., 1882).—Previous service from Aug., 1909; dep. commr., May, 1924; O.B.E., June, 1932; ret'd., Aug., 1937.

BARRINGTON, JAMES, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 15th Aug., 1911).—Educated at Keble College, Oxford; joined the service, 21st Sept., 1936; arrived in India, Nov., 1936, and served in Burma as asst. commr.

BARRON, DOUGLAS SHIELD, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 18th Mar., 1904).—Educ. at Archbishop Holgate's Sch., Barnsley, and Corpus Christi Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1926; arrived, 20th Dec., 1926, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., Feb., 1933.

BARRON, HARRIE, B.A., B.A.I., Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.I. Rly.) (b. 5th Feb., 1890).—Joined the service, Oct., 1921; asst. engr., Jan., 1924; exec. engr., Aug., 1935.

BARRON, WILLIAM JAMES, Indian Police (dist. supt., Burma) (b. 16th Apl., 1896).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., on 16th Dec., 1921; offg. dist. supt., June, 1923; confd., Sept., 1927.

BARROW, JOHN ROTHNEY, M.A., late Indian Educ. Service (b. 25th Oct., 1881).—Joined the service, 9th June, 1905, and served as inspr. in Assam; profrr., Dacca Coll., Jan., 1911; prinpl. of Chittagong Coll., Nov., 1915; offg. prinpl., presdy. coll., Calcutta, Nov., 1917, July, 1921, and again, July, 1929; confd., July, 1930; inspr. of schools, June, 1925; ret'd., Sept., 1932.

BARRY, DENIS THURBURN, late Indian Forest Service (Madras) (b. 23rd Mar., 1880).—Apptd. asst. consvr., Madras, 18th March, 1905; dist. forest offrr., Oct., 1908; forest research officer, Coimbatore, Aug., 1919; dep. consvr., May, 1921; actg. consvr., Oct., 1923; consvr., June, 1925; ret'd., Oct., 1930.

BARTELS, REV. REGINALD CAIN, B.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (senr. chaplain), (b. 18th Nov., 1883).—Apptd. temporary chaplain, 6th June, 1921; junior chaplain, April, 1924; senr. chaplain, Apl., 1934.

BARTER, ELDER GAUL, Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Madras) (b. 9th Jan., 1892).—Educ. at Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge, and University Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1915; arrived 6th Dec., 1916, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; on mil. duty from Nov., 1917, to Feb., 1919; sub. collr. and jt. mag., Feb., 1922; offg. dist. & sess. judge, June, 1928; confd., Sept., 1930.

BARTLETT, FREDERICK ROBERT, late India Office (b. 8th Aug., 1871).—Apptd. clerical officer, 2nd Aug., 1921; higher clerical officer (acting), Aug., 1922; confd., April, 1928; ret'd., Aug., 1936.

BARTLEY, CHARLES, B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Calcutta) (b. 18th Dec., 1882).—Educ. at St. Columba's Coll., Londonderry, Methodist Coll., Belfast, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1906; arrived 10th Dec., 1907, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., and dep. collr., Sept., 1914; dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1921; transf. to Assam as dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1930; supt. and remembr. of legal affairs and secty. to govt., legal dept., Bengal, Nov., 1931; offg. judge high ct., Calcutta, April, 1932; Apl. and Nov., 1933; confd., Mar., 1934.

BARTLEY, FREDERICK DOUGLAS, C.B.E., late Indian Police (b. 1st June, 1889).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 27th Nov., 1908; asst. supt., June, 1910; supt., May, 1916; dep. commr., Calcutta, Mar., 1921; awarded King's police medal, 1923; C.B.E., Jan., 1932; awarded bar to King's police medal, Jan., 1933; ret'd., Aug., 1936.

BARTLEY, HERBERT GWYTHER, Indian Police (dep. insp. genl., Assam) (b. 18th Feb., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 6th Dec., 1912; supt., Dec., 1923; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Assam, Jan., 1936; confd.

BARTLEY, JOHN, C.I.E., M.A., LL.B., Barr., Indian C.S. (addtl. secty. to the govt. of India, legisl. dept.) (b. 2nd Mar., 1886).—Educ. at Campbell Coll., Belfast and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India,

30th Nov., 1910, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; pol. agent, Hill Tippera (temp.), July, 1915; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Jan., 1916; dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1924; offg. supt. and membr. of legal affairs, Nov., 1923; offg. sec., govt. of Bengal, legisl. dept., April, 1924; confid. and sec., legisl. council, Aug., 1925; offg. jt. sec. and draftsman to Govt. of India, legisl. dept., Apl., 1932; addl. ditto, Nov., 1932; offg. dep. secty. to the govt. of India, legisl. dept., Apl., 1933; secty., council of state, Apl., 1933; jt. secty. to govt. of India, legis. dept., Oct., 1933; addl. secty. ditto, Jan., 1938; C.I.E., Jan., 1936.

BARTON, JAMES CALVERT, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 6th Apl., 1881).—Joined the service, 26th Sept., 1902; asst. traffic supt., Sept., 1903; dist. ditto, May, 1910; dep. traffic manager, Oct., 1921; divl. transportation supt., Dec., 1922; offg. dep. ditto, June, 1928; dep. traffic manager, G.I.P. Rly., Nov., 1933; offg. ch. traffic manager ditto, Apl., 1934; retd., Mar., 1938.

BARTON, JOHN EVERARD, Indian State Rly. (dist. contr. of stores) (b. 30th Jan., 1889).—Joined the service, 16th Mar., 1921; resdt. engr., Feb., 1922; dist. contr. of stores, G.I.P. Rly., Dec., 1932.

BARTON, LESLIE ERIC, Lt.-Col., I.A. Indian Political Service (b. 3rd Feb., 1889).—First commn., 8th Sept., 1909; in mil. employ to May, 1919; asst. pol. agent, Khyber, May, 1919; dep. commr., Dera Ismail Khan, July, 1921; asst. commr., Hangu, Oct., 1922; dep. commr., Kohat, Mar., 1925; asst. commr., Thal, Oct., 1925; dep. commr., Bannu, April, 1926; pol. agent, Haraoti and Tonk, Oct., 1928; secty. to A.G.G. Deccan states and resdt., Kolhapur, Oct., 1933; offg. adjutant Kolhapur infy., Nov., 1933; resdt., Jaipur, Apl., 1934; offg. pol. agent, E. Rajputana states in addn., Aug., 1935; pol. agent, Bundelkhand, Nov., 1935; resdt. in Mewar, and pol. agt., S. Rajputana States, May, 1938.

BARTON, Sir WILLIAM PELL, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., late Indian C.S. (Punjab) (b. 29th, May, 1871).—Educ. at Bedford Modern Sch., Worcester Coll., Oxford, and Univ. Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1893; arrived, 17th Dec., 1894, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under sec. to govt., Oct. to Nov., 1898; agent on special duty, Kurram, Sept., 1899, to Dec., 1902; asst. commr., N.W. Frontier Prov., Jan., 1903; dep. commr., Dec., 1904; pol. agent, Feb., 1906; div. judge, Peshawar, April, 1907; dep. commr., Dera Ismail Khan, Oct., 1907; dep. commr., Kohat, Feb., 1908; pol. agent, Dir., Swat and Chitral, March, 1910; ditto and rev. commr., N.W.F. Prov., Feb., 1911; sec. to chief commr., Dec., 1911; offg. judl. commr., April, 1912, to Jan., 1914; C.I.E., Jan., 1914; dep. commr., Kohat, Nov., 1914; judl. commr., N.W.F. Prov., Jan., 1915; resdt., and ditto, Aug., 1916; resdt., Baroda, May, 1919; uitto in Waziristan, and chief pol. offr. with Waziristan Fd. Fce. (in addn.) June 1919; resdt., Baroda, Sept., 1919; C.S.I., Jan., 1920; resdt., Mysore, and chief commr. of Coorg, Dec., 1920; resdt., Hyderabad, July, 1925; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1927; retd., Apl., 1930.

BARTY, DERMONT CAMPBELL, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Sind) (b. 27th Feb., 1914).—Educ. at Fettes and St. Andrew's Univ.; joined the service, 20th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in Sind as asst. collr.

BARUA, GURU PRASAD, B.L., Indian Police (supt., Assam) (b. Mar., 1888).—Joined the service, 28th Jan., 1914; dep. supt., Oct., 1921; supt., Sept., 1931.

BARUA, HARI PRASAD, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Assam) (b. 12th Apl., 1892).—Joined the service, 1st Nov., 1916; asst. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Sept., 1928; asst. ch. engr. and under secty. to Govt., P.W.D., Assam, Mar., 1934 to Nov., 1934.

BARVE, SADASHIV GOVIND, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Sind) (b. 27th April, 1914).—Educated at New English School, Budhwar Peth, Poona, Bombay University and St. John's College, Cambridge; joined the service, 21st Sept., 1936; arrived in India, Nov., 1936, and served in Sind as asst. collr.

BASAK, KANTI CHANDRA, B.Sc. (Cal.), B.A. (Cantab.), Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 17th Sept., 1901).—Educ. at Univ. of Calcutta and Downing Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1926; arrived, Nov., 1926; and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. under-secty. to govt. fin., &c., depts., Bengal, Nov., 1930; confid., Feb., 1931; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1932, and again Feb., 1935; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1932; offg. dist. and sess. judge, May, 1933; offg. asst. commr. of income tax, Oct., 1935.

BASANT LAL, LALA, late Income tax dept., Punjab (b. 15th Feb., 1880).—Joined the service, 2nd Apl., 1900, and held non-gazetted appts. to 3rd Dec., 1919; extra asst. commr., Feb., 1921; asst. commr. of inc. tax, Nov., 1926; retd., Feb., 1936.

BASHEER, AHMAD MUHAMMAD (see Ahmad M. B.).

BASHI RAM, SAHGAL, M.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 10th Jan., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1912; exec. engr., Oct., 1921; under-secty. to govt. P.W.D., Punjab, Mar., 1931; offg. suptg. engr., Mar., 1935.

BASHIR-UD-DIN, SAIVID, Barr., Judicial dept., Bihar (b. 11th Dec., 1885).—Apptd. dist. and sess. judge, 1st June, 1930.

BASKERVILLE, HENRY DAVENPORT, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bombay) (b. 30th Nov., 1886).—Educ. at Eltham Coll., Kent, and Worcester Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived, 20th Jan., 1912, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag. and asst. pol. agent; under sec. to govt., judl., &c., depts., 1918; passport officer in addition from Dec., 1919; offg. collr., dist. mag. and pol. agent, May, 1923; collr., May, 1930; retd., Apl., 1933.

BASSETT, THOMAS RALPH, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 25th July, 1894).—Joined the service 31st May, 1920; asst. supt., April, 1923; King's police medal, Jan., 1924; supt., June, 1925; asst. insp.-genl., rly. police, Oct., 1936.

BASTIN, REGINALD WALTER, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 2nd April, 1910).—Educated at Trowbridge High School, University College and School of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, December, 1932, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

BASU, ADYA NATH, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (sup'tg. engr., Bengal) (b. 3rd Oct., 1886).—Joined the service, 11th Jan., 1911; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1912; exec. engr., Jan., 1921; offg. sup'tg. engr., Feb., 1930; confd., Nov., 1934.

BASU, ASWANI KUMAR, M.A., B.L., late Excise and Salt dept., Bengal (b. Mar., 1882).—Joined the service as proxy. sub. dep. collr., 14th Feb., 1907; confd. Jan., 1908; sup't. of excise and salt, April, 1915; offg. dep. commr., May, 1924, and again May, 1927; confd., Aug., 1929; offg. commr., Jan., 1932; retd., Mar., 1937.

BASU, BIMALA PRASANA, B.Sc., B.A., Indian Forest Service (asst. consvr., Orissa) (b. 1st July, 1898).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Bihar and Orissa, on 9th Nov., 1923.

BASU, BIRENDRA KUMAR, M.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 8th Aug., 1888).—Educ. at schools in India, Calcutta univ., and Emmanuel Coll., Camb; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived 20th Oct., 1913, and served as asst. mag. and collr. in Bengal; offg. dist. and sess. judge, May, 1919; confd., June, 1925.

BASU, JATINDRA KUMAR, B.L., late Indian Police Service (Assam) (b. 22nd Sept., 1876).—Joined the service, 26th March, 1906; sup't., May, 1923; retd., Sept., 1931.

BASU, JOTENDRA MOHAN, Rai Bahadur, Babu, B.A., LL.B., late United Provs. Civil Service (b. 25th July, 1874).—Joined the service, 5th July, 1899; sub-judge, April, 1913; dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1924; retd., Nov., 1929.

BASU, MRIGANKA MAULI, B.A., Indian C.S., (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 1st Mar., 1912).—Educated at the Scottish Church Collegiate School Calcutta, University of Calcutta, the School of Economics, London, and the School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 29th Oct., 1935; arrived in India, Nov., 1935, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Nov., 1936.

BASU, NABA KUMAR, B.Sc., A.M.I.M.E., Indian State Rlys. (transpn. (power) sup't., E.I. rly.) (b. 21st Sept., 1892).—Joined the service, 12th Feb., 1918, as asst. dist. loco. sup't.; asst. sup't. (junr.), E.I. rly., Oct., 1926; transpn. (power) sup't., E.I. rly., May, 1934.

BASU, PASHUPATI, M.A., B.L., late Bengal Civil Service (Judicial) (b. 5th Apr., 1877).—Joined the service, 20th Apr., 1902; munsf. May, 1904; sub-judge, Aug., 1922; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Sylhet and Cachar, Jan., 1928; confd., Jan., 1929; retd., Apr., 1932.

BASU, PRABODH CHANDRA, Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 28th Jan., 1883).—Apptd. exec. engr., Bengal, 1st Jan., 1931.

BASU, SATISH CHANDRA, M.A., B.L., late Bengal Judicial dept. (b. 4th Nov., 1875).—Joined the service, 24th April, 1902 munsf. Jan., 1905; sub-judge, July, 1923; small cause ct. judge, Nov., 1929; retd., Nov., 1930.

BASU, SUBODH KUMAR, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras), (b. 7th April, 1900).—Joined the service on 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927.

BASU, SUKUMAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (secty. imp. cl. of agric. research) (b. 30th Oct., 1900).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Jesus Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 23rd Oct., 1925; arrived, 21st Dec., 1925, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, April, 1931; offg. mag. and collr., Sept., 1933; offg. dep. secty. to govt., Bengal, fin., comm. and marine dept., Oct., 1934; ditto, pol. and appt. depts., Mar., 1935; confd., Aug., 1935; dep. secty., Home dept., Apr., 1937; secty., imp. cl. of agric. research, July, 1938.

BASU, SURESH CHANDRA, RAI BAHADUR, late Bengal Civil Service (b. June, 1883).—Joined the service, 13th June, 1904; dep. magte., Apr., 1905; magte. and collr., Jan., 1932; retd., Nov., 1937.

BATALIA RAM, India Posts and Tels. (divl. engr., tels.) (b. 20th Nov., 1887).—Joined the service as apprentice asst. sup't., 19th Sept., 1910; asst. sup't., Feb., 1913; asst. divl. engr., Aug., 1920 divl. engr., Oct., 1926.

BATES, HARRY STUART, B.A., Indian Civil Service (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 16th March, 1893).—Educated at St. Catherine's Coll., Cambridge; arrived 11th May, 1920, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. commr., April, 1921, to Nov., 1923; city magistrate, July, 1925; offg. mag. and collr., April, 1926; confd., Apr., 1932; dept. sec. to govt., U.P. rev. dept. (temp.), Oct., 1933. spec. manager, Court of Wards, Balrampur estate, Jan., 1935.

BATHEJA, HASSANAND RADHAKRISHNA, M.A., Indian Educl. Service (prof'r., Patna Coll.) (b. 11th July, 1891).—Joined the service, 6th Nov., 1918; prof'r. of economics, Ravenshaw coll., Cuttack, Jan., 1925; ditto, Patna coll., Oct., 1927; member, tariff bd., Jan., 1933; offg. dep. dir. of public instrn., Bihar and Orissa, May, 1933; member, tariff bd., Oct., 1934; offg. princpl., Ravenshaw Coll., Cuttack, Sept., 1935; offg. dep. dir. of public instrn., Bihar, Mar., 1936.

BATHGATE, KEITH, Indian State Rlys. (transpn. traffic commcl. sup't.) (b. 1st Mar., 1900).—Joined the service, Jan., 1921; asst. sup't. scale, May, 1923; senr. scale (provl.), Mar., 1938.

BATRA, GIRIDHARI LAL, M.B., D.P.H., Dept. of Public Health, Bengal (b. 16th Mar., 1882).—Apptd. asst. dir. of public health, Mar., 1921; awarded K-i-H. medal, cl. II, Jan., 1936.

BATRA, HARGOBIND LAL, M.C., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (civil surg., Assam) (b. 14th June, 1885).—First commn. dated 30th July, 1910; in mil. employ to 13th Nov., 1921; civil surg., May, 1925.

BATRA, KANSHI RAM, M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (civil surg., Punjab) (b. 10th Aug., 1890).—First commn. dated 16th July, 1915; civil surg., Jan., 1927.

BATRA, RAM KANWAR, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Central Provs.) (b. 8th Aug., 1893).—Joined the service, 14th Oct., 1922; apptd. to Punjab Engrg. Service, 14th Oct., 1923; asst. exec. engr., Central Provs., June, 1924; offg. exec. engr., Apl., 1929, and again, Jan., 1933; confd., June, 1933.

BATTEN, HENRY HALLET, Lt.-Col., I.A., ret'd., late Burma Commn.—Served in mil. dept., 8th May, 1901, to Nov., 1905; employed with mil. police, Nov., 1905, to May, 1908; asst. commr., May, 1908; on mil. service, Dec., 1914, to Aug., 1919; dep. commr. (prov. sub.), Feb., 1924; confd., Oct., 1925; offg. commr., May, 1929; confd., May, 1936; ret'd., Oct., 1936.

BATTEN, Sir JOHN KAYE, Kt., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Haileybury Coll., and at Oriel Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1884; arrived, 29th Nov., 1887, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; special asst., Malabar, Nov., 1893; head asst., Jan., 1895; dep. commr., Berar, April, 1899; civil and sess. judge, Feb., 1900; addl. judl. commr., Central Prov., Sept., 1905; 1st addl. judl. commr., ditto, Dec., 1906; judl. commr. Dec., 1921; Kt. Jan., 1924; ret'd., Sept., 1923.

BATTEN, KENNETH CHARLES, Office of High Commr. for India (hr. exec. officer, genl. dept.) (b. 5th Aug., 1890).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, 9th March, 1914; on mil. service from Jan., 1917 to Jan., 1919; transfld. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. officer, April, 1922; higher clerical officer (temp.), May, 1926; hr. exec. officer, Oct., 1938.

BATTERSBY, ERIC WORSLEY, Indian Police (b. 18th Apl., 1916).—Apptd. asst. supt., Burma, on probn., 6th Dec., 1935.

BATTYE, RICHMOND KEITH MOLESWORTH, Capt. I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 30th Aug., 1905).—First commn., 3rd Sept., 1925; in military employ until 28th Jan., 1931; asst. pol. agent, Sibi, June, 1932; under sect. to A.G.G., Balu, Feb., 1933; asst. pol. agent, Loralai, May, 1933; ditto, Quetta-Pishin, May, 1934; Brit. trade agent, Gyantse, June, 1935; offg. pol. officer in Sikkim in addn., Nov., 1935; under secty. to A.G.G., Punjab States, Aug., 1936; asst. pol. agent, Gilgit, Oct., 1937.

BATTYE, WALTER ROTHNEY, D.S.O., M.B., B.Sc., F.R.C.S., Lt.-Col. I.M.S. (ret'd.).—First commission, 27th July, 1898; offg. agency surgeon, Gwalior, Aug., 1903; agency surgeon and vice-consul, Meshed, Nov., 1904; residency surgeon, Mewar, May, 1910; on mil. duty, Nov., 1914, to Dec., 1916; administrative medical officer, Central India, Jan., 1921; residency surgeon, Indore, in addition from Feb., 1922; ret'd., Jan., 1929.

BAUM, ERNEST FREDERICK, B.A., Indian C.S. (commr., Burma) (b. 4th Oct., 1881).—Educ. at Manchester Gr. Sch., and Keble Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1904; arrived, 9th Dec., 1905, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; dep. commr., Dec., 1917; on mil. duty, May, 1918, to July, 1918; offg. commr., May, 1924; confd., Mar., 1932.

BAVDEKAR, RAJARAM SHRIPAD, B.A. (Cantab.), Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bombay) (b. 16th Sept., 1898).—Educ. at Bombay and Cambridge (Sidney Sussex); joined

the service, 2nd Nov., 1922; arrived 9th Force 1923, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1931; and again, Sept., 1932; confd., Oct., 1933; regr., high ct., Bombay, appellate side, June, 1934, to June, 1937.

BAVIN, LANCELOT NEVILLE, late Indian Police (b. 12th May, 1892).—Joined the service as proxy. asst. supt. on 4th Dec., 1911; confd., Apl., 1912; supt., May, 1925; ret'd., Apl., 1937.

BAW, MAUNG SHWE, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr. Burma) (b. 28th April, 1904).—Educ. at University of Rangoon and Wadham Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Burma as asst. commr.

BAWA KARTAR SINGH, M.A., D.Sc., F.I.C., Indian Educl. Service (prof. of chemistry, science coll., Patna) (b. 17th Apl., 1886).—Joined the service, 19th July, 1911; prof., Cuttack, Nov., 1921; offg. prof., science coll., Patna, Jan., 1936; confd., Aug., 1936.

BAWA RAMNICK SINGH, Diwan Bahadur, M.I.S.E., late Indian State Railways (b. 18th Mar., 1880).—Trained at the R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service as asst. engr., state rys., 1st Oct., 1902; exec. engr., Oct., 1909; Rai Bahadur, Jan., 1915; dep. chief engr., Feb., 1927; offg. ch. engr., April, 1929; confd., June, 1930; offg. agent, Mar., 1932; confd., June, 1934; ret'd., Mar., 1935.

BAXTER, ERIC GORDON, late Indian Forest Engrg. Service (b. 8th May, 1884).—Joined the service as forest engr., Bihar and Orissa, 24th Nov., 1921; ret'd., Mar., 1933.

BAXTER, GEORGE HERBERT, M.A., India Office (actg. asst. secty., finl. dept.) (b. 30th Nov., 1894).—Educ. at Manchester Gr. Sch. and New Coll., Oxford; war service; Roy. Fus., Sept., 1914, to Jan., 1915; R.G.A., Jan., 1915, to Armistice; apptd. jun. clerk, mil. dept., July, 1920; transfld. to fin. dept., Jan., 1921; asst. principal, April, 1921; deputed on special mission to Baghdad, Oct. to Dec., 1921; actg. pte. sec. to permit, under sec. of state, Jan., 1924; appt. as pte. sec. confd., April, 1924; principal, Nov., 1924; sec., Royal Commn. on Indian Currency and Finance, Aug., 1925, to July, 1926; adviser to British delegation, Indian round table conf., London, 2nd session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; actg. asst. secty., finl. dept., Jan.-Apl., 1932; and again, Dec., 1933; secty., cte. on Indian Reserve Bank legislation, July-Aug., 1933.

BAXTER, GERALD DORRETT, A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Central Provs.) (b. 16th Nov., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 7th April, 1920; asst. exec. engr., March, 1921; exec. engr., Oct., 1927.

BAXTER, NORMAN BERNARD, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 12th June, 1883).—Trained at the R.I.E. College; joined, Oct., 1905, as asst. engr.; exec. engr., Oct., 1913; offg. suptg. engr., March, 1928, again Feb., 1930; ditto (prov. permit.), Nov., 1932; confd., Nov., 1934; offg. ch. engr., Bombay, Apl., 1934; confd., Feb., 1938, ch. engr. and secty., p.w.d., Feb. to June, 1938; ret'd. June, 1938.

BAYLEY, ARCHIBALD STUART BUTTERWORTH, late Indian Audit and Accounts Service (b. 8th July, 1885).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1907; asst. acct.-genl., P.W. accts., July, 1910; ditto, Bombay, Oct., 1921; currency offr., Karachi, July, 1923; dep. acct.-genl., Bombay, Jan., 1925; asst. acct.-genl., ditto, Nov., 1925; divl. audit offr., N.W. Rly., Oct., 1927; dep. auditor E.B. Rly., Feb., 1928; auditor, workshop, Kanchrapara, March, 1928; govt. examr., M. & S.M. and S.I. Rlys., Apl., 1929; dep. govt. examr. of accts., S.I. Rly., Apl., 1930; ret'd., Sept. 1934.

BAYLEY VERNON THOMAS, Indian Police (asst. supt., N.W.F.P.).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 20th Nov., 1928; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1933; asst. dir., intell. bureau, Home Dept., Mar., 1937.

BAYLEY, VICTOR, C.I.E., C.B.E., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State Railways (N. W. Rly.) (b. 30th May, 1880).—Joined the service, 15th Sept., 1905; asst. engr., Sept., 1908; exec. engr., Oct., 1914; asst. sec. rly. bd., Jan., 1914; C.I.E., Jan., 1917; on mil. service in Mesopotamia from Jan., 1918; offg. supt. of works, Khyber Rly. construction, March, 1924; C.B.E., June, 1926; contr. of stores, N.W. Rly., April, 1927; ret'd., May, 1931.

BAYLIS, HERBERT THEOPHILUS, late Indian State Railways (E.B. Rly.) (b. 20th Mar., 1876).—Joined the service, 10th March, 1893; asst. traffic supt., Oct., 1907; dist. traffic supt., April, 1914; dep. traffic manager (provl.), Dec., 1927; ret'd., Mar., 1931.

BAYLIS, ROBERT FRANCIS SARJEANT, Indian C.S. (jt. mag. United Provs.) (b. 11th June, 1903).—Educ. at Christ's Hospital and Lincoln Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 20th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., July, 1929; offg. sess. and sub-judge, Oct., 1932; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1934.

BAYNES, FREDERIC WILLIAM WILBERFORCE, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 4th Aug., 1889).—Educ. at Harrow and Caius Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after the exam. of 1912; arrd., 22nd Nov., 1913, and served in the United Prov. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Nov., 1917; asst. supt., Dehra Dun, Nov., 1920; offg. mag. and collr., Nov., 1923; confd., Nov., 1929; dep. commr., Mar., 1930.

BAZALGETTE, JOHN EVELYN ARNOLD, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 24th Jan., 1907).—First commn., 30th Aug., 1926; in military employ prior to 11th Oct., 1932; under training in Punjab, Oct., 1932; P.A. to Resident at Hyderabad, Jan., 1933; under secty. to the A.G.G., Punjab States, Aug., 1934; under secty. to the Pol. Resdt., Persian Gulf, June, 1935; H.M.'s Consul, Kerman, Nov., 1935; vice-consul, Khorramshahr, Apl., 1936.

BAZALGETTE, REGINALD LOUIS, Major I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 8th July, 1900).—First commn., dated 15th April, 1919; in milty. employ prior to 17th April, 1926; asst. mag. and collr., Meerut, April, 1926; and asst. to resdt., Kashmir, June, 1926; asst. mag., Moradabad, Nov., 1926; under sec. to pol. resdt. in Persian Gulf, April, 1927; under sec. to agent

to govt. genl. in W.I. States, Apl., 1929; ditto and addl. dist. mag., Rajkot, Oct., 1929; pol. agent, Eastern Kathiawar agency, Aug., 1931; under secty. to A.G.G. in Western India, Nov., 1931; offg. under-secty., for. and pol. dept., Oct., 1932; secty. to A.G.G. and ch. commr. in Baluchistan, Mar., 1933; asst. pol. agent and asst. commr., Quetta-Pishin, Oct., 1933; asst. to pol. agent in Kalat, Apl., 1934; H.M.'s consul for Kerman and offg. vice-consul, Bandar, Abbas, Nov., 1935; secty. to A.G.G., Deccan States, Aug., 1936; pol. agt., Orissa States, Sambalpur, May, 1938.

BEADNELL, CHRISTOPHER BEADNELL, I.S.O., late Excise Dept., Madras (b. 20th Jan., 1880).—Apptd. asst. commr., June, 1916; offg. dep. commr., May, 1930; I.S.O., June, 1932; ret'd., Jan., 1935.

BEADON, CORNWALLIS WILLIAM ROGER, Indian Police (b. 11th Oct., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, on 14th Nov., 1922; offg. dist. supt., Mar., 1932.

BEADON, ERIC HAMMET FAIRFAX, Indian Police (b. 19th Mar., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, 10th Dec., 1926.

BEADON, VERNON, Lt.-Col., M.C., I.A., Burma commn. (dep. commr.) (b. 14th Apl., 1884).—Served in mil. dept., Aug., 1903, to Jan., 1910; asst. commr., Feb., 1910; on mil. service, Dec., 1914, to Oct. 1919; offg. dep. commr., May, 1920; dep. commr. (provl.), Nov., 1925; confd., July, 1927; offg. commr., Aug., 1933.

BEAL, HASTINGS EVELYN, late Indian C.S. (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 19th Sept., 1883).—Educ. at Charterhouse and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1906; arrived 28th Nov., 1907, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transf. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Nov., 1913; temply. serving under govt. of India, army dept., from Sept., 1916, to March, 1919; dep. commr., May, 1922; mag. and collr., Sept., 1924; ret'd., Nov., 1929.

BEAMAN, GERALD WILLIAM DEVENISH, Indian State Rlys. (dist. traffic supt., Burma Rlys.) (b. 18th Nov., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., 24th Mar., 1909; dist. traffic supt., Sept., 1924; asst. traffic supt., Mar., 1928; dist. traffic supt. (temp.), Sept., 1928; offg. dep. traffic manager (transptn.), Burma rlys., Nov., 1933.

BEAMAN, VALENTINE ARDEN HULME, M.B.E., Burma Excise Service (chief supt.) (b. 14th Feb., 1884).—Previous service from May, 1911; asst. supt. excise, June, 1912; supt., Sept., 1913; chief supt., May, 1933.

BEAN, BASIL CLARENCE LAHEY, O.B.E., B.A., Indian State Rlys. (divl. supt., N.W. Rly.) (b. 4th Sept., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., 5th Nov., 1909; dist. ditto, Oct., 1918; divl. trans. traffic officer, Oct., 1924; offg. divl. supt., Apl., 1930; confd., Dec., 1932; O.B.E., Nov., 1935.

BEAN, SALVADOR MICHAEL LAHEY, late Indian Audit and Accounts Service (b. 14th Oct., 1882).—Joined the service, 1st June, 1907; asst. acct.-genl., P.W.D., July, 1910; dep. acct.-genl., U.P., March, 1919; ditto, Bombay, Sept., 1921; audit offr., Bombay dev. scheme, March, 1922; audit and accounts offr., ditto, Oct., 1923; finl. advr., P.W.D.

Punjab, Apl., 1929 (tempy.) ; offg. audit officer, Lloyd barrage and canals constrn., Mar., 1930 ; ch. auditor, E.B. Rly. and Burma Rlys., Nov., 1931 ; ditto, N.W. rly., Apl., 1932 ; retd., July, 1935.

BEASLEY, SIR HORACE OWEN COMPTON, Kr., B.A. (Cantab.), Barr., late Madras Judicial Dept. (b. 2nd July, 1877).—Apptd. judge, high ct., Rangoon, 21st Mar., 1923 ; judge, high ct., Madras, Aug., 1924 ; chief justice, ditto, June, 1929 ; Kt., June, 1930 ; retd., July, 1937.

BEATSON, ERNEST BRUCE, V.D., late Indian State Railways (b. 17th Aug., 1874).—Trained at the R.I.E. Coll. ; joined the service, 1st March, 1901, as asst. engr., state rlys. ; exec. engr., March, 1908 ; asst. manager, N.W. Rly., Sept., 1908 ; asst. agent, ditto, Jan. to July, 1913 ; offg. suptg. engr., June, 1918 ; confd., April, 1924 ; offg. senr. govt. inspr. of rlys., Oct., 1925 ; retd., Aug., 1929.

BEATTY, HENRY, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 3rd June, 1891).—Educ. at Trinity Coll., Dublin ; apptd. after exam. of 1914 ; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1915, and served in the United Prov. as asst. commr. ; apptd. to the I.A.R.O., Oct., 1917 ; reverted from mil. duty, Jan., 1919 ; jt. mag., June, 1922 ; offg. dist. and sess. judge, March, 1923 ; sess. and sub. judge, Sept., 1927 ; retd., June, 1929.

BEAUMONT, HERBERT CHRISTOPHER, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commn., Punjab) (b. 2nd June, 1912).—Educated at Uppington and Worcester College, Oxford ; appointed after exam. of 1935 ; arrived in India, Dec., 1936, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.

BEAUMONT, SIR JOHN WILLIAM FISHER Kr., K.C. (b. 4th Sept., 1877).—Apptd. chief justice, high ct., Bombay, June, 1930 Kt., Jan., 1931.

BEAZLEY, JOHN GODFREY, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (Punjab) (b. 9th Feb., 1885).—Educ. at Rugby and Trinity Coll., Oxford ; apptd. after exam. of 1907 ; arrived, 30th Nov., 1908, and served in the Punjab, as asst. commr. ; sec., Delhi Municipality, Feb., 1914 ; under-sec. to govt., Punjab, rev. dept., Oct., 1915 ; asst. settlt. offr., Nov., 1917 ; coln. offr., Lower Bari Doab Canal, Aug., 1918 ; addl. dep. sec. to govt. of India, commerce dept., Feb., 1920 ; offg. dir. of industries, Punjab, Oct., 1922 ; dep. commr. (provl.), Sept., 1923 ; sec. to govt. of Punjab, transf. depts., Oct., 1924 ; dep. commr. (perm.), Aug., 1925 ; secty. to govt., transferred depts., Jan., 1927 ; C.I.E., June, 1928 ; offg. ch. secty. to govt., Punjab, Nov., 1928 ; retd., Dec., 1931.

BECKETT, JAMES, Indian Police (supt., Madras) (b. 25th Mar., 1891).—Joined the service, 16th Dec., 1911 ; asst. supt., July, 1913 ; offg. supt., July, 1919 ; confd., Sept., 1926 ; asst. inspr.-genl., Mar., 1927 ; dep. commr., crime bch., Oct., 1932 ; awarded Indian Police medal, Jan., 1933.
