Customs Service, 18th Feb., 1924; asst. collr., Madras, Feb., 1926; secty., tariff bd., cotton textile industry enquiry, July, 1926; asst. collr., Bombay, Jan., 1928; and Aug., 1934; ditto, Rangoon, Mar., 1928; and again, Dec., 1932; ditto, Karachi, June, 1931; ditto, Bombay, Aug., 1934; offg. collr., Karachi, Oct., 1936.

KEELAN, Cyril John, Indian State Rys. (exec. engr., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 8th June, 1885).—Joined the service as temp. engr., 5th Nov., 1908; asst. engr., July, 1912; resdt. engr., July, 1916; divl. engr., June, 1926.

KEELAN, Douglas Hugh, V.D., late Indian State Railways (b. 27th Feb., 1879).—Joined the service, 17th June, 1901, as asst. traffic supt.; dist. traffic supt., April, 1910; dep. traffic manager, O. & K. Rly., Oct., 1918;

offg. chief operating supt., March, 1925; dep. ch. comml. manager, E.I. Rly., July, 1925; offg. ch. comml. manager, April, 1927; retd., June, 1934.

KEELAN, Esmond Harding, late Indian State Rys. (b. 28th Sept., 1882).—Joined the service as asst. loco. supt., 26th Oct., 1903; dist. carr. and wagon supt., Feb., 1916; offg. dep. ditto, Feb., 1925; divl. rolling stock officer and offg. dep. ch. operating supt., Oct., 1927; dep. ch. mechl. engr., Mar., 1932; retd., Oct., 1936.

KEELING, Sir Hugh Trowbridge, Kt., C.S.I., A.M.I.C.E., late Madras Public Works Dept.—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; apptd. asst. engr., Oct., 1887; exec. engr., Oct., 1888; suptg. engr. March, 1912; on deputn. as chief engr. and sec. to the chief commr. in the P.W.D., Delhi, Nov., 1912; member, Impl. Delhi Cttee., 1913; C.S.I., June, 1915; retd., April, 1920; re-employed as chief engr. for five years from 14th April, 1920; Kt., June, 1923.

KRENE, Hugh, Indian Police (asst. supt., Madras) (b. 22nd Nov., 1897).—Joined the service, 7th Oct., 1920; confd. asst. supt., July, 1922; offg. dist. supt., Apr., 1928; confd., Oct., 1930; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1924; asst. inspr.-genl., Nov., 1935.

KEILY Henry Gerald, V.D., late Indian State Rys. (G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 3rd Feb., 1874).—Joined the service as draughtsman, 21st Feb., 1896; asst. loco. supt., March, 1898; dist. ditto, July, 1901; dep. transportation supt., Nov., 1922; offg. ch. transportation supt., March, 1926; confd., June, 1927; retd., Feb., 1932.

KEITH, Robert Farquharson, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 22nd June, 1912).—Educ. at Fettes College, Gonville and Caius College, Cambridge, and the School of Oriental Studies, London; appointed after exam. of 1935; arrived in India, Jan., 1937, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

KEKRE, Balkrishna Bhaskar, B.A., late Income Tax Dept., Central Provs. (b. 5th Feb., 1878).—Held acting and permanent non-gazetted appts. from 1st Oct., 1901, to 1st Sept., 1902; extra asst. commr., Feb., 1909; asst. commr. of income tax, March, 1922; retd., Jan., 1932.

KELLAWAY, Herbert Frank, Office of High Commr. for India (higher clerical officer, store dept.) (b. 7th Feb., 1883).—Apptd. clerk, 2nd class, India store depot, 27th Dec., 1901; on milly. service, Oct., 1917, to Feb., 1919; transfed. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; higher clerical officer, April, 1922.

KELLY, Charles Spencer, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 15th June, 1907).—Educ. at King Edward's School, Stafford and Balliol College, Oxford; appointed after examination of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served as asst. commr. in Burma.

KELLY, James, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 31st Aug., 1880).—Apptd. asst. principl., Aitchison Coll., Lahore, 18th March, 1904; principl., ditto, Oct., 1917; retd., Aug., 1935.

KELLY, JOHN WILLIAM, C.I.E., B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (contr. of currency, Bombay) (b. 23th Sept., 1885).—Joined the service, 14th Oct., 1910; asst. acctnt.-gen., United Prov., May, 1912; ditto, Madras, Dec., 1913; asst. acctnt.-gen., United Prov., May, 1915; ditto, Central Prov., May, 1921; currency officer, Bombay, April, 1922; offg. dep. contr. of currency, Calcutta, Sept., 1925; ditto, Bombay, Oct., 1926; offg. contr. of the currency, Apl., 1931; June, 1932, and again, Feb., 1933; confd., Feb., 1935; C.I.E., June, 1934; dir., res. bank of India, Nov., 1935.

KELLY, PATRICK JOSEPH, M.B., Ch.B. (N.U.I.), L.M. (Dub.), Major, I.M.S. (D.M.O., Madras) (b. 7th Apl., 1902).—First commn., 7th Mar., 1927; in mil employ until 4th July, 1934; dist. med. officer, July, 1934.

KELLY, Sir PATRICK ALOYSIUS, Kt., C.I.E., late Indian Police (b. 14th July, 1880).—Joined the service, 22nd Nov., 1902, and posted to Bombay; supt. of police, Sept., 1912; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1921; commr. of police, Sept., 1922; C.I.E., Jan., 1926; Kt., Jan., 1930; bar to King's police medal, Jan., 1931; presy.-magte., Bombay, Jan., 1932; ret'd., Apl., 1935.

KELLY, PHILIP DESMOND LORNE, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 13th Sept., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 22nd Dec., 1919; offg. supt., July, 1924; confd., Apl., 1930.

KELLSALL, ROBERT, D.S.O., M.D., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.), late Burma Medl. Dept. (b. 18th Oct., 1875).—First commn. dated 31st Aug., 1903; in mil. employ to 3rd Mar., 1905; spl. plague officer, Rangoon, March, 1905; offg. civil surg., April, 1909; on mil. service from 3rd Dec., 1914, to 28th April, 1919; civil surg., May, 1919; offg. medl. supt., gen. hosp., Rangoon, Nov., 1919; confd., Feb., 1921; physician, gen. hosp., Rangoon, June, 1926; ret'd., Oct., 1930.

KEMM, ARCHIBALD HENRY, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 7th June, 1891).—Educ. at Radley Coll., and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, Dec., 1915, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr., and settlt. officer; apptd. to the I.A.R.O., August, 1916, to March, 1919; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1926; confd., Dec., 1927; addl. dep. secty. to govt. of Bengal, pol. dept., Feb., 1928; ret'd., July, 1933.

KEMP, ARTHUR HUGH, Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. coll., Bihar) (b. 28th Feb., 1905).—Educ. at Portsmouth Grammar Sch., and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. coll. and mag.; jt. mag., Nov., 1928; offg. mag. and collr., Mar., 1935.

KEMP, CYRIL KENNETH, India Police (supt.) (b. 2nd April, 1903).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 2nd Dec., 1922; awarded King's medal, Jan., 1932; offg. supt., Nov., 1933; confd., Mar., 1934.

KEMPE, Sir KENNETH MCINTYRE (legal advr. and solr. to the sec. of state) (b. 13th Dec., 1883).—Joined the service as profrr., govt. law school, 1st June, 1919; editor, Indian law reports, June, 1921; offg. judge, high ct., Bombay, June, 1928; ret'd., May, 1931; apptd. advocate genl., Bombay, Feb., 1935; knighted, May, 1937; ret'd., Dec., 1937; apptd. legal advr. and solr. to the sec. of state, Dec., 1938.

KENNAWAY, FREDERICK WALTER, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 13th Sept., 1874).—Educ. at Dulwich and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1897; arrived, 27th Dec., 1898, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under sec. to govt., April, 1902; junr. sec. to finl. commr., May, 1902, to March, 1906; asst. settlmt. offr., Aug., 1906; dep. commr., Nov., 1913; dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1915; rev. and public wks. minister, Bahawalpur State, Feb., 1924; offg. commr., Feb., 1928; temp. member of exec. council, Punjab, Aug., 1928; ret'd., July, 1929.

KENNEDY, ALWYNE JOSEPH, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 13th Sept., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 27th Nov., 1920; offg. supt., May, 1924; confd., April, 1929.

KENNEDY, ROBERT STEWART, India Office (suptg. exec. officer, acctnt.-gen.'s dept.) (b. 20th Dec., 1879).—Educ. at George Watson's Coll., Edinburgh, and Madras Coll., St. Andrews; apptd. 2nd class clerk, registry and record dept., 10th Feb., 1904; transfld. to finl. dept., April, 1905; temp. asst. to resdt. clerks, Aug., 1914; temp. addl. resdt. clerk, Oct., 1914, to Sept., 1915; on mil. service, Sept., 1915, to Oct., 1919; transfld. to Indo-European Tel. Dept., 1920; transfld. to acctnt.-gen.'s dept., Feb., 1922; higher exec. officer, April, 1922; also assessor of income tax; suptg. exec. officer, Jan. 1928.

KENNEDY, WILLIAM GEORGE, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 29th Jan., 1909).—Educ. at Caldway Grange Grammar School, West Kirby, Cheshire, and Jesus College, Cambridge; apptd. after examination of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1936.

KENNEDY-MINARDS, W. I., B.Sc., A.M.I. Chem.E., Major, late His Majesty's Mint, Bombay (b. 20th Oct., 1887).—Apptd. dep. assay master (on probn.), Jan., 1920; confd., July, 1920; offg. assay master, Jan., 1922; confd., April, 1922; ret'd., Feb., 1934.

KENNY, DICK EDWARD COURTENAY, Lt.-Col., I.A., late Burma Commn. (b. 20th Nov., 1885).—Arrived in India, 5th Nov., 1905; Lt. 98th infy., Aug., 1913; asst. commtmt., Southern Shan States, Sept., 1913; reverted to mil. duty from May, 1917, to March, 1919; apptd. to Burma commn., 6th Feb., 1922, as asst. commr.; sub. divnl. officer and asst. supt. in addn., June, 1923; offg. dep. commr., Sept., 1926; confd., Oct., 1930; dep. commr., &c., Port Blair, Dec., 1927; offg. ch. commr., ditto, Aug., 1931; ret'd., Jan., 1937.

KENNY, PATRICK ARTHUR THEODORE, O.B.E., F.S.I., late Survey of India (b. 18th Apl., 1878).—Joined the service as sub-assst. supt., 21st Nov., 1898; extra asst. supt., Dec., 1906; O.B.E., Sept., 1921; in charge No. 5 Party, and asst. dir. of surveys, C.P., March, 1927; ret'd., Sept., 1932.

KEOUGH, JOHN EVERARD, late Punjab Civil Service (b. 19th July, 1878).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 24th Dec., 1900; extra asst. commr., Oct., 1911; offg. dep. commr., Sept., 1924; confd., Nov., 1931; ret'd., July, 1933.

KER, CHARLES MURRAY, Indian C.S. (under secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of lab.) (b. 2nd Sept., 1906).—Educ. at Rugby and Hertford College, Oxford; joined the service, 17th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; secty., spl. tariff bd., Oct., 1935; under secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of indus. and lab., Nov., 1936; under-secty. dept. of lab., Nov., 1937.

KER, JAMES CAMPBELL, M.P., C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A., late Indian C.S. (Bombay) (b. 2nd Jan., 1878).—Educ. at Irvine Acad., Glasgow Univ., and Caius Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1901; arrived, 28th Nov., 1902, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag., and in Sind as asst. collr.; serving under govt. of India, home dept., as personal asst. to dir., criminal intelligence, Aug., 1907, to Dec., 1913; on mil. duty from Oct., 1914, to Feb., 1917; on spl. duty in office of dir. of criminal intell., Simla, Feb. to Nov., 1917; offg. dep. sec. to govt., pol., judl. and spl. depts., Bombay, Dec., 1917; offg. collr. and dist. mag. and pol. agent, Caubay, April, 1918; offg. sec. to govt. genl., etc., depts., March, 1920; confirmed, June, 1920; collr., Jan., 1923; C.I.E., Jan., 1924; pte. sec. to H.E. the govr. of Bombay, April, 1924; C.S.I., June, 1928; retd., May, 1930; M.P. for Western division of Stirling and Clackmannan, Oct., 1931.

KER, NALINI BEHARI, Office of High Commr. for India (educul. officer, exec. grade, educn. dept.) (b. 4th Jan., 1891).—Apptd. educul. officer, 15th July, 1929.

KER, STANLEY DARLING, Indian State Railways (exec. engr., N.W. rly.) (b. 31st Mar., 1888).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1910; exec. engr., N.W. rly., Mar., 1931.

KERMODE, CHARLES WILLIAM DALY, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 19th Sep., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 27th Dec., 1924; dep. consvr., Nov., 1928; Sylviculturist Apl., 1935.

KERR, PERCIVAL JAMES, M.R.C.V.S., Indian Veterinary Service (dir., civil vety. dept., Bengal) (b. 2nd Feb., 1885).—Joined the service, 22nd Jan., 1911; supt., Oct., 1912; in mil. employ from July, 1915 to Mar., 1920; offg. dir., C.V.D., Bengal, Oct. 1924; confd., July, 1927.

KERR, WALTER JOULE, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 1st Dec., 1880).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1905; arrived 19th Nov., 1905, and served as asst. engr.; under-sec. to govt. of Bengal, public works dept., June, 1910; exec. engr., Oct., 1913; offg. suptg. engr., Oct., 1921; confd., Oct., 1926; offg. ch. engr., April, 1931; confd., Aug., 1933; retd., Dec., 1935.

KERSHAW, HENRY OWEN, B.Sc., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 16th Mar., 1881).—Joined the service 8th Feb., 1909, and apptd. actg. vice-prl. teachers' coll., Saidapet; inspr. of schs., Madras, March, 1909; retd., June, 1932.

KERSHAW, LIONEL EDWARD, late Income tax dept., Madras (b. 2nd Aug., 1876).—Apptd. to income tax dept., central board of revenue, 12th Aug., 1918; asst. commr., central range, Madras, March, 1925; retd., Aug., 1931.

KERSHAW, Sir Louis James, K.C.S.I., C.I.E., late Indian C.S., and India Office (b. 20th Dec., 1869).—Educ. at Belfast Methodist Coll. and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1888; arrived 31st Oct., 1890, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transf. to Assam as asst. commr. and collr., 1892; dep. commr., April, 1898; sec. to govt., judl. and genl. dept., E. Bengal and Assam, Oct., 1905; ditto, fin. and municipl. dept., Feb., 1906; mag. and collr., Feb., 1907; C.I.E., Dec., 1911; transf. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; sec. to govt., finl. and munpl. depts., April, 1912; offg. sec. to govt. of India, dept. of rev. and agric., March, 1914; confirmed, June, 1914; retd. from Indian C.S., Nov., 1915; apptd. sec., rev. and stat. dept., India Office, Nov., 1915; C.S.I., Jan., 1918; on special duty at Peace Conference, Paris, 1918; delegate at 1st and 2nd internl. labour conferences at Washington, 1919, and Genoa, 1920; delegate at internl. conference on communications and transit, Barcelona, 1920; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1921; sec. industries and overseas dept., May, 1921; on depn. to India, Oct., 1921, to March, 1922; delegate at 4th, 5th, 6th and 7th internl. labour conferences, Geneva, 1922, 1923, 1924 and 1925; representative of India on gov. body internl. labour office, 1923; asst. under sec. of state, Jan., 1924; member, Indian Federal Finance Expert comee., Jan.-Apl., 1932; member, Ind. staty. rly. bd. ctee., June, 1933; ditto, Ind. res. bank ctee., July, 1933; dep. under-sec. of state, Dec., 1933; retd., Dec., 1934.

KESAVANUNNI NAYAR, M.B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 25th June, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927.

KESHAVA RAO, NEELAMANGALA, B.A., B.E. (C.E.), Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Madras) (b. 29th Mar., 1889).—Joined the service as appr. engr., 4th July, 1913; asst. engr., July, 1914; exec. engr., July, 1923.

KESHO DAT JOSHI, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., United Provs.) (b. 29th Nov., 1890).—Joined the service as proby. extra asst. consvr., July, 1915; confd., Apl., 1917; promoted to I.F.S., 15th Apl., 1931; dep. consvr., Apl., 1931.

KESWANI, GOPALDAS HASSANAND, M.B.E., DIWAN BAHADUR, L.C.E., late Indian Service of Engineers (exec. engr.) (b. 7th Mar., 1883).—Held non-gazetted appts. from Feb., 1905; asst. engr., Feb., 1921; I.S.E. as asst. exec. engr., 1st Jan., 1932; offg. exec. engr., Sind, Jan., 1932; confd., Jan., 1937; M.B.E., Jan., 1938; retd., July, 1938.

KEWALRAMANI, RAMCHAND MALHANDAS, late India Posts and Tels. (b. 3rd Oct., 1883).—Joined the service as apprentice asst. supt., 24th Sept., 1907; asst. divl. engr., Aug., 1920; divl. engr., Feb., 1926; offg. dir. tel. engr., Nov., 1932; and again, Sept., 1933; confd., June, 1935; retd., Sept., 1938.

KEYES, Sir Terence Humphrey, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., C.M.G., Brig.-Gen., I.A., retd., late Pol. Dept., Govt. of India (b. 28th May, 1877).—First commn. dated 20th Jan., 1897; in mil. emp. to 24th Jan., 1903, when he was apptd.

probationer, pol. dept., govt. of India; asst. commr., Punjab, Feb., 1903; pol. asst., Seistan, Nov., 1903, and asst. to H.B.M.'s vice-consul, Seistan and K'in; H.B.M.'s consul, Turbat-i-Haidari, April, 1906; pol. asst. and asst. to agent to govr.-gen. in Baluchistan, Nov., 1908; asst. pol. agent in Baluchistan, Nov., 1909; ditto and asst. pol. agent, Quetta-Pishin, April, 1911; asst. pol. agent, Mekran, and commdt., Mekran Levy Corps, Feb., 1912; pte. sec. to lieut.-govr., Punjab, June, 1912; under-sec. to govt. of India, for. dept., Oct., 1912; asst. pol. agent, Mekran, and commdt., Mekran Levy Corps, Dec., 1912; pol. agent, Bahrein, May, 1914; on spl. duty, Mekran Border, March, 1916, to April, 1917; C.I.E., June, 1917; on special duty under War Office, June, 1917, to Nov., 1919, and under Foreign Office, Nov., 1919, to June, 1920; C.M.G., Nov., 1919; asst. pol. agent, Sibi, Jan., 1921; pol. agent, Kalat, Nov., 1922; rev. and jndl. commr., Baluchistan, July, 1927; C.S.I., Jan., 1928; offg. British envoy at court of Nepal, March, 1928; offg. resdt., Gwalior, Oct., 1928; offg. agent to govr. genl., W.I. States, Apl., 1929; offg.-resdt., Hyderabad, Feb., 1930; confd., Aug., 1930; ret'd., Oct., 1933; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1933.

KHAIRAZ, GULAM HUSSAIN RAHIMTULLA, Barr., Bombay Judicial Dept. (presy. mag.) (b. 24th Dec., 1882).—Joined the dept., 1st April, 1913; 4th presy. mag., April, 1913; 3rd ditto, Feb., 1924; 2nd ditto, March, 1925.

KHALEELI, ABBAS, Indian C.S. (under secty. to govt., dev. dept., Madras) (b. 14th Sept., 1908).—Educ. at Brasenose College, Oxford; joined the service, 13th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931; and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., Feb., 1935; under secty., dev. dept., Madras, May, 1936.

KHALIK, MUHAMMAD ABDUL (see Muhammad A. K.).

KHAMBATA, RATANSHAW BOMANJI, M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., D.P.H., Public Health Dept., Bengal (dir. of public health) (b. 23rd Aug., 1879).—Joined the service, 18th Jan., 1913; asst. dir. of public health, Bengal, April, 1921; dir. of public health laboratory, Jan., 1927; offg. dir. of public health, Bengal, June, 1929; confd., Feb., 1931.

KHAN, ABBAS ALI (see Abbas Ali Khan).

KHAN, ABDUL ALI (see Abdul Ali Khan).

KHAN, ABDUL GHAFOOR (see Abdul Ghafoor Khan).

KHAN, ABU ABDULLAH MUHAMMAD ZAKA-ULLAH (see Abu Abdullah M.Z.K.).

KHAN, ABDUL HAMID (see Abdul Hamid Khan).

KHAN, A.K. (see Abdul Kaiym Khan).

KHAN, ABDUL MAJID (see Abdul Majid Khan).

KHAN, ABDUL RASHEED (see Rasheed Khan, Abdul).

KHAN, A. S. (see Abdus Samad Khan).

KHAN, AITIZAZ-UD-DIN AHMAD (see Aitizaz-ud-Din Ahmad Khan).

KHAN, AKHTER HAMID (see Akhter Hamid Khan).

KHAN, ALLAH YAR (see Allah Yar Khan).

KHAN, AURELIUS DAVID, B.A. (Cantab.), Indian Civil Service (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 21st March, 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of Calcutta, and Selwyn Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 21st Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. addl. dist. and sess. judge, Mar., and again, Oct., 1933.

KHAN, DILAWAR HUSAIN (see Dilawar Husain Khan).

KHAN, FAZL MUHAMMAD (see Fazl, M. K.).

KHAN, GHAZANFUR, A. (see Ghazanfur Ali Khan).

KHAN, GHULAM AHMAD (see Ghulam, A. K.).

KHAN, INAYAT ULLAH (see Inayat Ullah Khan).

KHAN, ISLAM AHMAD (see Islam Ahmad Khan).

KHAN, K. B. ABDUL RASHID (see Abdul, R. K.).

KHAN, KHURSHED AHMAD (see Khurshed Ahmad Khan).

KHAN, KURBAN ALI (see Kurban A. K.).

KHAN, MAQSUD ALI (see Maqsud Ali Khan).

KHAN, MIR SAEED ALAM, Nawabzada (see Mir, S. A. K.).

KHAN, MUHAMMAD HAYAT (see Muhammad Hayat K.).

KHAN, MUHAMMAD INAMULLAH (see Muhammad I. K.).

KHAN, MUHAMMAD MOOSA (see Muhammad M. K.).

KHAN, MUNSHI MAQSUD ALI (see Maqsud Ali Khan M.).

KHAN, NIAZ MUHAMMAD, see Niaz, M. K.

KHAN, SAADAT-UL-LAH (see Saadat-ul-lah Khan).

KHAN, SAHIBZADA SARDAR MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Khan, S.S.).

KHAN, SAID ULLAH (see Said Ullah Khan).

KHAN, SAID-UZ-ZAFAR (see Said-uz-Zafar Khan).

KHAN, SARDAR ATA MUHAMMAD (see Ata Muhammad S. Khan).

KHAN, SHAMSHAD ALI (see Shamshad Ali K.).

KHAN, SHUJA-UD-DIN (see Shuja-ud-din K.).

KHAN, TALIA MUHAMMAD (see Talia Muhammad Khan).

KHAN, ZAHID HASAN (see Zahid Hasan Khan).

KHAN, ZAMAN MEHDI (see Zaman Mehdi Khan).

KHANDALAVALA, DORAB N. D., B.A., LL.B., Barr., Bombay Judicial Dept. (chief presy. mag.) (b. 14th June, 1884).—Joined the dept., 4th Sept., 1919; 5th presy. mag., Feb., 1924; 4th ditto, March, 1925; offg. ch. ditto, Apl., 1933; confd., Apl., 1938.

KHANDEKAR, SADASHIV BALVANT, Income Tax dept., Bombay (asst. commr.) (b. 21st July, 1884).—Joined the service, 20th Feb., 1906; asst. commr., Aug., 1934.

KHAN-LEGHARI, SARDAR ATA MUHAMMAD, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 23rd Nov., 1913).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., Jalapahar and Christ Church Coll., Oxford, appd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 5th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.

KHANNA, RATAN CHAND, M.A., F.R.E.S., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 21st Mar., 1899).—Joined the service, 17th Feb., 1922; asst. auditor, E.B. rly., Apl., 1927; asst. dir., army audit, E. Cmd., Apl., 1932; asst. acct.-genl., Central revs., Apl., 1936.

KHARAK SINGH, SARDAR SAHIB, M.A. (Punjab) late Indian Agricul. Service (b. 23rd Nov., 1881).—Joined the service as asst. prof., Punjab agricul. coll., 6th Aug., 1908; associate prof., ditto, Dec., 1921; apptd. to I.A.S., 6th Aug. 1922; dep. dir. of agric., March, 1927; retd., Nov., 1936.

KHAREGAT, P. M. (see Pheroze Merwan Kharegat).

KHAREGAT, RUSTAM MERWAN, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (agency surgeon) (b. 3rd Feb., 1889).—First commn. dated 23rd Jan., 1917; civil surg., Ajmer, July, 1924; offg. agency surg., Bundelkhand, Apl., 1927; confd., July, 1927; ditto, Sistan, Feb., 1928; ditto, Bannu, Jan., 1930; civil surg., Hazara and supt., jail, Abbottabad, Mar., 1931; C.M.O., in C.I., and resdy. surg., Indore, June, 1934; agency surgeon, Bundelkhand, Oct., 1934; civ. surg., Ajmer and C.M.O., in Rajputana, Apl., 1938.

KHAREGHAT, M. P. (see Mancherji Pestan-Khareghat).

KHARKAR, SHANKAR GOVIND, B.A., LL.B., late Bombay C.S., Judl. Branch (b. 29th Dec., 1875).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 4th Jan., 1901, to 25th March, 1907; sub-judge, March, 1907; asst. judge, Oct., 1925; ditto, and addl. sess. judge, Nov., 1925; jt. judge and ditto, July, 1926; offg. judge and sess. judge, Oct., 1927; confd., May, 1929; retd., Dec., 1930.

KHARSHEDJI, EDALJI KOTVAL (see Kotval, K. E.).

KHATTRI, BAIJNATH (see Baijnath K.).

KHER, RAO SAHIB PANDIT L. S. R. (see Lachhman Sitaram Kher).

KHER, GOPAL SAKHARAM, B.A., LL.B., Judl. Dept., Central Provs. (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 16th Nov., 1885).—Joined the service, 11th Oct., 1910; sub-judge, Nov., 1923; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1933.

KHIN, HENRY AUNG, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., Burma Medl. Dept. (civil surg.) (b. 8th Dec., 1887).—First commn. dated 1st Nov., 1920; asst. medl. supt., Rangoon gen. hosp., Oct., 1922; civil surg., Aug., 1924.

KHIN MAUNG YIN (see Yin, Khin Maung).

KHINE, MAUNG KYAW, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 10th Dec., 1907).—Educ. at Rangoon University and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; dep. regr., high ct., Sept., 1937.

KHINE, OO KYAW, B.Sc., Indian Civil Service (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 9th Jan., 1904).—Educ. at govt. high sch., Rangoon, and New Coll., Oxford; arrived 4th Nov., 1928, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1935.

KHONDKAR, FAZLE SOBHAN, Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal) (b. 5th Jan., 1905).—Joined the service as proby asst. supt., 17th Dec., 1925; confd., Apl., 1928; offg. addl. supt., April, 1932; dep. commr. of police, Calcutta, Nov., 1937.

KHONDKAR, FAZLUR RAHMAN (see Fazlur R. K.).

KHONDKAR GHOLAM MURSHED, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 25th Jan., 1901).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Oxford Univ. (non-coll.); joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 8th Dec., 1924; and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr., offg. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1930; and again, Sept., 1933; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1931; and again, May, 1933; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1933.

KHOSLA, GOPAL DAS, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 15th Dec., 1901).—Educ. at Univ. of Edinburgh, and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 21st Oct., 1926; arrived, Nov., 1926, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1930; and again, Jan., 1934; confd., Jan., 1937.

KHOSLA, RAM PRASHAD, B.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 16th Aug., 1881).—Apptd. prof. of history, Muzaffrapur Coll., 7th Nov., 1918; on for service as prinpl. T.N. Jubilee Coll., Bhagalpur, July, 1930; prinpl., Greer Bhumihar Brahmin Coll., July, 1935; retd., Aug., 1936.

KHOT, GAJANAN WAMAN, B.A., LL.B., Indian Police (asst. supt., Sind) (b. 24th July, 1908).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Bombay, 1st Mar., 1932; confd., Apl., 1933.

KHUNDHAR, NURAL AZEEM, B.A., LL.B., Barr., Judl. Dept., Bengal (judge, high ct., Calcutta) (b. 17th Mar., 1890).—Joined the service, 27th Oct., 1921; dept. supt. and membr. of legal affairs, Jan., 1924; offg. judge, high ct., Calcutta, variously from Apl., 1934; confd., Nov., 1937.

KHURANA, DWARKA NATH., Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr., Central Provs.) (b. 5th June, 1904).—Joined the service as appr. engr., 18th Nov., 1927; asst. exec. engr. (proby.), Nov., 1928; confd., July, 1930.

KHURSHAIID MUHAMMAD, KHAN BAHADUR, Shaikh, M.A., Punjab Civil Service (dep. commr.) (b. 7th Jan., 1883).—Joined the service as proby. extra asst. commr., 11th Jan., 1907; confd., Sept., 1911; junr. secty. to finl. commrs., Aug., 1927; dep. commr., Aug., 1931; offg. dep. secty., govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, Oct., 1932, to Dec., 1933.

KHURSHED AHMAD KHAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 15th Mar., 1897).—Educ. at Trinity Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr. from 31st Jan., 1922; jt. mag., Oct., 1924; offg. mag. and collr., variously from Sept., 1925; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1928; repres. of U.P. Govt. in Central legis. assembly, Jan., 1931; magte. and collr., May, 1937.

KHUSHI RAM, SUD, Lala, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 14th Dec., 1898).—Joined the service 9th Oct., 1922; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1923; offg. exec. engr., April, 1932; confd., Oct., 1932.

KHURSHID, MOHAMMED, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Assam) (b. 8th Dec., 1907).—Educated at the Punjab University and St. Catherine's College, Cambridge; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; under secty., fin. and rev. depts., Mar., 1938.

KHURSHID, SAHIBZADA MUHAMMAD, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 21st July, 1901).—First commn., 31st Aug., 1922; in milty. employ. to 29th June, 1927; asst. pol. agent and asst. commr., Sibi, Jan., 1929; ditto, Zohb, May, 1929; ditto, Loralai, Apl., 1931; asst. for Mekran to pol. agent in Kalat, Apl., 1932; adjt. Mekran levy Corps, in addn., from Oct., 1933, to Nov., 1933; asst. pol. agent and comdt. refugees camp, Quetta, June, 1935; transf. to for service in Kalat State, Aug., 1935; addtl. asst. pol. agent, S. Waziristan, Dec., 1937; asst. pol. agent, S. Waziristan, Apl., 1938.

KHWAJA MUHAMMAD AKRAM KHAN (see Muhammad Akram Khan, K.).

KHWAJA MUHAMMAD HUSAIN (see Muhammad Husain, K.).

KIDD, FREDERIC WILLIAM, Indian Police (supl., Bengal) (b. 1st Sept., 1890).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 4th Dec., 1911; confd., May, 1914; supt. and dep. commr. of Police, Calcutta, Oct., 1923; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1931; on depn. under G. of I. Home dept., intell. bureau, as cent. intell. officr., Bengal and Assam, from Dec., 1937.

KIDD, HUGH BERESFORD, Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 20th July, 1894).—Joined the service, 20th Nov., 1914; on mil. duty from 23rd July, 1918, to 24th March, 1919; supt., Mar., 1926.

KIDWAL, IKBAL MUSHIR (see Ikbāl M.K.).

KIERNANDER, ARTHUR LESLIE DOBSON, late Impl. Customs Service (b. 27th Sept., 1882).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 3rd Apl., 1902; offg. curator, comml. museum, Calcutta, May, 1919; confd., Feb., 1921; offg. asst. collr., Calcutta, Aug., 1923; confd., Aug., 1925; ditto, Bombay, Nov., 1925; ditto, Rangoon, Nov., 1926; and again, Dec., 1928; ditto, Calcutta, Aug., 1928; ret'd., June, 1932.

KILBURN, DENYS, Indian Police (supl., Punjab) (b. 12th Sept., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th March, 1921; asst. to dep. inspr.-gen., C.I.D., Punjab, April, 1926; offg. supt., Dec., 1926; confd., Oct., 1931.

KILROE, ERNEST GILBERT GEORGE, M.A. (Oxon), late Indian Educl. Service (b. 19th Mar., 1881).—Joined the service, 10th Feb., 1909; inspr. of schools, April, 1909; asst. dir. of public instrn., Central Provs., March, 1913; on mil. service, Sept., 1918, to April, 1919; ret'd., Apl., 1932.

KINDERSLEY, ARTHUR FASKEN, B.A., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Marlborough Coll., and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1902; arrived, 21st Nov., 1903, and served in Sind as asst. collr. and mag. and asst. and sessions judge; under sec. to govt., Bombay, pol., judl. and spl. depts., Aug., 1913; offg. dep. sec. to govt., ditto, Nov., 1918; regr., Bombay high ct., appellate side, Dec., 1919; offg. judl. asst. to govr. in Kathiawar, June, 1920; dep. sec. to govt., legal dept., Dec., 1920; judge and sess. judge, Dec., 1923; ret'd., May, 1930.

KINDERSLEY, JAMES BENJAMIN, B.A. D.S.O., M.C., Indian C.S. (dir. of land records and surveys, Bengal) (b. 28th May, 1893).—Educ. at Clifton Coll., and Exeter Coll., Oxford; on mil. service from Sept., 1914; appointed, 8th Oct.,

1919; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1919, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr. and settlt. officer; offg. magte. and collr., Oct., 1924; confd., June, 1930; offg. dir. land records, Jan., 1931; confd., July, 1931; offg. secty. to govt., rev. dept., Bengal, Jan., 1936.

KING, ALBERT JOHN, O.B.E., B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bengal) (b. 11th Sept., 1886).—Joined the service, 26th Jan., 1912; asst. engr., Jan., 1913; exec. engr., Jan., 1922; offg. supt. engr., Mar., 1933; O.B.E., June, 1933.

KING, ARCHIBALD JOHN, Indian C.S. (judge, high court, Madras) (b. 27th July, 1887).—Educ. at Liverpool Coll., and Lincoln Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 22nd Nov., 1911, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Feb., 1917; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1923; confd., April, 1926; offg. judge, high ct., Madras, July, 1934; confd., Jan., 1935.

KING, ARNOLD JESSE, Indian Police (supl., Madras) (b. 18th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service, 4th Dec., 1920; asst. supt., Dec., 1924; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1923; offg. supt., Mar., 1927; confd., Apl., 1930; supt. special branch, Apl., 1936.

KING, SIR CARLETON MOSS, Kt., C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (b. 17th July, 1878).—Educ. at Brighton and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1901; arrived, 15th Nov., 1902, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. commr., Lucknow, Nov., 1907; city mag., Lucknow, Sept., 1910; jt. mag., Feb., 1913; sess. and sub-judge, Sept., 1916; dist. and sess. judge, May, 1918; dep. sec. to govt. of United Provs, March, 1921; offg. judl. sec. to govt. and legal remembr., Oct., 1921; C.I.E., Jan., 1926; offg. puisne judge, high ct., Allahabad, April, 1926; offg. legal remembr., Aug., 1926; offg. judge, ch. ct., Lucknow, Oct., 1926; actg. judge, high ct., Allahabad, March, 1928; confd., Oct., 1929; ch. judge, ch. ct., Oudh, May, 1934; knighted, June, 1935; ret'd., Oct., 1937.

KING, CUTHBERT, M.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 27th Jan., 1889).—Educ. at Sherborne, Christ Church Coll., Oxford, and Göttingen; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 22nd Nov., 1913, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; on mil. duty from Feb., 1917; on spl. duty under H.B.M.'s consul-gen. and agent to the govt. of India, Khorasan, from Jan., 1919, to April, 1920; dep. commr. (provl.), April, 1926.

KING, EVA FANNY, M.B.E., late India Office (b. 23rd July, 1870).—Apptd. clerical officer, 12th July, 1922; higher clerical officer (acting), July, 1922; confd., Oct., 1925; M.B.E., Jan., 1932; ret'd., July, 1935.

KING, FRANK JEROME MAITLAND, Col., R.E., Survey of India (dir.) (b. 30th Mar., 1884).—First commn. dated 10th Jan., 1903; apptd. asst. supt., survey dept., 27th March, 1907; on mil. duty from Oct., 1914, to Nov., 1916; dep. supt., March, 1922; supt., Jan., 1926; offg. dir., U.P., Apl., 1931; ditto, Frontier circle, Oct., 1931; dir., Oct., 1933.

KING, FREDERICK CHARLES, B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (commr., cent. excises and salt dept., Northern India) (b. 6th Jan., 1888).—Educ. at Clongowes Wood Coll., and Trinity Coll.,

Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 7th Jan., 1913, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., Apl., 1922; confd., July, 1927; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1925; chairman, Assam labour bd., Apl., 1928; commr., Northern India salt rev., May, 1933; commr., cent. excises and salt dept., N. India, Feb., 1938.

KING, GERALD STANLEY WEATHRAL, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 14th Feb., 1884).—Joined the service, 25th Aug., 1904; asst. engr., Sept., 1915; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Sept., 1924; offg. suptg. engr., Dec., 1933.

KING, HAROLD HOLMES, C.I.E., M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 17th Aug., 1884).—First commn., dated 30th Jan., 1909; apptd. offg. dir. King Institute, Guindy, 1st Jan., 1926; confd., Apl., 1928; C.I.E., June, 1934; ret'd., Aug., 1936.

KING, WALTER GAWEN, late Indian Posts and Telegraphs (b. 23rd Mar., 1880).—Joined the service as proby. supt., 1st Jan., 1904; confd., Oct., 1906; dep. P.M.G., Dec., 1927; asst. dir. genl., post office, Dec., 1927; ret'd., Mar., 1931.

KINGSLEY, EDWIN MAXIMILIAN, Burma Frontier Service (dep. commr.) (b. 11th July, 1884).—Held ministerial appts. from Jan., 1907; apptd. extra asst. commr., Nov., 1909; asst. supt. (B.F.S.), Sept., 1930; supt., Oct., 1934; dep. commr., June, 1936.

KIRBY, HAROLD LEVINE, M.C., Indian Forest Service (depy. consvr., Burma) (b. 13th July, 1893).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 14th Dec., 1922; dep. consvr., Dec., 1925.

KIRBY, WALTER, B.Sc., Dept. of Mines in India (chief inspr.) (b. 6th Dec., 1891).—Joined the service as junr. inspr., 27th Apl., 1921; inspr., Oct., 1925; ch. inspr., Apl., 1938.

KIRK, RICHARD THOMAS FRANCIS, B.A., LL.B., Barr., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at King Edward VI's Sch.; and the Univ., Birmingham, and London Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1904; arrived, 24th Nov., 1905, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag. and asst. judge; Jt. judge, June, 1916; actg. judge and sess. judge, May, 1919; confd., Aug., 1925; ret'd., Apl., 1929.

KIRKBRIDE, GEORGE, Major, I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 16th Apl., 1894).—First commn. dated 1st June, 1915; joined pol. dept., 22nd March, 1922; asst. commr., Nowshera, March, 1924; secty., British Legation, Kabul, Dec., 1926; asst. commr., Mansehra, Dec., 1928; and again, July, 1929; dep. commr., Hazara, Apl., 1929; dist. judge, Peshawar, Oct., 1929; secty. to resdt. in Mysore, Mar., 1931; pol. agent, Gilgit, Sept., 1934; ditto, Malwa, Mar., 1938.

KIRKHOPE, KENNETH MACLEAY, C.I.E., V.D., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Stores dept. (b. 9th Apl., 1877).—Joined the service 11th Dec., 1899, as asst. loco. supt.; dist. supt., April, 1907; on mil. duty as supt. of rly. recruitment, from April to Sept., 1916, and as asst. adjutant-general (technical) from April, 1917, to Dec., 1919; C.I.E., June, 1919; dir. of inspection, Indian Stores dept., May, 1923; offg. ch. contr. of stores, June, 1928; ret'd., Aug., 1932.

KIRKNESS, LEWIS HAWKER, C.I.E., O.B.E., D.S.O., Indian State Rlys. (secty., rly. bd.).—Joined the service, 15th Aug., 1929; dir. estabt., rly. bd., Dec., 1932; secty., rly. bd., Feb., 1933; C.I.E., June, 1936.

KIRKPATRICK, WILLIAM, B.E., B.A., M.INST.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (supv. engr., Sind) (b. 15th Sept., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1910; in milty. employ. from 29th July, 1916, to 31st Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1918; offg. suptg. engr., April, 1925, April, 1928, and again April, 1929; confd., May, 1936.

KIRKWOOD, Lt.-Col. JAMES, I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 11th Dec., 1879).—Joined the service, 31st Jan., 1903; D.M.O., South Kanara, Dec., 1923; D.M.O., Ootacamund, March, 1926; ditto, Bellary, Nov., 1928; ret'd., Dec. 1934.

KIRPALANI, HIRANAND KHUSHIRAM, C.I.E., M.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (ch. secty. to govt., Sind) (b. 28th Jan., 1888).—Educ. at Schs. in India, Bombay Univ. and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 15th Nov., 1912, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag.; munpl. commr., Surat, June, 1918, to Jan., 1920; dep. munpl. commr., Bombay, April to Nov., 1921; offg. collr., dist. magte. and pol. agent, May, 1923; dep. sec. to govt., rev. dept. (temp.), March, 1924; ditto (permanent), Aug., 1925; actg. munpl. commr. for city of Bombay, April to Dec., 1926; on deputation out of India as dep. secty. to Indian Central Comm. to Indian Statutory commn., Apl., 1929; municipal commr. for City of Bombay, July, 1931; offg. secty. to govt., Bombay, genl. and educ. depts., Apl., 1935; ch. secty. to govt., Sind, Apl., 1936; C.I.E., Feb., 1937.

KIRPALANI, MOTIRAM KHUSHIRAM, B.A. (Oxon), Indian C.S. (Jt. mag. and dep. collr. Bengal) (b. 15th Aug., 1901).—Educ. at Univ. of Bombay, New College, Oxford, and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1926; arrived, Dec., 1926, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; Jt. magte. and dep. collr., Dec., 1927; offg. Jt. mag. and collr., Jan., 1932; and again, Feb., 1936; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1932; offg. dist. and sess. judge, July, 1934.

KIRPALANI, SANTDAS KHUSHIRAM, B.A., Indian C.S. (secty. elec. and ind. depts., Punjab) (b. 7th Apl., 1899).—Educ. at Bombay Univ. and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 31st Oct., 1922; arrived, 20th Dec., 1922, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr., offg. dep. commr., May, 1926; dep. commr. (provl.), Dec., 1929; confd., Mar., 1933; junr. secty. to finl. commrs., Dec., 1929; offg. rev. secty. to govt., Punjab, Dec., 1931; settlement offer., Jan., 1936; secty., unempl. ettee., Dec., 1937; secty., elec. and ind. depts., Apl., 1938.

KIRPA RAM, RAI BAHADUR, B.A. (dep. dir. of admin. and intell.) (b. 20th June, 1890).—Joined the service on 27th Oct., 1913, and held non-gaz. posts up to 9th May, 1930; asst. chief contr. of stores, Ind. Stores Dept., May, 1930 and asst. dir. of admin. and intell., June, 1930; dep. ditto, June, 1937.

KIRWAN, ERNEST WILLIAM O'GORMAN, Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (prof. ophth. surg., med. coll., Calcutta) (b. 18th May, 1887).—Joined the service, 29th Jan., 1910; apptd. prof. of ophthal. surg., med. coll., Calcutta, Oct., 1930.

KISCH, BARTHOLD SCHLESINGER, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 25th Oct., 1882).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., Exeter Coll., Oxford, and Univ. Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1905; arrived, 26th Nov., 1906, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; joint mag., Apl., 1915; sess. and sub-judge, Mar., 1919; employed under govt. of India commerce dept. from July, 1920, as contr. local clearing office (enemy debts); dist. and sessions judge, Nov., 1922 (on deputn.); C.I.E., Jan., 1926; offg. judge, high ct., Allahabad, Apr., 1930; and again, Oct., 1932; offg. judge, ch. ct. of Oudh, Lucknow, Jan., 1931; confd., Dec., 1932; actg. addl. judge, high ct., Allahabad, Jan., 1933; judge, ditto, May, 1934; ret'd., July, 1935.

KISCH, Sir CECIL HERMANN, K.C.I.E., C.B., M.A., India Office (asst. under-sec. of state) (b. 31st Mar., 1884).—Educ. at Clifton and Trinity Coll., Oxford; served in Secty.'s office at Post Office until 27th July, 1908, when he was apptd. junior clerk, India Office; resdt. clerk, March to Sept., 1910; pte. sec. to under sec. of state, May, 1911; senr. clerk, finl. dept., April, 1914; acting as pte. sec. to under sec. of state from June, 1915, and to parly. under sec. of state (in addn.) from Dec., 1915; pte. sec. (temp.) to the sec. of state, May, 1917, to June, 1919; on deputn. to India in connection with visit of sec. of state, Oct., 1917, to May, 1918; C.B., Jan., 1919; sec. to commte. on Indian exchange and currency, June to Dec., 1919; assist. sec. British Empire Delegation at Peace Conference, Paris, 1918-19; dep. sec., finl. dept., Dec., 1919; sec. finl. dept., April, 1921; acting under-secty. of state, Jan.-Apl., 1932; K.C.I.E., June, 1932; member, Ind. staty. rlv. bd. ctee., June, 1933; ditto, Ind. res. bank ctee., July, 1933; adviser to Ind. delegation to monetary and economic conf., London, June, 1933; asst. under sec. of state, Dec., 1933; commr. of inc. tax, Dec., 1933.

KISHAN, RAM (see Ram Kishan).

KISHEN, RADHA (see Radha Kishen).

KISHOR, CHANDRA (see Chandra, K.).

KISHORE, NAND (see Nand Kishor).

KISHORE, THAKUR JUGAL (see Jugal Kishore T.).

KITCHEN, HUGH MELVILLE, M.C., Indian State Rlys. (transpn. supt.) (b. 13th Dec., 1894).—Joined the service 9th Dec., 1919; asst. supt. E. I. Rly., Nov., 1926; transpn. supt. (traffic comm.), May, 1935.

KITCHIN, ERIC ROBERT, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. pte. secty. to Viceroy) (b. 31st Mar., 1911).—Educ. at Malvern, Christ's College, Cambridge, and New College, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; apptd. asst. pte. secty. to Viceroy, Jan., 1938.

KITCHINGMAN, GERALD DAWSON, M.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 6th Mar., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., March, 1921; dep. consvr., Nov., 1926; offg. consvr., variously from July, 1934.

KNAPP, Sir ARTHUR ROWLAND, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., C.B.E., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Westminster, and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd., after exam. of 1889; arrived, 20th Nov., 1891, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; under sec. to govt., Feb., 1899; sub-collr. and joint mag. Nov., 1904; collr. and mag., Nov., 1908; acting sec. to govt., rev. dept., Jan., 1917; confirmed, April, 1918; C.B.E., June, 1919; chief sec. to govt., Aug., 1919; C.S.I., Jan., 1922; member of exec. council of Govr. of Madras, April, 1922, to March, 1925; K.C.I.E. Jan., 1924; ret'd., Jan., 1927.

KNAPP, GEORGE ERNEST CRISFORD, late Indian Forest Engrg. Service (b. 19th Feb., 1895).—Joined the service as forest engr., Burma, 30th Nov., 1921; ret'd., Mar., 1934.

KNASTER, ROLAND MARCUS JULIUS, B.A., Office of High Commr. for India (educ. officer, princpl. exec. grade, education dept.) (b. 19th July, 1890).—Educ. at the Perse School and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; apptd. asst. to local adviser to Indian students, London, Sept., 1919; warden, 21, Cromwell Road, S.W.7, Feb., 1920, to July, 1923; transf. to office of high commr. for India as asst. to joint secs., Indian students' dept., Oct., 1920; principal exec. officer, education dept., April, 1925.

KNIGHT, GORDON GRAHAM VERDON, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 28th July, 1910).—Educ. at Dulwich College, Magdalene College, Cambridge, and the School of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magte., Mar., 1937; under secty. to A.G.G., Resdt. and Chief Comr., Baluchistan, Nov., 1937; asst. pol. agent and colon. offcr., Nasirabad, Jan., 1938.

KNIGHT, HENRY FOLEY, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (commr. of excise, Bombay) (b. 19th Jan., 1886).—Educ. at Haileybury Sch. and Caius Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 24th Nov., 1910, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; on mil. duty from July, 1916, to Mar., 1919; under sec. to govt. rev. and fin. depts., Oct., 1919; temp. dep. sec., ditto Jan., 1920; dir. of comml. intellig., Bombay, Jan., 1922; addl. dep. sec. to govt., fin. dept. Oct., 1922; dir. of industries, May, 1923; actg. collr. and dist. magte., Nov., 1924, March, 1926, and June, 1928; confd., Jan., 1929; secty., home and eccl. depts., Jan., 1929 and again, Apl., 1935; offg. secty., genl. and educ. depts., Bombay, Feb., 1934; confd., May, 1934; secty., home and eccles. depts., Apl., 1935; C.I.E., June, 1936; offg. commr. of excise, Bombay, Sept., 1936; commr., Dec., 1936; ditto, 1st gr., Dec., 1937.

KNOX, KENNETH NEVILLE, C.I.E., M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 21st July, 1878).—Educ. at Winchester Sch. and Edinburgh Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1900; arrived, 18th Nov., 1901, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. acctnt.-gen., Punjab, May to Nov., 1909; asst. commr., United Provs., Oct., 1910; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Jan., 1912; dep. commr. (s.p.t.), and settlt. offr., Oct., 1915; mag. and

collr., Nov., 1920; C.I.E., June, 1924; commr., Dec., 1931; member, Id. of rev., United Provs., Dec., 1934; chairman, ditto, May, 1935; chairman, excise advisory bd., United Provs., Nov., 1935; retd., Nov., 1936.

KOCHAR, DAULAT RAM, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Central Provs.) (b. 26th June, 1889).—Joined the service, 13th April, 1913; asst. engr., June, 1919; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; offg. exec. engr., April, 1920; confd., Jan., 1933; under-secty., P.W. dept. (blgds. and rds.), Sept., 1929.

KOHLI, DHARAMNATH PRASAD, M.Sc., Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 8th Feb., 1907).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., United Provs., 5th Jan., 1931; confd., Feb., 1933.

KOIMATTUR, SHRINIVAS SHESHO, RAI BAHADUR, late Bombay Civil Service (b. 25th Sept., 1874).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 2nd Apl., 1896, to 11th Jan., 1912; mamlatdar, Jan., 1912; dep. collr., June, 1913; dist. dep. collr., Jan., 1920; offg. collr. and dist. magte., Feb., 1929; retd., Sept., 1929.

KOLAND, VICTOR SAMUEL, B.E., Indian State Railways (dist. loco. supt., E.B. Rly.) (b. 20th May, 1894).—Asst. loco. supt. (junior scale), 5th May, 1922; dist. loco supt. (senr. scale), Nov., 1936.

KOLATKAR, DIGAMBAR KRISHNA, B.A., LL.B., late Central Provs. C.S. (b. Aug., 1874).—Joined the service, 2nd April, 1901; sub-judge, Jan., 1908; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1926; confd., May, 1926; retd., Aug., 1929.

KOMAN, MALIKAYAL CHANDAPPA BALACHANDRA (see Balachandra Koman, M.C.).

KORDIK, OSCAR, M.M., India Office (higher executive officer, acctnt.-genl.'s dept.) (b. 19th May, 1893).—Apptd. second class clerk, India Office, 30th Jan., 1913, and attd. to finl. dept.; on mil. service, from Sept., 1915, to Feb., 1919 (awarded the Military Medal); exec. officer, April, 1922; higher ditto, Aug., 1931.

KOREISHI, ABDULLAHMIA OOSMANMIA, M.A., late Bombay C.S. (b. 5th Jan., 1876).—Joined the service, 1st Feb., 1900; administrator, Radhanpur State, June, 1909, to May, 1910; collr. and mag., March, 1922; retd. Dec., 1931.

KORGAOKAR, HARISH CHANDRA KRISHNARAO, M.A., B.Sc., A.C.G.I., A.M.I.C.E., Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.B. Rly.) (b. 16th Sept., 1885).—Asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; exec. engr. (prov.), July, 1937.

KOTHAVALA, HECTOR RATANJI, M.V.O., O.B.E., late Indian Police Service (b. 26th July, 1874).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 11th Oct., 1894, to Dec., 1907; dept. supt., Dec., 1907; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1915; M.V.O., Feb., 1921; on spl. duty in connection with the tour of H.R.H. the Prince of Wales from Sept., 1921, to March, 1922; O.B.E., March, 1922; appd. to the I.P.S. as supt. of police, Aug., 1922; retd., July, 1929.

KOTHAWALA, DARASHAH DHANJISHAH, Khan Bahadur, M.B.E. (supt., Bombay) (b. 22nd Feb., 1885).—Joined the service, 5th July, 1909; M.B.E., Dec., 1930; promoted to I.P. as supt., May, 1936.

KOTVAL, KHARSHEDJI EDALJI, late Indian Forest Service (b. 9th Sept., 1874).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 28th Jan., 1896, to 20th Feb., 1909; extra asst. consvr., Feb., 1909; dep. consvr., Nov., 1923; retd., Sept., 1929.

KRISHEN, PREM, M.A., Indian C.S. (ji. mag., U.P.) (b. 20th Nov., 1911).—Educ. at St. Edward's High School, Simla, Delhi University and Christ Church, Oxord; joined the service, 4th Sept., 1935; arrived in India, Sept., 1935, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magte., July, 1937.

KRISHNA AIYAR, NARNAMMALPURAM CHELLUM, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 31st Aug., 1879).—Joined the service as asst. lecturer in physics and mathematics, Rangoon, 21st July, 1908; lecturer ditto, Mar., 1910; prof. of physics, June, 1922; retd., Aug., 1934.

KRISHNA AIYAR, SAMBAVISA, B.A., B.L., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 10th July, 1884).—Joined the service, 27th Mar., 1907; asst. accts. officer, posts and tels., Madras, Apl., 1924; dep. acct.-genl., Madras, Sept., 1931; audit officer, C.M. project, May, 1933; attd. officer, office of acct.-genl., Bihar and Orissa, Sept., 1934; dep. acct.-genl., Madras, Nov., 1935; dep. acct.-genl., posts and tels., Madras, Apl., 1937.

KRISHNA, DAYA, KHANNA (see Daya Krishna, K.).

KRISHNA KANIYA LAL, B.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 22nd June, 1890).—Joined the service, 12th Oct., 1914; asst. engr., June, 1919; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; retd., May, 1932.

KRISHNAMA ACHARYA, Sir VANGAL TIRUVENKATA, K.C.I.E., B.A., B.L., Rao Bahadur, late Madras Civil Service (b. 8th Feb., 1881).—Joined the service as dep. collr., 12th April, 1903; asst. secty. to bd. of rev., land rev., Dec., 1913; under-secty. to govt., local and municipal dept., Jan., 1916; trustee of Vizianagram estate, June, 1919; collr. and dist. magte., July, 1920; offg. secty. to govt., law dept., April, 1924; on foreign service as diwan of Baroda State, Feb., 1927; and member, bd. of rev., Madras, Sept., 1932; 1st member, ditto, Aug., 1933; Kt., Jan., 1933; member, Ind res. bank ctee., July, 1933; del. of India at Assembly of League of Nations, 1933 and 1934; 1st member, bd. of rev., Aug., 1936; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1936; retd., Feb., 1936.

KRISHNAMMA, NOBLE RATNAM, B.A. (Cantab.), Indian Educl. Service (prin., ceded dists., coll., Anantapur) (b. 1st June, 1887).—Joined the service, 2nd April, 1910; prin., govt. arts coll., Rajahmundry, July, 1921; ditto, Coimbatore, April, 1925; offg. dist. edul. officer, Dec., 1925; prin. ceded districts coll., Anantapur, April, 1926.

KRISHNAMOORTHY, ENNAPPADAM SUNDERA, Ayyar, B.A., Imperial Customs Service (asst. collr.) (b. 15th Nov., 1905).—Joined the service, Apl., 1930; asst. collr. of customs, Nov., 1931; on spec. duty fin. dept., govt. of India, Apl., 1938.

KRISHNA RAO, KARNAD, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 17th Nov., 1899).—Joined the service, 5th May, 1924; dep. dir. of rly. audit, Apl., 1934; dep. acct.-genl., Punjab, Apl., 1937; asst. dir. audit (def.), May, 1938.

KRISHNAMURTI AYYAR, VADAPURI, Indian Veterinary Service (b. Nov. 1835).—Apptd. prof. of pathology and bacteriology, Madras, 30th June, 1922; offg. prinpl., vety. coll., Madras, May, 1929, and again, Apl., 1933.

KRISHNAMURTI, VEPA, Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 13th Sept., 1910).—Joined the service as proby. asst. exec. engr., Madras, 30th April, 1933; confd., Jan., 1934.

KRISHNA NARAYAN KATHPALIA, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 19th Jan., 1902).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 3rd Nov., 1924; asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1925; offg. exec. engr., Nov., 1929; confd., Oct., 1934.

KRISHNA PRASADA, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. dir. genl., postal services) (b. 4th Aug., 1894).—Educ. at New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived in India, 6th Jan., 1922, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Nov., 1925; offg. mag. and collr., Mar., 1926; confd., Aug., 1935; p.m.g., central circle, Feb., 1935; ditto, Madras, June, 1937; del. to internl. conf., Cairo, 1938; dep. dir. genl., postal services, Apl., 1938.

KRISHNA RAO, NANDALIKE DEVARAO Indian C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 19th July, 1904).—Educ. at University of Madras School of Economics, London and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 28th Sept., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub. collr. and jt. mag., Mar., 1930.

KRISHNAN, HARIKESANALUR RAMASASTRI, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bihar) (b. 9th Jan., 1910).—Educated at Tirthpathi High School, University of Madras, University of Benares and Sidney Sussex College, Cambridge; joined the service, 6th Sept., 1935; arrived in India, Oct., 1935, and served in B. & O. as asst. mag. and collr.

KRISHNAN, ODAYATH, B.A., Imperial Customs Service (asst. collr.) (b. 15th June, 1900).—Joined the service, Apl., 1925; asst. collr. of customs, Mar., 1927.

KRISHNAN, SIVARAMA (see Sivarama Krishnan).

KRISHNASWAMI AYYANGAR, K. S.—Apptd. Judge, High Ct., Madras, July, 1938.

KRISHNASWAMI AYYANGAR, KOMBUR RAMASWAMI I.t.-Col., retd. late I.M.S. (b. 5th July, 1883).—Apptd. dir., Pasteur Institute, Coonoor, 11th Apl., 1928; retd., July, 1938.

KRISHNASWAMI AYYAR, Diwan Bahadur, Sir ALLADI, Kt., B.A., B.L., Judl. Dept., Madras (b. 13th May, 1883).—Apptd. Advocate-genl. for presdy. of Madras, Jan., 1929.

KRISHNASWAMI, V. S., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr.) (b. 12th Aug., 1903).—joined the service as asst. consvr., Madras, 4th Oct., 1929; dep. consvr., Oct., 1934.

KRISHNASWAMY, RANGACHARI SRINIVASADESIVA, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 2nd June, 1906).—Educ. at Madras University and London School of Oriental Studies; joined the service 10th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1933.

KRISHNASWAMY, SUCHEENDRUM YEGANARAYANA, Indian C.S. (sub-collr., Madras) (b. 30th Sept., 1906).—Educ. at University of Madras and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1919; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and coll.; sub-collr., Aug., 1932; spl. sett. offer., Apl., 1937.

KUDVA NARAYANA, VENKATARAYA, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 13th Nov., 1898).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and Clare Coll., Cambridge; joined the service 1st Nov., 1922; arrived, 13th Dec., 1922 and served in Madras as asst. collr., and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Jan., 1925; on for service as estate collr., Sivaganga, Nov., 1930; offg. collr. and mag., July, 1933; supt. of stationery, Madras, Jan., 1936.

KUKAR, JAGAN NATH (see Jagan Nath, K.)

KULKARNI, LAKSMAN PANDURANG, Diwan Bahadur, M.A., late India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 12th June, 1880).—Joined the service as proby. supt., 16th May, 1902; confd., May, 1904; offg. asst. dir. genl., April, 1920; confd., May, 1922; offg. dep. dir. genl., Jan., 1930; offg. P.M.G., U.P., Apl., 1931; ditto, Bihar and Orissa, May, 1932; retd., June, 1935.

KUMAR ASANAND (see Asanand Kumar).

KUMTHEKAR, KONDO MAHADEV, B.A., LL.B., late Judl. Dept., Bombay (b. 8th Jan., 1882).—Joined the service, 16th June, 1910; asst. judge, Nov., 1933; offg. dist. and sess. judge, variously from Aug., 1931; retd., Jan., 1937.

KUNDAN LAL, late India Posts and Tels. (b. 12th April, 1883).—Joined the service as proby. supt., 1st Oct., 1906; confd., July, 1907; dep. P.M.G., central circle, Feb., 1930; ditto, United Provs., Feb., 1935; offg. p.m.g., United Provs., Aug., 1936; retd., April, 1938.

KUNDAN LAL AGGARWAL, M.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 21st Aug., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. on 8th Dec., 1924; dep. consvr., Nov., 1928.

KUNDAN LAL, LALA, B.A., A.M.I.E. (Ind.), Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 21st Aug., 1888).—Joined the service, 5th Oct., 1911; asst. engr., Oct., 1912; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1921.

KUNHIRAMAN, CHURYA, B.A., B.L., Barr., Judl. Dept., Madras (ch. judge, ct. of small causes) (b. 1st Mar., 1888).—Apptd. offg. asst. prof., law coll., Madras, 10th July, 1911; confd., July, 1916; prof. ditto, July, 1921; 3rd judge, small cause ct., Feb., 1927; 2nd ditto, Feb., 1928; temp. judge, city civil ct., Madras, June, 1932; ch. judge, small cause ct., July, 1933.

KUNHIRAMAN NAMBIYAR, AMANDA KALOTH, Indian Police (asst. supt., Madras) (b. 15th May, 1911).—Apptd. asst. supt., on probn., 13th Feb., 1935; confd., Feb., 1937.

KUNJ BEHARILAL SETH (see Sth, K. B.).

KUNZRU, TRIBHUVAN NATH, Indian State Rlys. (asst. exec. engr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 15th Dec., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. engr., B.E. Rly., 10th Oct., 1915; asst. exec. engr., N.W. Rly., Jan., 1921; resdt. engr., G.I.P. Ma Rly., r., 1924; offg. exec. engr., Apl., 1926.

KUPPUSWAMI AYYAR, C. N., B.A., B.L., Judl. Dept., Madras (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 1st Apl., 1887).—Joined the service, 21st Oct., 1908; sub judge, Apl., 1934; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1936.

KUPPUSWAMI RAMASWAMI AYYANGAR, Income Tax Dept., Madras (asst. commr.) (b. 28th Dec., 1887).—Held non-gaz. appts.; joined the service, Sept., 1918; income-tax officer, Oct., 1923; confd. as asst. commr. of income-tax, Mar., 1937.

KUPPUSWAMI SASTRI, S., M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 16th Dec., 1880).—Apptd. prof., presdy. coll., Madras, 23rd Feb., 1921; retd., Dec., 1935.

KUPPUSWAMI, VALAVANUR SUBRAHMANYA, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 1st July, 1899).—Joined the service, 5th Dec., 1924; dep. consvr., Nov., 1928.

KUPPUSWAMY AYYAR, NARAYANASWAMY, RAO BAHADUR, late Income tax dept., Burma (b. 23rd Jan., 1870).—Apptd. asst. commr., income tax, Mar., 1927; retd., Jan., 1930.

KUPPUSWAMY, IYENGAR, KRISHNASWAMY, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 5th Apl., 1905).—Joined the service, 12th Apl., 1930; asst. acct. genl., Madras, Apl., 1932; ditto, Bengal, Apl., 1936.

KURBAN ALI KHAN, KHAN, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 11th May, 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 8th Nov., 1921; offg. supt., Mar., 1927; confd., Apl., 1933.

KURVA, SHUJAUDDIN ESMAILJI, Barr., Bombay Judicial Dept. (b. 13th July, 1885).—Apptd. judge, small causes ct., Bombay, Oct., 1928.

KYA, BA, Judl. dept., Burma (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 14th Nov., 1892).—Joined the service, Mar., 1921, dist. and sess. judge (confd.), Nov., 1937.

KYAW KHINE, OO, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 9th Jan. 1904).—Educ. at University of Rangoon, and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 29th Sept., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in Burma as asst. commr.

KYAW, MAUNG BA, B.A., Burma C.S. (Cl. I.) (asst. commr.) (b. 11th June, 1914).—Educ. at Rangoon Univ.; apptd. on probn., 1st Oct., 1937; confd., 5th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Oct., 1938, and served as asst. commr.

KYAW MIN, MAUNG (see Min, Maung Kyaw).

KYAW, U., late Indian Forest Service (b. 20th Sept., 1876).—Joined the service, Sept., 1912; dep. consvr., Oct., 1923; retd., Mar., 1932.

KYAW, U. (A.2), B.A., late Burma Civil Service (b. 10th Aug., 1877).—Apptd. extra asst. commr., May, 1910; dep. commr., Dec., 1926; retd., Aug., 1932.

KYIN MAUNG, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (regr., co-op. soc., Burma) (b. 25th April, 1904).—Educ. at University of Rangoon, and Oriel Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 28th Sept., 1928; arrived, Oct., 1928, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty., educn. dept., Aug., 1932; offg. dep. commr., Oct., 1934; jt. regr., co-op. soc., Dec., 1935; offg. regr., ditto, Mar., 1937.

KYIN, U Po, Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 1st June, 1885).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, 25th July, 1922; offg. dist. supt., May, 1930; confd., Sept., 1933.

KYLE, JOHN STEWART, late Indian Police Service (Punjab) (b. 8th Nov., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 21st March, 1921; offg. dist. officer, frontier constabulary, Dec., 1925; supt., March, 1928; retd., Oct., 1931.

LABERN, REGINALD ALBERT, Office of High Commr. for India (exec. officer, general dept., (b. 29th Oct., 1897).—Apptd. temp. clerk, India Office, Oct., 1920; transfd. to H.C.'s Office, April, 1922; clerical officer, Jan., 1924; exec. ditto, June, 1927; office secty. to Indian del. to Indo-British trade negotiations, June, 1937 to Sept., 1938.

LABHU RAM, RAI BAHADUR, Lala, M.A., LL.B., late Punjab Civil Service) (b. 16th Nov., 1876).—Joined the service, 7th Jan., 1901, as extra asst. commr.; dep. commr., July, 1927; retd., Nov., 1931.

LABORDA, FELIX EDWARD RICARDO, Indian State Rlys. (dist. medl. officer, E.I. Rly.) (b. 1st Apl., 1890).—Joined the service as dist. medl. officer, 17th Oct., 1919; offg. C.M.O., E.I. rly., variously from May, 1933.

LABOUCHARDIERE, BASIL RICHARD EMILE, Indian Police.—Apptd. asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., 22nd Jan., 1936; confd., Oct., 1937.

LA BOUCHARDIERE, MAURICE PRINCE, Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 3rd Sept., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 22nd March, 1920; offg. supt., April, 1923; confd., Nov., 1927.

LACAMP, ADRIAN, Survey of India (asst. supt.) (b. 19th Nov., 1893).—Joined the service, 19th Jan., 1923; asst. supt., mathematical instruments office, Mar., 1926.

LACEY, CHRISTOPHER WILLIAM, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 28th Dec., 1880).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1913; in mil. employ from 28th Jan., 1918, to 23rd Mar., 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1922; offg. suptg. engr., Mar., 1936, to Nov., 1936.

LACEY, GERALD, B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engineers (suptg. engr., United Provs.) (b. 26th July, 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1910; in mil. employ from 5th Oct., 1917, to 29th Aug., 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1918; prof., T.C.E. Coll., Roorkee, Oct., 1928; offg. suptg. engr., Mar., 1934; confd., Aug., 1936.

LACEY, ONWARD BAYES, V.D., A.M.I.M.E., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 10th Feb., 1883).—Joined the service as asst. loco. supt. N.W. Rly., Dec., 1910; supt., July, 1925. E.I. Rly.; works manager, E.B. Rly., Nov., 1928; offg. dep. loco. and carr supt., Nov., 1929; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., E.B. Rly., Oct., 1934; confd., July, 1935; retd., Feb., 1937.

LACEY, RICHARD HARRY DRACOTT, late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 11th Dec., 1886).—Joined the service, 26th Nov., 1908; asst. examr., Nov., 1909; asst. acctnt. gen., April, 1915; dep. acctnt. gen., July, 1923; ditto, Madras, Oct., 1927; audit officer, Cauvey-Metur project, Mar., 1930; dep. acct. genl., Burma; retd., Nov., 1933.

LACEY, WALTER GRAHAM, Indian C.S. (addl. secty., pol. and appt. dept., Bihar) (b. 17th July, 1894).—Educ. at Norwich and Bedford Grammar Schs. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1919; arrived, 1st Dec., 1919, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; ditto and under-sec. to govt., finl. dept. May, 1922; offg. dep. commr., March, 1925, and March, 1926; addl. judl. commr., Feb., 1926; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1926; offg. secy. finl. dept., April, 1930; offg. supt. of census, Nov., 1930; offg. secty. to govt. local self-govt. dept., Nov., 1933; magte. and collr. (provl. subs.), Aug., 1933; confd., Sept., 1935; offg. secty. to govt., fin. dept., May, 1935; secty. to govt., local self-govt. dept., Oct., 1935; addl. secty. to govt., pol. and appt. dept., Bihar, Apl., 1936.

LACHHMAN PRASAD BHARGAV, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., United Provs., 15th Oct., 1927; confd., Oct., 1936.

LACHHMAN SITARAM KHER, RAO SAHIB PANDIT, B.A., late Income Tax Dept., United Provs. (b. 1st July, 1881).—Joined the service, 2nd Nov., 1903; dep. collr., Nov., 1905; asst. commr., Mar., 1925; offg. commr., Central Provs., Aug., 1933; confd., Oct., 1934; ret'd., July, 1936.

LAD, PURUSHOTTAM MANGESH, B.A., Indian C.S. (judge and sess. judge, Bombay) (b. 20th March, 1905).—Educ. at University of Bombay and Caius Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1928; arrived, Dec., 1928, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; judge and sess. judge, Aug., 1936.

LADLI PERSHAD, RAI SAHIB, B.A., Commerce Dept., Govt. of India (asst. secty.) (b. 12th Oct., 1889).—Joined the service, 26th Aug., 1913; supt., dept. of commerce, June, 1925; asst. secty., ditto, May, 1932.

LAHIRI, BISHWA NATH (see Bishwa, N. L.).

LAHIRI, JATINDRA CHANDRA, late Bengal Civil Service (b. 13th July, 1875).—Joined the service, 24th Feb., 1902; munisf., Dec., 1903; sub-judge, Dec., 1920; dist. and sess. judge, July, 1928; ret'd., July, 1930.

LAINE, SIR ABRAHAM JAMES, K.C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 26th Aug., 1876).—Educ. at Elizabeth Coll., Guernsey and Pembroke Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1899; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1900, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transfid. to Assam as asst. commr., Nov., 1904; joint mag. and dep. collr., E. Bengal and Assam, Jan., 1906; asst. commr., Assam, April, 1912; dep. commr., Oct., 1915; second sec. to govt. of Assam, April, 1922; C.I.E., Jan., 1930; member, govr.'s exec. council, Nov., 1930; actg. govr. of Assam, June to Oct., 1935; K.C.I.E., June, 1935; ret'd., Dec., 1935.

LAIQ SINGH, RAI SAHIB, late Indian Forest Service (b. 22nd June, 1880).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 17th June, 1901, to 30th June, 1911; proby. extra asst. consvr., July, 1911; confd., Sept., 1912; apptd. to I.F.S., 1st Sept., 1928; dep. consvr., 1928; ret'd., Feb., 1934.

LAIRD-MACGREGOR, EDWIN GEORGE LISTER, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bombay) (b. 2nd July, 1874).—Educ. at Charterhouse, and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; apptd. after exam.

of 1897; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1898, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag., and forest settlt. offr.; on spl. duty under provl. supt., census operations, Bombay, Oct., 1911; acting collr. of customs, Calcutta, Nov., 1913; collr. of customs, Calcutta, April, 1914; junr. collr., and ditto, July, 1916; collr. and dist. mag. and pol. agent, Oct., 1917; collr. of salt revenue, March, 1924; offg. commr. of excise, May, 1926; member, legisl. council, July, 1926; ret'd., Nov., 1930.

LAITHWAITE, JOHN GILBERT, C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A., India Office (secty. to govr.-genl. and pte. secty. to Viceroy) (b. 5th July, 1894).—Educ. at Clongowes and Trinity Coll., Oxford; served in France with 10th Lanc. Fus., May, 1917, to July, 1918; specially employed, War Office, March to Sept., 1919; apptd. junr. clerk, mil. dept., 16th July, 1920, after previous service as temp. junr. clerk since 1st Oct., 1919; asst. principal, April, 1921; pte. sec. to parly. under-sec. of state, March, 1922; on deputation to India with Lord Winterton, Aug. to Nov., 1922; asst. pte. sec. to sec. of state, Oct., 1923; principal, services and genl. dept., Sept., 1924; pol. dept., May, 1927; personally attached to Prime Minister for Indian round table conf., London, 2nd Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; secty., Indian Franchise ctee., Jan.-June, 1932; C.I.E., Jan., 1935; secty., Ind. delimitn. ctee., Aug., 1935; pte. secty. to Viceroy, Apl., 1936; secty. to govr.-genl. (in addn.), Apl., 1937; C.S.I., Jan., 1938.

LAKHPAT, RAI, M.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Central Provs.) (b. 8th July, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Feb., 1928.

LAKSHMAN SARUP GUPTA, LALA, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 20th Dec., 1902).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 26th Oct., 1924; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1926; exec. engr. Oct., 1935.

LAKSHMANA RAO, KASARAGOD PATANASHETTI, Diwan Bahadur, Madras Civil Service (Judicial Branch) (judge, high ct., Madras) (b. 15th Dec., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. prof'r., law coll., Madras, 28th Aug., 1916; prof'r., ditto, Oct., 1920; dist. and sess. judge, June, 1921; offg. judge, high ct., Madras, variously from Aug., 1930, addl. ditto, Jan., 1934; confd., Sept., 1935.

LAL, BANWARI (see Banwari Lal).

LAL, BASANT (see Basant Lal).

LAL, BEHARI (see Behari Lal).

LAL, BRIJ (see Brij Lal).

LAL, BRAJ BHUSAN (see Braj Bhusan Lal).

LAL, BRIJ MOHAN (see Brij Mohan Lal).

LAL, BURTON CHANDU (see Chandu Lal, B.).

LAL, CHAMPA (see Champa Lal).

LAL, CHANDU (see Chandu Lal).

LAL, CHHOTE (see Chhote Lal).

LAL, CHHUTTAN (see Chhuttan Lal).

LAL, CHIMAN (see Chiman Lal).

LAL, CHUNI, Handa (see Chuni Lal, Handa).

LAL, DONALD CHANDU (see Chandu Lal, D.).

LAL, DHAWAN PURUSHOTTAM (see Dhawan Purushottam Lal).

LAL, HARBANS (see Harbans Lal).

LAL, HARIVANSH (see Harivansh Lal).

LAL, INDRA MOHAN (see Indra Mohan Lal).

LAL, JAI (see Jai Lal).

LAL, KANHAIYA (see Kanhaiya Lal).

LAL, KRISHNA KANIYA (see Krishna Kaniya Lal).

LAL, KUNDAN (see Kundan Lal).

LAL, KUNJ BEHAR MOHAN (see Mohan Lal, K.B.).

LAL, MOHAN, BATFA (see Mohan Lal, Batra).

LAL, MOTI (re Moti Lal).

LAL, MUNNA (see Munna Lal).

LAL, MUTSADDI (see Mutsaddi Lal).

LAL, PANNA (see Panna Lal).

LAL, RAM (see Ram Lal).

LAL, RANG BEHARI (see Rang Behari Lal).

LAL, RANGI (see Rangi Lal).

LAL, SANGHAM (see Sangham Lal).

LAL, SARDARI (see Sardari Lal).

LAL, SHADI (see Shadi Lal).

LAL, SHAM (see Sham Lal).

LAL, SHAMALDHARI (see Shamaldhari Lal).

LAL, SHAVAX ARDESHIR (see Shavax Ardeshir, Lal).

LAL SINGH, MUNSHI, B.A., Rai Bahadur, late Punjab Civil Service (b. 16th Dec., 1882).—Joined the service as proby. extra asst. commr., 15th Jan., 1907; confd., Oct., 1911; offg. dep. commr., Sept., 1927; confd., Sept., 1931; ret'd., Dec., 1937.

LAL, SUNDER (see Sunder Lal).

LALIT CHAND, THAKUR, B.A., Punjab Civil Service (b. 15th Dec., 1891).—Extra asst. commr., Punjab, Oct., 1914.

LALKAKA, FRAMROZ DHANJISHAH, late Impl. Customs Service (b. 21st Aug., 1874).—Joined the service, 6th Jan., 1898; and held non-gazett'd appts. until June, 1908; appt. a-st. collr. of customs, June, 1908; offg. collr. of customs, Bombay, Jan., 1921; cffg. chief collr., Karachi, May, 1922; actg. collr. of customs, Karachi, Feb., 1925; asst. ditto, Bombay, Oct., 1925; offg. collr., Rangoon, Mar., 1929; ret'd., Nov., 1929.

LALKAKA, MINOCHAR DORABJI, B.A., LL.B., Barr., Judicial Dept., Bombay (b. 3rd Aug., 1894).—Apptd. judge, small cause ct., Bombay, 15th Apr., 1929.

LALI (see also unnae Lal).

LALL, ARTHUR SAMUEL, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 14th July, 1911); educated at Central Model School, Lahore, University of the Punjab and Balliol College, Oxford; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934 and served in Punjab as asst. commr.; sub-divl. offcr., May, 1937.

LALL, JOHN SAMUELS, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., U.P.) (b. 9th Sept., 1914).—Educ. at Central Model Sch., Lahore, Punjab Univ., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 7th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in the U.P. as asst. mag. and collr.

LALL, KRISHEN BEHARI, M.A., Indian C.S. (ass. commr., C.P.) (b. 30th May, 1915).—Educ. at A.S.V.J. High Sch., Delhi, Dehli Univ., and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 6th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938 and served in the C.P. as asst. commr.

LALLUBHAI, MANEKALAL, Rao Bahadur, O.B.E., (dep. collr. of salt rev., Bombay) (b. 9th Nov., 1879).—Joined the service, 22nd Feb., 1897; held non-gaz. posts, Feb., 1897 to Dec., 1917; asst. collr., salt and excise, Jan., 1918; supt., ditto, Sept., 1920; ch. accts offcr., customs, salt and opium, Nov.,

1923; supt., salt rev., Mar., 1924; asst. collr., Sept., 1926; dep. collr., May, 1932; offg. collr., variously from June, 1934; O.B.E., June, 1932.

LALVANI, LALCHAND VARUMAL, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Sind) (b. 14th Sept., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., 1st Oct., 1921; offg. exec. engr., May, 1926; confd., Oct., 1930.

LAMARQUE, WALTON GEOFFREY, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Madras) (b. 12th Feb., 1913).—Educ. at Marlborough and Oriel Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 20th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Dec., 1937, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.

LAMB, GEORGE HAMISH, Indian State Rlys. (works manager, G.I.P. rly.) (b. 15th Mar., 1887).—Joined the service 23rd Sept., 1921; production engr., G.I.P. rly., Jan., 1929; asst. work manager, G.I.P. rly., Feb., 1931; works manager, Oct., 1932.

LAMBERT, D. P., Major, I.M.S. (civ. surg.), (b. May 25, 1902).—Date of first commn., Oct. 15, 1926; civil surg., United Provs., Aug., 1934.

LAMBERT, ERIC THOMAS DRUMMOND, Indian Police (b. 3rd Nov., 1909).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Assam, 25th Nov., 1929.

LAMBERT, E. W., M.A., Barr., Burma Judl. Service (asst. govt. advocate) (b. 7th Apr., 1890).—Apptd. offg. asst. govt. advocate, Burma, 25th Mar., 1926; confd., June, 1934.

LAMBERT, Sir GEORGE BANCROFT, K.C.S.I., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 28th Oct., 1873).—Educ. at Magdalen Coll., Oxford, and Univ. Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1896; arrived, 6th Dec., 1897, and served in the N.W. Provs. as asst. mag. and collr. and asst. commr.; joint man., Dec., 1906; dep. commr., Sept., 1914; mag. and collr., March, 1916; dep. dir. of land records, and inspr.-gen. of registrn., Nov., 1917; offg. finl. sec. to govt., April, 1919; chief sec. to govt., United Provs., April, 1921; C.S.I., June, 1922; member, govr.'s exec. council, Jan., 1928, to Oct., 1930; reappointed ditto, Apr., 1931; offg. govr., United Provs., Dec., 1928; K.C.S.I., June, 1929; govr., United Provs., Oct., 1930 to Apr., 1931; ret'd., Dec., 1932.

LAMBERT, HENRY, M.A. (Cantab.), late Indian Educl. Service (b. 22nd Feb., 1881).—Joined the service, 19th Nov., 1907, and appt. inspr. of schools, Bengal; transf'd. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; actg. principl., Ravenshaw Coll., Cuttack, July, 1915; confd., April, 1918; offg. dir. of public instrn., Bihar and Orissa, variously from Jan., 1924; on spl. duty, educl. dept., govt. of India, Dec., 1928; ret'd., Feb., 1936.

LAMBERT, OSCAR WILFRED, Office of the High Commr. for India (exec. officer, accts. dept.) (b. 2nd Mar., 1894).—Apptd. clerical officer, 8th July, 1923, after previous service from 7th Oct., 1919; acting exec. officer, June, 1931; confd., Apr., 1933.

LAMBERT, WILLIAM JAMES, B.A., B.Sc., late Indian Forest Service (b. 2nd Feb., 1891).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 14th Dec., 1915; dep. consvr., Oct., 1922; instr., forest coll., Dehra Dun, May, 1923; consvr., Kashmir, Nov., 1924, to Oct., 1929; ret'd., Jan., 1933.

LAMBRICK, HUGH TREVOR, Indian C.S. (collr. and mag., Bombay) (b. 20th Aprl., 1904).—Educ. at Rossall School, and Oriel Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. asst. commr. in Sind, Apr., 1931, temp. dep. secty. to govt., pol. and reforms dept., Bombay, Mar., 1935; offg. collr., June, 1936.

LAMINGTON (BARON), RIGHT HON. CHARLES WALLACE ALEXANDER NAPIER COCHRANE-BAILLIE, G.C.M.G., G.C.I.E.—GOVT. OF BOMBAY 12th Dec., 1903, to 27th July, 1907.

LAMOON, ALBERT JOSEPH, India Office (higher clerical officer, acct.-genl.'s dept.) (b. 4th May, 1881).—Apptd. clerical officer, 29th Aug., 1921; actg. higher clerical officer, Jan., 1925; confd., Nov., 1926.

LANCASHIRE, JOHN KENNETH, M.A., Barr., late Indian C.S. (b. 20th Feb., 1878).—Educ. at Currie Sch., Folkestone, and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1900; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1901, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag., and spl. settlt. offr.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Sept., 1914; dist. and sessions judge, Sept., 1922; ret'd., Nov., 1936.

LANCASTER, HAROLD, Indian State Rlys. (colliery supt., E.I. Rly.) (b. 30th June, 1883).—Apptd. colliery supt., 1st July, 1922.

LANDER, ANTHONY JOHN MEADS, M.C., M.A., Indian C.S. (addl. secty., def. dept., Burma) (b. 21st Aug., 1895).—Educ. at Epsom Coll., and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 26th Oct., 1920; arrived, 19th Feb., 1921, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., May, 1925; confd., Jan., 1934; addtl. secty., def. dept., Feb., 1938.

LANDER, PERCY EDWARD, M.A. (Cantab.), D.Sc. (London), A.I.C., Dept. of Agriculture, Punjab (agricl. chemist to Govt.) (b. 8th May, 1889).—Dep. dir. of agric., 4th Dec., 1920; offg. agricl. chemist to govt., Mar., 1921; confd., Dec., 1923.

LONDON, CYRIL, O.B.E., M.C., late India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 23rd Sept., 1880).—Apptd. asst. supt., 1st Oct., 1902; asst. supt. engrg., April, 1914; on field service, from Oct., 1914, to July, 1917; supt., engrg., Nov., 1917; O.B.E., Jan., 1920; apptd. asst. to dir. in-chief, Indo-European Tel., Public Works Dept., India Office, Nov., 1924, to Nov., 1925; divl. engr., telegraphs, Bombay Div., March, 1926; ret'd., Sept., 1931; war decorations—South African Medal, 1899-1902, with clasps; Military Cross, Feb., 1917.

LANE, A. S., M.B.E., B.Sc., Dept. of Industries and Labour, Govt. of India (b. 22nd May, 1900).—Apptd. aircraft and engine inspr. on the staff of the dir. of civil aviation in India, 29th Mar., 1929; M.B.E., Jan., 1935; ret'd.

LANE, BASIL WILLIAM, Indian Police (b. 5th Aug., 1905).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Madras, 13th Jan., 1926; offg. dist. supt., Dec., 1932; and again, Mar., 1933.

LANE, CHARLES MACDONALD, C.S.I., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 26th Jan., 1882).—Trained at the R.I.E. Coll.; apptd. asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1903; exec. engr., Oct., 1911; offg. suptg. engr., Dec., 1924; suptg. engr. (prov. perm.), Mar., 1927; confd., Nov.,

1928; offg. ch. engr., May, 1929; confd., July, 1931; member, legisl. council, Bombay, 1932; C.S.I., June, 1935; ret'd., Jan., 1937.

LANE, HERBERT ALLARDYCE, C.I.E., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 13th Aug., 1883).—Educ. at Wellington Coll., and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1907; arrvd., 23rd Nov., 1908, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag.; jt. mag., July, 1916; ditto, and asst. settlt. offr., Oct., 1916; dep. commr. (prov.) and settlt. offr., Oct., 1918; addl. collr., Nov., 1921; mag. and collr., and settlt. officer, Aug., 1924; rev. and judl. sec. to govt., Oct., 1925; secty. to govt., rev. and public wks. dept., May, 1927; C.I.E., Jan., 1927; offg. settlement commr., Mar., 1929; secty. to govt., rev. and p.w.d. (b. and r.), Feb., 1932; offg. presdt., ct. of wards, Aprl., 1934; confd., Nov., 1935.

LANE, HUGH THOMPSON, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., U.P.) (b. 26th Aprl., 1914).—Educ. at Rossall Sch. and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; joined the service, 24th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in U.P. as asst. mag. and collr.

LANE, LESLIE RICHARD, late Indian Customs Service (b. 28th Nov., 1893).—Joined the service, 21st March, 1920; asst. collr., March 1922; ret'd., March, 1932.

LANE, PAUL CUTHBERT HORSBURGH, Capt., R.I.M., ret'd. (b. 7th Sept., 1884).—Apptd. port officer, Bassein, 8th Feb., 1924; dep. port conservator, Madras, Jan., 1927; divl. marine transport officer, Burma, Feb., 1929; prinpl. officer, mercantile marine dept., Burma, Feb., 1933; ret'd., June, 1934.

LANE, RICHARD GEORGE McLAREN, late Indian Police (b. 29th June, 1902).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 25th Nov., 1922; offg. supt., Feb., 1932, and again, Sept., 1933; confd., Aprl., 1935; ret'd., June, 1938.

LANG, LIONEL EDWARD, C.I.E., M.C., Lt.-Col., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 1st Nov., 1885).—First commn., 18th Jan., 1905; apptd. asst. pol. agent, Mahi Kantha, March, 1909; adviser to H.H. the Nawab of Radhanpur, Feb., 1912, to May, 1913; asst. pol. agent, Palanpur, April, 1914; on mil. duty from Dec., 1914, to Nov., 1919; C.I.E., June, 1921; asst. resdt., Kolhapur, April, 1922; pol. agent, W.K. States, Mar., 1927; asst. pol. agent, S.M.C. States, Dec., 1927; resdt., Kolhapur, and pol. agent, S.M.C. States, Jan., 1928; pol. agent, Bhopal, Aprl., 1933; resdt., Kashmir, Nov., 1933.

LANG, WILLIAM GORDON, Indian Police (b. 23rd Nov., 1916).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., 27th Oct., 1936.

LANGDON, FREDERICK GUY, A.M.I.C.E., Indian State Rlys. (dep. ch. engr., G.I.P. rly.) (b. 5th Nov., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 9th June, 1911; offg. resdt. engr., Nov., 1914; confd., Sept., 1919; divl. engr., Dec., 1929; offg. dep. ch. engr., contrn., May, 1935; and variously from May, 1936; provl., Nov., 1937.

LANGFORD, JOHN BRIAN, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 21st June, 1907).—Educ. at City and County School, Chester, and Clare College, Cambridge; joined the service, 16th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930,
