ROGERS, Sir LEONARD, K.C.S.I., C.I.E., M.D., F.R.S., F.R.C.P., F.R.C.S., Major-Genl. I.M.S. (ret'd.) (b. 18th Jan., 1868).—First commn. dated 29th July, 1893; mil. employ to Nov., 1898; on depn. as imperial bacteriologist from Nov., 1898; dep. san. commr., Bengal, Jan., 1900; surgn., presy. gen. hosp., May, 1902, to July, 1905; prof. of pathology, med. college, Calcutta, Feb., 1906, and bacteriologist to govt.; C.I.E., Dec., 1911; knighted, June, 1914; ret'd., March, 1921; member, medical board, India Office, Oct., 1922; presdt., ditto, Nov., 1928, to Nov., 1933; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1932.

ROGERS, PHILIP GRAHAM, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 3rd April, 1877).—Educ. at Christ's Hospital and Keble Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1900; arrived, 18th Dec., 1901, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. commr., Assam, Nov., 1904; personal asst. to chief commr., April, 1905; under sec. to ditto, Aug., 1905; pte. sec. to Lieut.-Govr., Oct., 1905; asst. mag. and collr., E. Bengal and Assam, Jan., 1906; under sec. to govt., E. Bengal and Assam, Aug., 1908; transf. to Bombay as joint mag. and dep. collr., Feb., 1909; postmaster-gen., Central Prov., April, 1909; asst. commr., Assam, Nov., 1911; postmaster-gen., Bengal, July, 1913; ditto, Bengal and Assam, April, 1914; ditto, Central Provs., Oct., 1917; ditto, Punjab and N.W.F. Prov., April, 1918; dep. dir.-gen., posts and tels., May, 1920; postmaster-gen., Bombay, Dec., 1922; C.I.E., Jan., 1924; dep., dir.-genl., post office, April, 1927; offg. dir.-genl., posts and tels., May, 1928; ret'd., Feb., 1931.

ROGERS, THOMAS EDWARD, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 28th Dec., 1912).—Educ. at Bedford Sch., and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 16th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

ROHATGI, D. P. (see Durga Prasad Rohatgi).

ROLLO, JAMES FREDERICK, Northern India Salt Rev. Dept. (asst. commr.) (b. 3rd Nov., 1884).—Joined the service, 20th Apl., 1908; asst. commr., Sept., 1926; asst. gen. manager, Sambhar, July, 1934; asst. commr., Kohat, Mar., 1935.

ROMER, HERBERT JOHN, M.B.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 19th Jan., 1879).—Joined the service, 19th June, 1894; asst. traffic supt., April, 1920; asst. transportation

supt., Nov., 1922; M.B.E., June, 1925; offg. pers. asst. to ch. trans. supt., May, 1926; dep. transportation supt., Mar., 1933; ret'd., Jan., 1937.

ROMESH CHANDRA, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Assam) (b. 17th Mar., 1897).—Joined the service, 14th Nov., 1921, as asst. exec. engr.; exec. engr., Nov., 1930; prof. civil engrg., Roorkee, Oct., 1937.

RONALDSHAY (EARL OF) see under ZETLAND (Marquess of).

RONSON, HARRY, Indian C.S. (under-secty., commerce dept., Govt. of India) (b. 14th Dec., 1906).—Educ. at Blackpool Secondary Sch. and Trinity Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 20th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Jan., 1936; attaché to the Govt. of India, dept. of commerce, Mar., 1937; under-secty., ditto, May, 1937.

RONSON, JOHN LANCASTER, Indian Police (b. 11th Jan., 1918).—Apptd. asst. supt., Madras, on probn., Nov., 1938.

ROOKE, EDWARD A., late Indian Forest Service (b. 2nd Nov., 1875).—Held non-gazetted appt. from 1st April, 1896; on foreign service in Bastar state from 28th Jan., 1904; extra asst. consvr., Aug., 1909; joined the I.F.S. as dep. consvr., April, 1927; ret'd., July, 1930.

ROONEY, JOHN JOSEPH, M.B., B.Ch., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (resdy. surg., Bushire) (b. 27th Jan., 1890).—Date of first commn., 25th April, 1921; in milty. employ to Apl., 1930; agency surg., Bushire, Apl., 1934; resdy, ditto, Oct., 1935.

ROPER, WILLIAM EDWARD CHARLES, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Burma) (b. 26th June, 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Burma, 1st Oct., 1924; exec. engr., Oct., 1933.

ROSAIR, HARRY BASIL, L.R.C.P., and S.I., L.A.H. and L.M. (Dub.), D.T.M., late Jail Dept., United Provs. (b. 1st May, 1882).—Apptd. offg. supt., central prisons, 2nd Mar., 1923; confd., Nov., 1927; ret'd., May, 1937.

ROSE, GEORGE WRIGHT NORTON, A.M.I.C.E., B.Sc., late Indian State Ryis. (b. 22nd April, 1884).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1906; on milty. duty from 14th April, 1915, to 19th Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. divl. supt., Sept., 1926; offg. dep. ch. engr., Jan., 1929; ret'd., May, 1933.

ROSE, HUGH, Indian State Ryis. (dept. supt. of stores) (b. 7th May, 1892).—Joined the service, 4th Mar., 1920, asst. supt. of catering, Burma ryis., May, 1924; dep. supt. of stores, Burma ryis., Oct., 1935.

ROSE, H. MAURICE, late Opium dept., United Provs. (b. 6th Feb., 1880).—Joined the service as prob. asst. opium agent, 16th April, 1901; confd., Feb., 1905; dist. opium officer, Dec., 1925; ret'd., Feb., 1935.

ROSE, HUGH ELLISHA, late Indian State Ryis. (b. 1st May, 1883).—Joined the service, 3rd Jan., 1906; junr. asst. signal engr., Apl., 1909; senr. ditto, Oct., 1922; dist. signal engr., Oct., 1925; offg. signal engr., April, 1928; transfld. to E.B. rly., Nov., 1933; offg. dep. ch. engr. (signals), Feb., 1934; ret'd., July, 1937.

ROSE, JOHN CHARLES, Indian State Ryis. (ch. comml. manager, E.I. Rly.) (b. 5th July, 1893).—Joined the service, 7th April, 1910; asst. supt., July, 1920; offg. asst. comml. manager, Jan., 1926; offg. dep. ch., ditto, Mar., 1926; confd., Mar., 1928; chief comml. mgr., Dec., 1937.

ROSE, ROBERT FREDERICK, Indian Service of Engineers (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 19th Feb., 1884).—Joined the service as tempy. engr., 27th April, 1907; asst. engr., Jan., 1923; apptd. to the I.S.E. as asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1927; exec. engr., Jan., 1932.

ROSE, REV. THOMAS PERCIVAL, M.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (junr. chaplain).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., Punjab, 2nd Dec., 1931; junr. chaplain, Dec., 1933.

ROSE, WILLIAM ROBERT CHARLES, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 29th April, 1880).—Held various posts as tempy. engr. from 26th March, 1904, to 18th May, 1927; asst. engr. (provl. service), May, 1927; apptd. to I.S.E. as asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1928; offg. exec. engr., Jan., 1928; ret'd., Nov., 1932.

ROSE MEYER, PATRICK MAURICE, Indian Audit Dept. (b. 9th Oct., 1892).—Joined the service, 11th Mar., 1912; asst. dir., army audit., S. Cmd., Jan., 1929; dep. govt. exr., B.B. and C.I. rly., Mar., 1935; dep. ch. auditor, E.B. rly., Apl., 1935.

ROSEVEARE, Major WILLIAM LEONARD, M.C., R.E., late Indian Service of Engrs., Burma (b. 11th Dec., 1895).—First commn., 16th Sept., 1914; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1924; exec. engr., Nov., 1927; ret'd., Mar., 1938.

ROSS, Sir EDWARD DENISON, Kt., C.I.E., Ph.D., late Indian Educl. Service.—Educ. at Marlborough and Univ. Coll., London; profir. of Persian at the latter institution, 1896-1901; apptd. principal of Calcutta Madrasah, 8th Nov., 1901; offir. in charge of records of govt. of India, and asst. sec., home dept., Jan., 1906; ditto and asst. sec., dept. of educn., Dec., 1910; C.I.E., June, 1912; ret'd., April, 1914; Kt., June, 1918; dir., School of Oriental Studies, since 1916; author of 'The Early Years of Shah Ismail', 'The Takhri-i-Rashidi', 'The Heart of Asia' (with F. H. Skrine), 'Life and Times of Omar Khayyam,' &c.

ROSS, GEORGE MABYN, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 30th Apl., 1883).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1905; asst. engr., Jan., 1906; exec. engr., Oct., 1913; offg. supt. engr., June, 1926, Mar., 1927, and again, Oct., 1931; confd., Jan., 1932; offg. ch. engr., N.W.F.P., Mar., 1934; confd., July, 1935; C.I.E., May, 1937; ret'd., Apl., 1938.

ROSS, GEORGE ROBERT THOMSON, M.A., D. Phil. (Edin.), late Indian Educl. Service (b. 1st Apl., 1874).—Arrived, 10th Oct., 1909, and served as profir. of philosophy, Rangoon; on mil. service, May to July, 1918; lecturer in philosophy, Univ. Coll., Rangoon; Fellow of Rangoon Univ.; ret'd., Oct., 1929.

ROSS, GEORGE WHITEHILL, C.I.E., D.S.O., Col. I.A. (b. 6th June, 1878).—First commn. dated 22nd Jan., 1898; in mil. emp. to July, 1903, when he was apptd. to the mil. accts. dept.; asst. sec., fin. dept., mil. fin. branch, Feb., 1911; asst. finl. adviser, 1913; addl. dep. fin. adviser, Feb., 1920; dep. mil. acctnt.-gen., mil. fin. branch; mil. acctnt.-gen. (provl.), June, 1926; ret'd., Dec., 1929; C.I.E., Jan., 1930.

ROSS, HENRY, C.I.E., O.B.E., M.B., F.R.C.S.I., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 29th June, 1877).—First commn., 26th July, 1902; apptd. addl. asst. dir.-gen., I.M.S., Oct., 1916; temp. dep. dir.-gen., Nov., 1917, to Jan., 1918; asst. dir.-gen., I.M.S. (stores), April, 1918; O.B.E., June, 1918; services placed at disposal of Indian Red Cross Society, Nov., 1922; C.I.E., Jan., 1923; civil surg., Nov., 1925; ret'd., June, 1932.

ROSS, HERBERT STEWART, B.A., Indian C.S. (magie. and collr., United Provs) (b. 27th Dec., 1885).—Educ. at Christ Coll., Brecon, and Jesus Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 26th Nov., 1910, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag.; jt. mag., Sept., 1916; on mil. duty from Aug., 1918, to Jan., 1919; asst. supt., Dehra Dun, April, 1922; offg. supt., ditto, April, 1922; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1925; confd., July, 1926; secty., bd. of rev., Jan., 1927; offg. commr., Feb., 1935; member, Madhe Sahaba engy. cttee., Apl., 1937.

ROSS, RICHARD WILLIAM, B.A. (Lon.), late Indian Educl. Service (Madras) (b. 8th Oct., 1876).—Joined the service, 30th Sept., 1911; apptd. prinpl., teachers' coll., Rajamundry, 3rd June, 1917; offg. prinpl., Muhammadan coll., Madras, July, 1925, and again July, 1927; offg. dist. educl. officer, Nov., 1925, and again Nov., 1927; offg. prinpl., teachers' coll., Saidapet, July, 1928; confd., Apl., 1929; ret'd., Oct., 1931.

ROSS, ROBERT LINDSAY, M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 20th April, 1874).—Educ. at Edinburgh Univ. and Trin. Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1897; arrived, 7th Dec., 1898, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; under sec. to govt., judl. and genl. depts., Dec., 1904, to March, 1906; joint mag. and dep. collr., Jan., 1907; pte. sec. to lieut.-govr., Bengal, Dec., 1907, to July, 1908; regr., high court, appellate side, from April, 1910, to July, 1912; transfed. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; dist. and sess. judge, July, 1912; judge, high ct., Patna, Feb., 1924; ret'd., July, 1932.

ROSS, WILLIAM CHARLES, Lieut.-Col., M.B., Ch.B., D.P.H., I.M.S. (ret'd.) (b. 3rd July, 1878).—First commn., dated 26th July, 1902; was in mil. employment up to May, 1905; offd. as dep. sanitary commr., Bengal, June, 1905; dep. sanitary commr., Bihar and Chota-Nagpur Circle, April, 1907; offg. sanitary commr., Bihar and Orissa, June, 1915; dir. of public health ditto, Aug., 1917; ret'd., Apl., 1930.

ROSSINGTON, MAURICE HERBERT, Indian C.S. (under-secty. home dept., govt. of Burma) (b. 31st July, 1908).—Educ. at the Royal Academical Institution, Belfast, and Univ. Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Dec., 1932, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty., home dept., Apl., 1937.

ROSSITER, EDWARD MORGAN, Civil Aviation Directorate (technical officer, temp.) (b. 23rd Oct., 1895).—Joined the service as tech. officer., 23rd Apl., 1936.

ROTHWELL, WALTER, late Indian State Ryis. (G.I.P. Ry.) (b. 31st July, 1886).—Joined the service, 21st July, 1911; asst. carr. and wagon supt., April, 1919; dist. ditto, Feb., 1923; works manager, May, 1925; offg. dep. ch. mech. engr., Nov., 1928; ret'd., May, 1932.

ROUGHTON, NOEL JAMES, C.S.I., C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (member-secty., tariff bd.) (b. 25th Dec., 1885).—Educ. at Winchester, and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived 22nd Nov., 1909, and served in the Central Provs. as asst., commr.; regr., judl. commr.'s court, July, 1913; under-sec. to chief commr., Jan., 1918 to March, 1919; dep. commr. (provl.), Dec., 1920; confd., Nov., 1921; dir. of industries and regr. of co-op. societies, Central Provs., July, 1923; dep. sec. to govt. of India, commerce dept., June, 1925; finl. secty. to govt., C.P., April, 1928; C.I.E., Jan., 1933; offg. commr., Feb., 1933; confd., July, 1934; offg. ch. secty. to govt., U.P., May, 1933; member, govr.'s exec. council, Central Provs. (temp.), Nov., 1934, and again, May, 1936; services placed at disposal of govt. of India, dept. of indus. and lab., Nov., 1936; member-secty., tariff bd., May, 1938; C.S.I., June, 1938.

ROUPELL, KATHLEEN ZELIA, India Audit Office (higher clerical officer) (b. 11th Mar., 1890).—Apptd. clerical officer, 6th Jan., 1922; higher clerical officer, July, 1935.

ROUSE, Sir ALEXANDER MACDONALD, Kt., C.I.E., F.C.H., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 14th Sept., 1878).—Trained at the R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1900; personal asst. to chief engr., and under sec. to govt., United Provs., Nov., 1907; exec. engr., and ditto, Oct., 1908; temp. transfed. to Delhi, Jan., 1912; supt. of works, Delhi, Aug., 1912; C.I.E., J. n., 1913; temp. suptg. engr., Delhi, Aug., 1916; suptg. engr., June, 1921; offg. chief engr. and sec. to govt., March to Nov., 1924, and from April, 1925; confd., Oct., 1926; Kt., Jan., 1930; ch. engr., central public wks. dept., Apl., 1930; ret'd., Aug., 1933.

ROUSE, WILLIAM PERCY MEADOWS, Indian Police (b. 24th Feb., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., N.W.F.P., 17th Nov., 1926.

ROUT, REGINALD ALAN, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (suplg. engr., Punjab) (b. 26th Sept., 1884).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1906; exec. engr., Oct., 1915; offg. suptg. engr., March, 1928; confd., Aug., 1932.

ROUTLEDGE, BRYAN HOWARD, Indian Police (supl., Assam) (b. 14th Apl., 1903).—Joined the service, 25th Nov., 1922; deputed to Sardah Police training coll. in Bengal to 16th May, 1924; proby. asst. supt., May, 1924; confd., Nov., 1924; offg. supt., Oct., 1932; confd., Feb., 1933.

ROW, KODIKAL SANJIVA (see Sanjiva, Row K.).

ROW, RAGHVENDRA, O.B.E., M.D., D.Sc. (Lond.), late Medical dept., Bombay (b. 16th Nov., 1871).—Apptd. prof., G.M. Coll., Bombay, 2nd July, 1926; K-i-H. medal, 1st class, Dec., 1911; O.B.E., Dec., 1919; ret'd., Dec., 1931.

ROWBOTHAM, CLAUDE JOHN, late Indian Forest Service (b. 7th July, 1884).—Joined the service, 9th Nov., 1907, as asst. consr.; on mil. service from Sept., 1916, to May, 1920; dep. consvr., Oct., 1922; offg. consvr., Aug., 1928; ret'd., July, 1932.

ROWE, ALBERT JOHN, Office of High Commr. for India (higher executive officer, accis. dept.) (b. 23rd Oct., 1892).—Apptd. second class

clerk, India Office, 12th Nov., 1913, and attd. to acctnt.-gen.'s dept.; services lent to high commr. for India, from Oct., 1920; exec. officer, April, 1922; actg. higher exec. officer, April, 1925; confd., April, 1926.

ROWE, BERTRAM ALFRED, Indian Police (b. 14th Jan., 1918).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., Nov., 1938.

ROWLAND, FRANCIS GEORGE, B.A., Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Patna) (b. 14th Aug., 1883).—Educ. at Harrow and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of, 1905; arrived, 29th Nov., 1906, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transf. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; jt. mag. and dep. collr., April, 1913; attaché, legisl. dept., govt. of India, April, 1917; dist. and sess. judge, and ditto, July, 1917; offg. dep. sec., legis. dept., govt. of India, Oct., 1917; addl. legal rembr., Bihar and Orissa, Jan., 1918; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1919; judicial commr., Nov., 1923; offg. judge, high ct., Patna, variously from June, 1929; addl. judge, ditto, variously from March, 1931; judge, high ct., Patna, Aug., 1936.

ROWLAND, JAMES WALTER, Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 20th Apl., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 3rd Dec., 1909; on milty. duty from April, 1915, to Feb., 1919; supt. of police, Dec., 1922; offg. commr., Bombay, Feb., 1936; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1938.

ROWLAND, JOHN EDWARD MAURICE, Indian State Rlys. (chief rly. commr., Burma) (b. 30th Apl., 1882).—Joined the service as asst. engr. (temp.), 24th May, 1904; ditto (perm.), July, 1909; dist. engr., Mar., 1919; offg. variously as ch. and dep. ch. engr., from June, 1927; confd. as dep. ch. engr., June, 1929; offg. ch. engr., May, 1933; and again, Dec., 1934; confd., Mar., 1935; offg. agent, Burma Rlys., Feb., 1935; confd., Oct., 1935; chief rly. commr., Apl., 1937.

ROWLAND, THEODORE, India Office (higher executive officer, military dept.) (b. 20th July, 1892).—Apptd. second class clerk, India Office, 6th May, 1912, and attd. to registry and record dept.; transf. to mil. dept., Jan., 1917; on mil. service from Dec., 1915, to March, 1919; exec. officer, April, 1922; dep. reading clerk to council, Feb., 1926, to Feb., 1932; actg. hr. exec. officer, Jan.-July, 1932; confd., Mar., 1933.

ROWLANDS, ARCHIBALD, M.B.E.—Apptd. Financial Adviser (mil. fin.), Govt. of India, July, 1937.

ROWLANDS, WILLIAM SHAW, B.A., Indian Educl. Service (prinpl., Robertson Coll., Jubbulpore) (b. 1st Mar., 1888).—Joined the service as prof., Jubbulpore Coll., Feb., 1912; prinpl., May, 1928.

ROWLANDSON, EDMUND JAMES, C.I.E., late Indian Police (b. 27th Oct., 1882).—Joined the service, 12th Nov., 1903, as probr.; asst. supt., July, 1906; supt., April, 1914; offg. asst. inspr.-gen., April, 1924; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., Mar., 1927; offg. commr. of police, Madras, July, 1929; confd., May, 1930; C.I.E., June, 1932; offg. inspr.-gen., Apl., 1933; ret'd., Dec., 1935.

ROWNTREE, HAROLD KIRKBY, M.C., M.B., Lt.-Col., (ret'd.), late I.M.S. (b. 27th Oct., 1887).—First commn. dated 27th July, 1912; in mil. employ up to 15th Oct., 1922; civil surg. (Punjab), Oct., 1922; ditto, Simla (East), May, 1925; ret'd., Sept., 1938.

ROWNTREE, JOHN BATEMAN, Indian Forest Service (asst. consvr., Assam) (b. 5th Apl., 1906).—Joined the service as proby. asst. consvr., 11th Oct., 1929; confd., Oct., 1930.

ROXBURGH, James, late India Office (b. 8th Apl., 1875).—Clerk, 2nd class, 30th Dec., 1895; minor staff clerk, Dec., 1911; services lent to mil. dept., March, 1915, to July, 1921; staff clerk, Feb., 1920; higher exec. officer, April, 1922; seconded for duty in finl. dept., Jan., 1934; ret'd., Feb., 1936.

ROXBURGH, THOMAS JAMES YOUNG, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 2nd March, 1892).—Educ. at Merchant Taylors' Schl. and Magdalene Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived in India, Dec., 1915, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; I.A.R.O., Aug., 1916, to Feb., 1919; jt. mag. and dep. collr., April, 1920; offg. chief presy. mag., Calcutta, June, 1923; confd., May, 1927; C.I.E., Jan., 1932; offg. secty. to govt., judl. dept., Bengal, Feb., 1935; judl. secty., Bengal, Apl., 1937.

ROY (see also Ray).

ROY, AMULYA NATH, B.A., late India Posts and Tels. (Bihar and Orissa) (b. July, 1875).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 6th April, 1898; proby. supt., Sept., 1903; supt., Feb., 1906; dep. postmaster-genl., July, 1927; ret'd., July, 1930.

ROY, BEJOY KUMAR, M.A., Indian Forest Service, M.A., B.Sc. (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 4th Mar., 1896).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 11th Dec., 1920; dep. consvr., Dec., 1924.

ROY, CHANDRA BALI, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Central Provs.) (b. 9th Aug., 1894).—Joined the service, 16th Oct., 1916; asst. engr., Oct., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1920; offg. exec. engr., Nov., 1924; confd., Oct., 1926.

ROY, SIR GANENDRA PRASAD, Kt., M.I.E.B., late Posts and Telegraph Dept.—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the telegraph service, 1st Oct., 1894, as asst. supt.; supt., Feb., 1909; ditto, and dep. postmr.-gen., April, 1914; supt., telegraph engrng., Oct., 1914; dir., ditto, Oct., 1916; offg. chief engr., telegraphs, March, 1924; knighted, July, 1926; ret'd., April, 1927.

ROY, HEMENDRA MOHAN, Rai Bahadur, B.A., late Indian Audit Dept. (b. 23rd June, 1881).—Joined the service, 22nd June, 1904; dep. acct. genl., Burma, July, 1929; dep. acct.-genl., Burma, Apl., 1936; ret'd., June, 1936; re-employed from Sept., 1936.

ROY, JAMES LEISHMAN, A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 29th Apl., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1915; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1924; under secty. to govt., irrigation bch., Aug., 1932; under secty. (construction) Punjab irrig. sectt., Jan., 1933; ditto (north), May, 1933.

ROY, KEITH COTTON, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 26th July, 1912).—Educated at Wyggeston Grammar School, Leicester, University College, London, and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, Dec., 1935; arrived in India, Jan., 1936, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

ROY, PARESH LAL, M.A., Indian State Ryls. (dist. traffic supt., E.B. Rly.) (b. 20th Dec., 1893).—Asst. traffic supt., Nov., 1919; dist. ditto, Jan., 1937.

ROY, SATYENDRA NATH, C.S.I., C.I.E., Indian C.S. (secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of Communications) (b. 23rd Sept., 1888). Educ. at Govt. Sch., Bankura, Bengal, Calcutta Univ., and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 25th Nov., 1913, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; sec. to prov. committee to consider proposals of pub. serv. commn., Nov., 1917, to Jan., 1918; offg. under sec. to govt. of Bengal, gen. dept., Jan., 1918; ditto, finl. dept., Feb., 1918; employed under Indian def. force, Feb. to June, 1918; on spl. duty, genl. dept. of govt. of Bengal, June, 1918; under sec. to govt. of Bengal, general dept., July, 1918; dep. chairman, Howrah municipality, Oct., 1919, to Nov., 1920; offg. mag. and collr., April, 1921; offg. dep. sec., govt. of Bengal, pol. and appt. dept., Nov., 1925; magte. and collr., Sept., 1927; dep. secty., Indian central commee., Oct., 1928; dep. secty. to govt. of India, home dept., Apl., 1929; C.I.E., Jan., 1932; joint secty., Indian round table conf., London, 3rd session, Nov.-Dec., 1932; offg. addl. secty. to govt., Bengal, pol. dept., Apl., 1933; jt. secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of indus. and lab., July, 1936; offg. secty., ditto, Oct., 1936; secty., dept. of communications, Nov., 1937; C.S.I., June, 1938.

ROY, SURES CHANDRA, M.Sc., D.Sc., Meteorological Dept. (meteorologist) (b. 1st Mar., 1899).—Joined the service as meteorologist on probn., 7th Mar., 1927; confd., Mar., 1929; services placed at the disposal of the govt. of Burma with effect from Feb., 1937.

ROY, SUHRID KUMAR, B.Sc., Ph.D., F.G.S., Indian School of Mines (b. 1st Jan., 1895).—Joined the service as prof. of geology, 3rd Jan., 1928.

ROYDS, THOMAS, D.Sc., Meteorological Dept. (dir., Kodaiakanal Observatory) (b. 11th Apl., 1884).—Joined the service as asst. dir., 28th Feb., 1911; dir., ditto, Feb., 1923.

RUDDELL, Rev. J. W. F., B.A., Ind. Eccles. Estabt. (junr. chaplain) (b. 8th Aug., 1896).—Apptd. chaplain, Bombay, on probn., 1st Oct., 1934; junior chaplain, Oct., 1936.

RUMBOLD, HORACE ALGERNON FRASER, B.A., India Office (princl., pol. dept.) (b. 27th Feb., 1906).—Educ. at Wellington and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. asst. principal, Jan., 1929; pte. secty. to parly. under-secty. of state, Apl., 1930; ditto to perm. under-secty. of state, Dec., 1933; actg. princpl., Sept. 1934; confd., Apl., 1937.

RUNDLETT, LESLIE ST. CLARE, A.C.G.I., A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 26th Mar., 1891).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1915; on milty.

service from 27th Sept., 1918, to 11th May, 1920; asst. exec. engr., May, 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. supt. engr., May, 1933.

RUPCHAND BILARAM, B.A., LL.B., late Judl. Dept., Bombay (b. 15th May, 1878).—Apptd. addl. judl. commr. (temp.), June, 1923; confd., Nov., 1925; offg. judl. commr., Sind, Feb., 1933; addl. ditto, July, 1933; ret'd., May, 1938.

RUSBY, LIONEL STUART, late Indian Police (b. 6th Nov., 1896).—Joined the service, 6th Mar., 1923; offg. supt., Bombay, Mar., 1927; supt., Oct., 1932; ret'd., Oct., 1938.

RUSE, VICTOR HAROLD, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., U.P.) (b. 12th Oct., 1915).—Educ. at Wanstead County High Sch., London and Queen's Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 7th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in the U.P., as asst. mag. and collr.

RUSHBROOK WILLIAMS, LAURENCE FREDERIC, C.B.E., M.A., B.Litt., F.R.Hist.S., M.R.A.S.—Educ. at Univ. Coll., Oxford; prof. of modern Indian history, Allahabad Univ., 1914 to 1919; dir., central bureau of infn., govt. of India, 1st June, 1919; official historian of Indian tour of H.R.H. the Prince of Wales, 1921-22; pte. sec. to Indian representative at Imperial Conference, 1923; C.B.E., June, 1923; ret'd., Dec., 1925; adviser to Chamber of Princes, India round table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; 2nd Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; 3rd session, Nov., 1932.

RUSHTON, HUGH DARRELL, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 6th Nov., 1903).—First commn., 30th Aug., 1923; in milty. employ until 20th May, 1929; pers. asst. to resdt. at Hyderabad, 25th May, 1929; ditto to ch. commr., N.W.F.P., May, 1931; asst. pol. agent, Chitral, May, 1932; asst. commr., Nowshera, Oct., 1933; dist. and sess. judge, Dera Ismail Khan, Oct., 1935; addtl. ditto, Peshawar, July, 1936.

RUSHTON, KENNETH CHARLES, late Indian Police Service (Bombay) (b. 13th Oct., 1875).—Joined the service, 20th Jan., 1897; dist. supt., April, 1906; dep. inspr.-gen., May, 1921; awarded King's Police Medal, Jan., 1926; ret'd., Sept., 1930.

RUSSELL, ALEXANDER ALFRED, M.C., Major I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 5th Oct., 1898).—First commn. dated 30th Jan., 1917; in milty. employ prior to 20th April, 1924; supy. asst. commr., Peshawar, March, 1925; secty., Kabul legation, April, 1925; supy. asst. commr., Mardan, Dec., 1926; under secty. to ch. commr., N.W.F.P., Feb., 1927; asst. commr., Kohat, April, 1928; under secty. to resdt., Persian Gulf, May, 1928; offg. secty. to ditto, May, 1929; British trade agent, Gyantse, &c., Nov., 1931; secty. to A.G.G. for Deccan states, Apl., 1934; ditto, states of W.I., Mar., 1935; dep. commr., Dera Ismail Khan, Nov., 1936; ditto, Hazara, Dec., 1937.

RUSSELL, ALEXANDER JAMES HUTCHINSON, C.B.E., K.H.S., M.A., M.D., B.Ch., D.P.H., Col., I.M.S. (public health commr. with the Govt. of India) (b. 30th Aug., 1882).—Joined the service, 27th July, 1907; in mil. employ from April, 1908, to Sept., 1912; surgeon-gen., hospil., Madras, Nov., 1912; prof. of hygiene and

bacteriology, Medl. Coll., Madras, Dec., 1912; prof. of pathology, ditto, July, 1919; dir. of public health, Madras, Jan., 1922; C.B.E., June, 1925; offg. dep. dir.-genl., I.M.S., Jan., 1933; confd., July, 1933; public health commr. with the Govt. of India, Dec., 1933; hon. surg. to H.M. the King-Emperor, Aug., 1935.

RUSSELL, Sir (CHARLES) LENNOX (SOMERVILLE), Kt., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Rugby and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1891; arrived, 1st Dec., 1893, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; under sec., jud., &c., depts., July, 1898, to Jan., 1902; joint mag. and dep. collr., Feb., 1901; asst. to resdt. in Mysore, and sec. to chief commr., Coorg, Jan., 1902; under sec. to govt. of India, foreign dept., March, 1903; dep. sec., ditto, Oct., 1904; pol. agent, Quetta-Pishin, July to Nov., 1906; divl. and sess. judge, Derajat, Nov., 1907; resdt., Indore, July, 1909; ditto, Mewar, March, 1916; ditto, Baroda, March, 1918; ditto, Hyderabad, July, 1920; Kt., Jan., 1924; ret'd., Aug., 1926.

RUSSELL, EDWARD WILSON, A.M.I.C.E., V.D., Indian State Rlys. (dep. agent (works), G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 24th Oct., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 20th Jan., 1911; resdt. engr., April, 1914; on milty. service from 8th June, 1918, to 25th Feb., 1920; offg. divl. transpn. supt., May, 1930; confd., Mar., 1933; offg. dep. contr. of stores, Mar., 1933; offg. dep. agent (works), G.I.P. rly., Mar., 1934; confd., Apl., 1934.

RUSSELL, HAROLD GEORGE, O.B.E., Indian Police (asst. inspr. genl., Punjab) (b. 24th Feb., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 25th Nov., 1922; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1928; offg. supt., Nov., 1932; confd., May, 1937; O.B.E., June, 1936; asst. inspr.-genl., May, 1937.

RUSSELL, JAMES MCCONNELL, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 28th July, 1909).—Educ. at Stranraer High School, Glasgow Univ., and Wadham College, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Dec., 1932, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty., fin. dept., Burma, Feb., 1935.

RUSSELL, JAMES WILLIAM, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 2nd May, 1899).—Joined the service, 25th Oct., 1921; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1922; offg. exec. engr., May, 1927; confd., Oct., 1931.

RUSSELL, JOSHUA FORBES, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bengal) (b. 4th Feb., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 6th April, 1920; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1925; exec. engr., Oct., 1926.

RUSSELL, LAWRENCE WALTER, Indian Police (asst. supt., Bihar) (b. 6th Jan., 1912).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 10th Nov., 1931; confd., Apl., 1933.

RUSSELL, ROBERT EDWIN, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (magte. and collr., Bihar) (b. 21st Apl., 1890).—Educ. at Campbell Coll., Belfast, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 13th Dec., 1913, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; on mil. service from Oct., 1915, to Apl., 1919; addl. under-sec. to govt., Bihar and Orissa, edn.

and munpl. depts., Apl., 1919; offg. dep. commr., Oct., 1922; offg. sec. to govt. rev. dept., Mar., 1927; confd., July, 1928; magte. and collr., Nov., 1928; C.I.E., Jan., 1934; offg. ch. secty. to govt., Bihar and Orissa, Aug., 1934, to Sept., 1936.

RUSSELL, ROBERT TOR, C.I.E., D.S.O., F.R.I.B.A. (b. 2nd July, 1888).—Consulting architect, central pub. wks. dept., Oct., 1933.

RUSSELL, STEVEN NOEL, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 24th Dec., 1908).—Educ. at King's School, Ely, and King's College, Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-secty. to Govt., pol. and appts. depts., Jan., 1936.

RUSSELL, THOMAS BRIAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (b. 15th Feb., 1888).—Educ. at Cork Gr. Sch., Univ. Coll., London, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 7th Dec., 1912, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; asst. censor, Madras, Oct., 1914, to Oct., 1915; asst. to agent to govr.-gen., Rajputana, and mag. of Abu, Nov., 1915; 1st asst. to resdt., Baroda, Aug., 1918; sub. collr. and jt. mag., July, 1919; offg. collr. and dist. mag., April, 1924; collr., C. & M. station, Bangalore, Oct., 1924; offg. collr. and dist. magte., June, 1930; confd., Nov., 1930; secty. to govt., local self govt. dept., Madras, Sept., 1934 to Aug., 1937.

RUSSELL, Sir THOMAS GUTHRIE, K.C.I.E., B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., Indian State Rlys. (ch. commr. of rlys., rly. bd.) (b. 19th Jan., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 21st Nov., 1913; resdt. engr., Sept., 1919; contr. of stores, Nov., 1923; dep. agent, June, 1925; offg. agent, May, 1927; ch. commr. of rlys., rly. bd., Oct., 1929; Kt., June, 1932; K.C.I.E., May, 1937.

RUSSELL-STRACEY, THOMAS PATRICK, late Indian Finance Dept.—Apptd. asst. sec. to the govt. of Punjab, fin. dept., 28th May, 1902; joined fin. dept., govt. of India, and apptd. asst. acctnt.-gen., Punjab, April, 1911; dep. acctnt.-gen., ditto, Aug., 1912; asst. acctnt.-gen., ditto, Oct., 1912; asst. acctnt.-gen., Bombay, July, 1913; ditto, Madras, May, 1914; dep. acctnt.-gen., posts and telegraphs, Madras, Nov., 1916; ret'd., 1932.

RUST, NEVILLE ARTHUR, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service.—Joined the service, 30th June, 1907, and apptd. hd. master, Bareilly; inspr. of schools, Nov., 1908; regr., deptl. exams., United Provs., Oct., 1914, to Aug., 1916, and from Feb., 1920, to Feb., 1921; on mil. service, Aug., 1916, to Feb., 1920; ret'd., Jan., 1929.

RUSTAMJEE, K. F., B.Sc. (Hon.), Nagpur, Indian Police (b. 22nd May, 1916).—Apptd. asst. dist. supt., Cent. Provs. and Berar, on probn., 7th Mar., 1938.

RUTHERFORD, ROBERT EWART, V.D., Indian State Rlys. (divl. supt., E.I. Rly.) (b. 22nd Nov., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 3rd Nov., 1906; dist. supt., Sept., 1919; divl. supt., Feb., 1925.

RUTHERFORD, THOMAS GEORGE, C.I.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (secty. to govr., Madras) (b. 25th Sept., 1886).—Educ. at George Watson's College (Edinburgh), Edinburgh and University Coll., London; apptd. after exam.

of 1909; arrived in India, 1st Dec., 1910, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub. collr. and jt. mag., Sept., 1916; on mil. duty, from Nov., 1917, to Dec., 1919; special commr., agency operations, April, 1924; C.I.E., Jan., 1925; offg. collr. and dist. mag., Jan., 1925; collr. and dist. magte. (provl.), Aug., 1929; confd., Feb., 1930; offg. secty., p.w. and l. dept., Madras, Apl., 1934; offg. commr. of labour, Madras, Mar., 1935; offg. secty., home dept., Madras, June, 1936; offg. second secty., to govt., Madras, June, 1936; offg. inspr.-genl. of prisons, Madras, Nov., 1936; commr. of lab., Nov., 1937; secty. to govt., Apl., 1938.

RUTHNASWAMY, MARIA DOSS, C.I.E., Barr.-at-Law, Principal, Law College, Madras, June, 1928; Member, Madras Public Service Commission, Jan., 1930.

RUTLEDGE, Rev. JAMES WILLIAM RENWICK, M.A., Indian Eccl. Estabt. (b. 26th Aug., 1896) (junr. chaplain).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, Ch. of Scotland, Bombay, 10th Feb., 1928; junr. chaplain, Feb., 1930.

RUTNAM, DONALD ROSS, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 19th Sept., 1901).—Educ. at Ceylon Univ. Coll., Colombo, and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1925; arrived, 31st Dec., 1925, and served in Bengal as asst. collr.; asst. commr., Central Provs., Aug., 1926; offg. dep. commr., Jan., 1929; on foreign serv. as admin., Bastar State, Mar., 1931; dep. commr. (provl.), Nov., 1937.

RUTTLEDGE, HUGH, late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 24th Oct., 1884).—Educ. at Cheltenham Coll., and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 29th Nov., 1909, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; city mag. (temp.), Lucknow, Oct., 1917; jt. mag. and ditto, April, 1918; again city mag., Lucknow, from July, 1918, to Sept., 1920; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1921; mag. and collr., Oct., 1925; dep. commr., Oct., 1925; ret'd., Jan., 1932.

RYALL, Rev. CHARLES RICHARD, LL.D., M.A., B.D., late Indian Eccl. Estabt. (Bombay) (b. 25th Feb., 1877).—Joined 29th April, 1910; junr. chaplain, April, 1913; senr. chaplain, Apl., 1926; ret'd., Oct., 1931.

RYALL, JAMES EDWARD, O.B.E., late Indian Police (b. 21st Oct., 1893).—Joined the service, 21st Oct., 1913; asst. supt., May, 1915; asst. dist. officer, frontier constabulary, Dec., 1919; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1921; dist. officer, frontier constabulary, Aug., 1922; personal asst. to inspr.-gen., Nov., 1922; supt., Oct., 1926; M.B.E., June, 1927; asst. inspr.-genl., govt. rly. police, Punjab, Nov., 1930; O.B.E., Jan., 1934; ret'd., Mar., 1936.

RYAN, CECIL CRAWFORD LINDSAY, Maj. I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 13th Dec., 1897).—First commn., dated 30th Jan., 1917; joined the pol. dept., 21st May, 1923; vice-consul, Ahwaz, May, 1924; ditto, Duzdap, Oct., 1929; under-secty. to agent to govt.-genl., Punjab States, Dec., 1930; asst. to resdt., Kashmir, Nov., 1931; counsellor, British legation, Kabul, Apl., 1934; secty. to pol. resdt. in the Persian Gulf, Nov., 1935; again, Oct., 1938; H.M. consul-genl., French estates in India, May, 1937.

RYAN, G. C., Indian Police (b. 21st July, 1914).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., 22nd Nov., 1934.

RYAN, PATRICK, late Posts and Tels. Dept. (b. 16th Jan., 1888).—Joined the service as divl. engr., wireless engrg., 22nd Dec., 1920; offg. dir. of wireless, April, 1925; ret'd., Jan., 1933.

SAADAT ALI KHAN, KHAN BAHADUR, AGHA, B.A., Indian Police (supl., Punjab) (b. 28th Nov., 1883).—Held non-gaz. appts. from 28th Nov., 1905; dep. supt., Jan., 1911; offg. supt., Feb., 1918; confd., Oct., 1931; Khan Bahadur, June, 1933.

SAADAT-UL-LAH KHAN, Indian Agricul. Service (dep. dir. of agricl.) (b. 14th Apl., 1898).—Joined the service as dep. dir. of agricl., Madras, on probn., 24th Jan., 1922; confd., Nov., 1922; agricl. officer, Quetta, Aug., 1932; dep. dir. agricl., Madras, Dec., 1934.

SAADULLA, Sir MUHAMMAD, MAULVI SAIVID, Kt., M.A., B.L.—Member govt.'s exec. council, Assam, 1st Apl., 1929, to Mar., 1934; chairman of cttee. on public accts., 1933-34; chief minister, Assam, Apl., 1937.

SABHARWAL, LAKHPAT RAI, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (asst. consvr., Bihar) (b. 18th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 5th March, 1919; pers. asst. to presdt., forest research inst., Mar., 1936.

SABIHUDDIN, KHAN SAHIB, B.A., Barr.-at-Law, Indian Posts and Tels. (dep. p.m.g.) (b. 16th May, 1886).—Joined the service as proby. supdt., 17th June, 1907; confd., Sept., 1909; dep. p.m.g., Aug., 1937.

SABINE, HAROLD EDWARD, Indian Police (supl., Bengal) (b. 12th July, 1894).—Joined the service, 6th Dec., 1920, as proby. asst. supt.; confd., May, 1923; addl. supt., Jan., 1926; supt., Aug., 1926.

SABNIS, BHASKAR DATTATRAYA, B.A., LL.B., late Judicial dept., Bombay (b. 30th May, 1876).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 17th Mar., 1903, to 11th Jan., 1909; sub-judge, Jan., 1909; judge, ct. of small causes, Poona, Mar. 1930; ret'd., May, 1931.

SABNIS, TRIMBAK SITARAM, M.Sc., Indian Agric. Service (economic botanist to govt., United Provs.) (b. 8th June, 1890).—Joined the service, 19th May, 1923; economic botanist, June, 1923.

SACHCHIDANAND, AKHAURI, M.Sc., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bihar) (b. 19th Mar., 1911).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 4th Feb., 1935.

SACHDEV, MULK RAJ, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 12th Oct., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of the Punjab and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 5th Oct., 1928; arrived, Dec., 1928, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1933.

SACHSE, Sir FREDERIC ALEXANDER, C.S.I., C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (b. 27th Feb., 1878).—Educ. at Liverpool Coll., and Caius Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1901; arrived, 15th Dec., 1902, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transf. to E. Bengal and Assam, Oct., 1905; settl. offr. and supt. of survey, Nov., 1908; joint mag. and

dept. collr., March, 1909; re-transfd. to Bengal. April, 1912; mag. and collr., Dec., 1914; dir. of land records, Bengal, Nov., 1918, to Feb., 1923; offg. commr., Nov., 1923, and Aug., 1925; offg. sec. to govt., rev. dept., Oct., 1926; confd., Feb., 1927; offg. commr., Feb., 1928; member, bd. of rev. in addn., Dec., 1928; C.I.E., Jan., 1930; member, bd. of rev., May, 1930; C.S.I., June, 1935; retd., Dec., 1937; knighted, Jan., 1938.

SADASHIVA RAU, KALLE RAMA RAU, B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 16th July, 1884).—Joined the service, 3rd March, 1908; asst. acctnt.-gen., Madras, Nov., 1900; ditto, United Provs., Nov., 1915; dep. acctnt.-gen., Bengal, Jan., 1919; ditto, Madras, March, 1919; ditto, Bombay, Sept., 1924; ditto, Central Provs., April, 1925; offg. dep. dir., army audit, Jan., 1927; offg. acct.-genl., Central Provs., Mar., 1930; ch. auditor, E.B. Rly., etc., Mar., 1931; offg. dir., rly. clearing accts. office, Apl., 1933; acct.-genl., Madras, May, 1934; dir. of army audit, Dec., 1934; acct.-genl., p. and t., Nov., 1937.

SADASIVAM, PILLAI, DORAIWAMI, Rao Bahadur, B.A. (Madras), B.Sc. (Tech.), Manch., A.M.C.I. (Manch.), (dep. dir. purchase) (b. 15th June, 1886).—Joined the service, 10th June, 1920, as asst. dir. of industries, Madras (temp.); apptd. asst. dir. of purchase, Indian Stores Dept., Dec., 1922; dep. ditto, July, 1935.

SADDLER, JAMES, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 13th Sept., 1913).—Educ. at Forfar Academy and St. Andrews Univ.; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 9th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Dec., 1938, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

SADASIVAM, TUMULURU RAMAKRISHNIAH, B.A., Finance dept., govt. of India (b. 27th Nov. 1892).—Joined the service as probnr., 9th Feb., 1915; asst. contr., paper currency, Nov., 1916; asst. acct. genl., posts and tels., Madras, 24th June, 1921; asst. acct.-genl., C.P., Oct., 1921; asst. acct.-genl., posts and tels., Calcutta, Mar., 1922; dep. ditto, Oct., 1924; asst. dir. of army audit, W.C., Mar., 1926; ditto, S.C., May, 1927; audit officer, N.W.F.P., Feb., 1930; asst. acct.-genl., posts and tels., Delhi, Jan., 1931; dep. ditto, Jan., 1931; dep. acct.-genl., Bombay, Apl., 1931; attd. officer, office of dir., rly. audit, May, 1932; offg. dep. dir., rly. audit, Jan., 1933; offg. audit officer, L.B. and C.C., Apl., 1934; comptr., Sind, Apl., 1936; dep. dir.-genl., finance, posts and tels., Jan., 1937.

SADHU RAM, CHAUDHRI, B.A., Indian Police (supt.) (b. 24th July, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 6th Oct., 1922; offg. supt., Feb., 1928; confd., Mar., 1934.

SADIK, HAMID GHULAM (see Hamid G. S.).

SADIQ ALI KHAN, Aqa, Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 21st Jan., 1886).—Joined the service, 1st Nov., 1910; apptd. to I.P. as supt., Apl., 1934.

SADULLAH, ABUL MUZAFFAR, M.A., Indian Police (b. 28th Feb., 1915).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bengal, on probn., 11th May, 1938.

SADULLAH KHAN, KHAN BAHADUR, late Indian Political Dept. (b. 29th Dec., 1880).—Joined the dept. as asst. commr., Peshawar, on

1st Jan., 1922; city magte., Peshawar, Apl., 1929; dist. judge, Hazara, May, 1930; asst. pol. agent in Southern States of C.I. and in Malwa, June, 1931; asst. commr., Tonk, Mar., 1932; dep. commr., Bannu, June, 1934; retd., Dec., 1935.

SAGREIYA, KAMPTA PRASAD, B.A. (Oxon), B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Central Provs.) (b. 10th Feb., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Central Provs., 27th Oct., 1927; dep. consvr., Dec., 1931.

SAH, DEBI LAL (see Debi Lal Sah).

SAHAI, RAM CHANDRA (see Ram Chandra Sahai).

SAHAI, RAMESHWAR (see Rameshwar Sahai),

SAHASRABUDHE, DATTATRAYA LAKSHMAN, M.Ag., M.Sc. Rai Bahadur, Indian Agric. Service (agric. chemist to govt. of Bombay) (b. 1st Sept., 1881).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 3rd Jan., 1906, to 31st May, 1913; asst. profr. of chemistry, June, 1913; agric. chemist. March, 1926.

SAHAY, BHAGWAN, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provinces) (b. 15th Feb., 1905).—Educ. at University of Allahabad and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, 10th Nov., 1929, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and coll.; jt. mag., Mar., 1931; dep. secty. to govt., U.P., indus. bch. (temp.) May, 1936, and again, May, 1937.

SAHAY, JAYADEVA, M.A., Indian Police (supt., Orissa) (b. 2nd Jan., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 30th April, 1923; offg. addl. supt., Feb., 1932; supt., May, 1936.

SAHAY, KULWANT, late Judl. Dept., Bihar and Orissa (b. 23rd Jan., 1873).—Apptd. addl. judge, high ct., Patna, Nov., 1923; judge, ditto, Dec., 1927; retd., Jan., 1934.

SAHAY, VISHNU, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 22nd Nov., 1901).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ., and Lincoln Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 23rd Oct., 1925; arrived, 7th Dec., 1925, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag.; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1928; offg. mag. and collr., Jan., 1934; Apl., regr., co-op. soc., U.P., Aug., 1934.

SAHGAL, AMRIT LAL, B.A., LL.B., A.C.A., R.A. (b. 20th Jan., 1904).—Joined the service, 21st Sept., 1935, as secty., Indian accty. bd., and ex officio asst. secty. to govt. of India.

SAHGAL, HARA NARAYAN, Indian State Rivs. (exec. engr., E.B. rly.) (b. 21st Nov., 1886).—Asst. engr., Oct., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; exec. engr. (provl.), Nov., 1935.

SAHIB, ABDUR RAHIM (see Abdur Rahim Sahib).

SAHIB, ELATT VILIAGATH AMU (see Amu Sahib, E. V.).

SAHIB KHAN NOON, MALIK, M.B.E., Punjab Civil Service (dep. commr.) (b. Nov., 1896).—Extra asst. commr., May, 1911; confd. Apl., 1913; M.B.E., Jan., 1919; dep. commr., June, 1935.

SAHIB, MUHAMMAD SIRAJUDDIN (see Muhammad S.S.).

SAHIB, SAIYID ABDUL QADIR (see Saiyid Abdul Qadir S.).

SAHIB, SHARIF MUHAMMAD ALI (see Sharif, M. A.).

SAHIBZADA, AHMED KHAN, M.B., Major, I.M.S. (agency surg.) (b. 15th Oct., 1891).—First commn. dated 1st March, 1922; in milty. employ to April, 1925; civil medl. officer, Bannu, April, 1925; ditto, Tochi Agency, April, 1928; ditto, N. Waziristan, Nov., 1929; civil surgeon, Hazara, Feb., 1933.

SAHNEY, NAUBAT RAI, LALA, B.A., LL.B., Indian Police (b. 29th June, 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 7th July, 1924; offg. supt., Sept. 1929, and again Apl., 1933; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1938.

SAHNI, DAYA RAM (see Daya Ram Sahni).

SAHNI, NARSING DASS M., B.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 12th Oct., 1900).—Joined the service, 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927.

SAID, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Said).

SAID ULLAH KHAN, B.A. (Oxon), Barr., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 15th July, 1896).—Educ. at Chief's Coll., Lahore, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 2nd Oct., 1922, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., July, 1927; dep. commr. (provl.), Apl., 1929; confd., Nov., 1932.

SAID-UZ-ZAFAR KHAN, SAHIBZADA, M.B., late United Provs. medl. service (b. 14th Oct., 1876).—Joined the service, 19th April, 1905, as asst. surg.; prof., King George's medl. coll., July, 1914; civil surg., April, 1920; dean and prinpl., King George's medl. coll., May, 1926; on deptn. to Bhopal State from Oct., 1927; ret'd., Oct., 1931.

SAIGAL, DEVI DAYAL (see Devi Dayal S.).

SAIN, KANWAR LALA (see Kanwar Sain, L.).

SAING, U BA, Barr., late Burma Commission (b. 9th Nov., 1881).—Apptd. addl. and sess. judge, Mar., 1921; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1922; ret'd., Nov., 1936.

ST. JOHN, CECIL HENRY, late Indo-European Telegraph Dept.—Held non-gazetted appts. from 1st April, 1891, to 28th Feb., 1918; asst. supt., May, 1918; supt., Feb., 1924; engr. and electrician, Sept., 1928; ret'd. Oct., 1929.

ST. JOHN, Sir HENRY BEAUCHAMP, K.C.I.E., C.B.E., Lt.-Col., I.A. (ret'd.) (b. 26th Aug., 1874).—First commn. dated 30th August, 1893; in mil. employ to May, 1899, when he was apptd. asst. commr. N.W.F. Prov.; asst. to a. g.-g. in Rajputana Nov., 1900; asst. to resdt. in Mewar, June, 1901, to Aug., 1901; asst. to a.g.-g. and chief commr., N.W.F. Prov., Nov., 1901, to April, 1905; asst. to a. g.-g. in Rajputana, Aug., 1905, to Jan., 1909; asst. to a. g.-g. in Baluchistan, May, 1910; special duty under govt. of India in for. dept., Sept., 1911; asst. sec. to govt. of India, for. dept., Oct., 1912; C.I.E., June, 1913; asst. pol. agent and asst. commr., Quetta-Pishin, April, 1915; pol. agent, and dep. commr. ditto, April, 1916; C.B.E., Jan., 1920; offg. resdt. W. Rajputana States, April, 1921; pol. agent, E. States of Rajputana, March, 1922; offg. agent to the govr.-genl., Punjab States, Feb., 1925; confd., Dec., 1925; agent to govr.-genl. and ch. commr. in Baluchistan, Nov., 1927; ret'd., Nov., 1930; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1930.

ST. JOHN, OLIVER CHARLES BEAUCHAMP, Capt. I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 22nd Oct., 1907).—First commn., 2nd Feb., 1928; in milty. employ prior to 1st June, 1931; under-secty. to A.G.G. in Baluchistan, June, 1931; offcr. on spl. duty, govt. of India, in home dept. (tempy.), May, 1933; asst. pte. secty. to H.E. the Viceroy, May, 1933; under training in the U.P., Nov., 1934; under-secty. to the A.G.G. in Baluchistan, June, 1935; asst. to the dep. A.G.G. in Baluchistan, July, 1935; asst. commr., Ajmer, Apl., 1936; on for. service in Alwar State, from 1st Sept., 1936, to 18th Nov., 1936; asst. commr., Ajmer, Nov., 1936; under-secty. to A.G.G., W.I. States Agency, Jan., 1937; pol. agent, Sabar Kantha Agency, Sept., 1937; under-secty. to the resdt. for the States of W.I., Oct., 1937; asst. for Mekran to the pol. agent in Kalat and ex officio comdt., Mekran levy corps, 1938.

SAIYID, ABDUS SALAM (see Abdus Salam Saiyid).

SAIYID ABDUL QADIR SAHIB, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 15th Sept., 1885).—Joined the service, Dec., 1907; dep. consvr., Nov., 1925.

SAIYID, ABDULLAH ABU (see Abdullah, A. S.).

SAIYID ALI AMIR, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bihar) (b. 1st Aug., 1895).—Joined the service, 20th Oct., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1929.

SAIYID AMINUDDIN, B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (dir., land records, Bombay) (b. 21st April, 1895).—Educ. at Aligarh Collegiate Sch., and Downing Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 14th Dec., 1921; arrived, 6th Jan., 1922, and served in Bombay as asst. collr., offg. collr. and dist. mag., March, 1926; confd., July, 1936; dir., land records, etc., May, 1938.

SAIYID MUHAMMAD MASIH, BARR., Bengal Judl. Service (b. 23rd Oct., 1885).—Apptd. dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1929; services placed at disposal of govt. of Assam, Feb., 1932.

SAIYID MUHAMMAD SHU'AIB RIZAWI, Khan Bahadur, Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 11th Nov., 1885).—Joined the service as dep. supt., on probn., 2nd Jan., 1908; confd., Mar., 1909; supt., Sept., 1930.

SAIYID MUJIBUR RAB, M.B.E., M.A., Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 1st Sept., 1899).—Joined the service, 1st Nov., 1922; offg. supt., Feb., 1930; confd., Nov., 1932; M.B.E., Jan., 1931.

SAJBA SHANKAR RANGNEKAR (see Rangnekar, S. S.).

SAKER, RICHARD KENNETH MAITLAND, Capt. I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 30th Dec., 1908).—First commn., 30th Aug., 1928; in milty. employ prior to 15th Nov., 1933; under training under the A.G.G., Gujerat States and resdt., Baroda, Nov., 1933; asst. magte. and collr., Meerut, June, 1934; under-secty. to A.G.G., Rajputana, Jan., 1936; confd., Apl., 1937; under-secty. to the resdt. for Baroda and the Gujerat States, Nov., 1937.

SAKSENA, BHAGWATI PRASAD (see Bhagwat P.S.).

SAKSENA, PREM CHANDRA, Indian Police (b. 26th Dec., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. dist. s. upi., Central Provs., 3rd Sept., 1925; offg. dist. supt., March, 1928.

SAKSENA, RAM CHAND (see Ram Chand S.).

SALAHUDDIN AHMAD YUSUF, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bengal) (b. 28th Jan., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 4th Dec., 1925; dep. consvr., Nov., 1929.

SALAMAT ULLAH, HAJI MOHAMMAD, M.C., M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., Jail Dept., United Provs. (inspr.-genl. of prisons) (b. 16th Dec., 1892).—Apptd. supt., central prison, Lucknow, 14th Feb., 1926; inspr.-genl. of prisons, United Provs., Feb., 1935.

SALAM-UL-HAQOQ, B.A., Khan Bahadur, late India Posts and Tels. (b. 2nd Feb., 1875).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 1st Oct., 1896; supt., June, 1904; offg. dep. P.M.G., R.M.S., Western Circle, June, 1924; confd. Feb., 1925; dep. P.M.G., Nagpur, Nov., 1927; retd., Feb., 1930.

SALE, JOHN FORD, M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 20th Feb., 1884).—Educ. at Rugby and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1906; arrived, 30th Nov., 1907, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Apl., 1916; pte. sec. to lieut.-govr., United Provs., Nov., 1916, to July, 1917; mag. and collr., Mar., 1924; offg. commr., Apl., 1935; retd., Dec., 1937.

SALE, JOHN LEWIS, C.I.E., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 24th Aug., 1885).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Jan., 1907; exec. engr., Jan., 1915; on mil. duty from 15th April, 1915, to 30th Sept., 1919; offg. suptg. engr., Sept., 1922; C.I.E., Jan., 1930; suptg. engr., Central P.W.D., Oct., 1930; retd., Jan., 1934.

SALE, STEPHEN LEONARD, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Punjab) (b. 30th Sept., 1889).—Educ. at Marlborough and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 30th Nov., 1914, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; on mil. duty from May to Aug., 1918; offg. dist. and sessions judge, Dec., 1922; prov. ditto, Sept., 1924; legal membr. and secty., legisl. dept., Sept., 1928; addl. judge, high ct., Lahore, June, 1934.

SALES, HAROLD SPENCE, late Indian State Railways (b. Mar., 1874).—Apptd., from covenanted estt., bridge engr., N.W. Ry., 19th Sept., 1907; ditto, E.B. Ry., Aug., 1923; retd., Mar., 1929.

SALIG RAM, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 11th Dec., 1883).—Joined the service 25th Sept., 1907; asst. engr., Sept., 1908; exec. engr., Sept., 1916; on deputation to T. E. Coll., Roorkee, from 1st June, 1927, to 12th Oct., 1928; retd., Oct., 1932.

SALIG RAM PATHAK, CHAUBE, M.A., late United Provs. C.S. (b. 21st May, 1878).—Joined the service as prob. dep. collr., 28th Aug., 1902; confd., Mar., 1904; magte. and collr., July, 1929; retd., May, 1933.

SALISBURY, ALAN JACK, B.A. (Oxon.), Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bihar) (b. 9th April, 1905).—Educ. at Christ's Hospital, St. John's Coll., Oxford, and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, 8th Nov., 1929, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and coll.; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1935.

SALISBURY, ARTHUR GEORGE, India Office (supg. executive officer, acctn.-gen. s. dept.) (b. 29th Oct., 1885).—Educ. at Elizabeth Coll., Guernsey; apptd. 2nd class clerk, 16th July, 1906; minor staff clerk, Oct., 1915; staff clerk (acting), April, 1920; confd., April, 1921; higher exec. officer, April, 1922; suptg. exec. officer, March, 1927; apptd. assessor of inc. tax, March, 1927.

SALISBURY, FRANCIS HUGH, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (retd.), late Jail Dept., Bengal.—First commn. dated 1st Sept., 1906; in milty. employ to 22nd March, 1910; offg. supt. jail dept., April, 1910; with home dept., govt. of India, from 21st Oct., 1914, to 11th Aug., 1920; offg. supt., Dacca Central Jail, Aug., 1920; ditto, Alipore Central Jail, March, 1922; reverted to milty. employ, Oct., 1927; retd., May, 1930.

SALISBURY, Rev. MARK, LL.D., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (senr. chaplain, Punjab) (b. 16th Oct., 1883).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 12th Nov., 1921; junr. chaplain, Dec., 1923; senr. chaplain, Dec., 1933.

SALMOND, HUBERT GEORGE, Indian State Rlys. (dep. ch. engr., E.B. Rly.) (b. 3rd Jan., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1911; in milty. employ from July, 1915, to June, 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; dep. dir., civil engrg., rly. bd.; offg. dep. ch. engr., Dec., 1932; dep. agent, works, E.B. rly., Mar., 1933; dep. chief engr. (prov. perm.), Apl., 1938.

SALOWAY, REGINALD HARRY, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 26th Oct., 1905).—Educ. at Exeter School, and St. John's College, Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in the United Provs. as asst. collr. and mag.; asst. commr., Mar., 1930; offg. magte. and collr., May, 1933; offg. dep. commr., Sept., 1935; offg. secty., bd. of rev., U.P., Apl., 1936.

SALTER, MALCOLM GURNEY, B.A., Indian Educl. Service (princl., Daly coll., Indore) (b. 10th May, 1887).—Joined the service as asst. master, Daly coll., 26th Jan., 1913; on milty. duty from 5th Dec., 1916, to 29th Oct., 1919; princl., Daly coll., July, 1930.

SALUSBURY, CHARLES VANNE, Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 15th Feb., 1887).—Educ. at Magdalen Coll. Sch., and Hertford Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 27th Nov., 1911, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; city mag., Delhi, Sept., 1915; asst. coln. officer, Lower Bari Doab Canal colony, April, 1916; on spl. duty for Upper Chenab Canal colony work, Lahore, June, 1917; on spl. duty, Punjab civil sectt., Dec., 1917; on spl. duty on staff of lieut.-govr., March, 1918; dep. commr. (prov.), Feb., 1925; deputed to Bikaner State, Oct., 1929, to Mar., 1931; offg. secty. to govt., transf. depts., Punjab, May, 1932; offg. commr., May, 1934; and again, Apl., 1936; offg. secty. to govt., Punjab, elec. and indus. dept., Jan., 1936; rev. and dep. commr., N.W.F.P., Nov., 1936.

SALUSBURY-TRELAWNY, JOHN MAITLAND, M.C., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 26th Jan. 1892).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1914; in milty. employ from April, 1915, to 25th March, 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; retd., Oct., 1934.

SAMLER, WILLIAM HADLEY GOODLIKE, M.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 18th Apl., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 15th Dec., 1922; on deptn. to Kashmir State from 31st Jan., 1924; dep. consvr., Oct., 1927.

SAMPSON, EPHRAIM OSWIN, M.B.E., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bombay) (b. 14th Aug., 1886).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 1st April, 1907, to 23rd Dec., 1912; proxy. extra asst. consvr., Dec., 1912; extra asst. consvr., Aug., 1915; asst. consvr., Feb., 1925; dep. consvr., Feb., 1926; M.B.E., June, 1935.

SAMS, SIR HUBERT ARTHUR, Kt., C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 3rd May, 1875).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch. and Peterhouse, Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1898; arrived, 29th Dec., 1899, and served in the Punjab and N.W. Frontier Prov. as asst. commr.; postmaster-gen., E. Bengal and Assam, May, 1907; ditto, Bengal, April, 1908; ditto, Burma, May, 1911; ditto, Bombay, Oct., 1913; ditto, central circle, Oct., 1914; on depts. as dir., postal services, Indian Expedy. Force, Mesopotamia, from Aug., 1917, to May, 1919; C.I.E., March, 1919; postmr.-gen., Bombay, April, 1920; dep. dr.-gen. of post office, India, April, 1922; dir.-genl., posts and tels., April, 1927; Kt., June, 1931; retd., Mar., 1934.

SAMS, KENNETH ASHETON HULTON, late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 26th Oct., 1884).—Educ. at Charterhouse Sch. and Jesus Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 29th Nov., 1909, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; on mil. service from April, 1918; reverted to civil duty, June, 1919; jt. mag., June, 1919; actg. dist. and sess. judge, March, 1920; sess. and sub. judge, March, 1924; retd., Mar., 1930.

SAMUEL, GEORGE, M.A., Indian C.S. (under-secty., defence dept., govt. of Burma) (b. 26th Aug., 1908).—Educ. at Hamilton Academy, Glasgow Univ. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1932; arrived in India, Dec., 1933, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty., defence dept., Apl., 1937.

SAMUEL, JOHN AUGUSTUS, B.A., LL.B. (Cantab.), Barr. (dep. secty., legisl. dept., Bihar) (b. 3rd Feb., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. to supt. and membr. of legal affairs, 24th July, 1917; asst. secty., legisl. council, Jan., 1921; dep. secty., legisl. dept., April, 1924.

SAN, MAUNG BA, B.A., Burma C.S., (Cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 31st Mar., 1914).—Educ. at Rangoon Univ.; apptd. on probn., 1st Oct., 1937; confid., 5th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Oct., 1938, and served as asst. commr.

SANER, ROBERT MORTON, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., U.P.) (b. 30th Dec., 1911).—Educated at Westminster and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1934; arrived in India, Oct., 1935, and served in the U.P. as asst. mag. and collr.

SANDEMAN, ALFRED PATRICK, O.B.E., Lt.-Col., I.A., late Burma Commission (b. 17th Mar., 1878).—Arrived in India, Oct., 1898, and rendered service in mil. dept.; asst. commr., July, 1905; on mil. duty from Aug., 1915, to May, 1919; dep. commr., Dec., 1917; offg. commr., May, 1928; retd., July, 1932.

SANDEMAN, RONALD FREDERICK, B.A., Dip., Forestry, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bombay) (b. 3rd Nov., 1897).—Joined the service, 10th Dec., 1923, as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Nov., 1925.

SANDERS, REV. HOROLD MARTIN, M.A. (Oxon.), B.A. (Lond.), Eccles. Dept., Central Provs. (junior chaplain) (b. 7th Jan., 1900).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 3rd Feb., 1929; junr. chaplain, Jan., 1931.

SANDERS, JOHN HERNE, M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 28th May, 1888).—Educ. at Cardiff Intermediate Sch., Univ. Coll., Cardiff, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 21st Nov., 1912, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and magt.; on mil. duty, July, 1916, to Dec., 1918; jt. judge and addl. sess. jud'c, Jan., 1923; offg. judge and sess. judge, March, 1926; retd., Feb., 1929.

SANDERSON, GEORGE DURRANT, late Indian Police (b. 4th Feb., 1894).—Joined the service, 15th Nov., 1912; asst. supt. Nov., 1913; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1921; supt., May, 1924; dist. officer, frontier constabulary, Jan., 1925; pers. asst. to inspr.-genl., N.W.F.P., Jan., 1929; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Punjab, Apl., 1935; retd., Mar., 1938.

SANDERSON, The Right Hon. Sir LANCELOT P.C., Kt., K.C., Barr.—Educ. at Harrow and Trinity Coll., Cambridge (B.A., LL.B., 1885; M.A., 1895); Kt., Nov., 1915; chief justice, high ct., Calcutta, Nov., 1915; resigned, Nov., 1926; P.C., 1926; member of judl. cttee. of Privy Cl., Jan., 1934, to Oct., 1935; resigned, Nov., 1926.

SANDERSON, RICHARD WILSON, late Indian Police Service (b. 21st May, 1892).—Joined the service, 15th Nov., 1912; asst. supt., Nov., 1913; supt., March, 1924; dist. offr., frontier constabulary, Feb., 1927; retd., March, 1932.

SANDERSON, ROBERT, C.I.E., M.A. (Oxon.), late Indian Educl. Service (b. 6th Jan., 1881).—Joined the service, 20th Oct., 1909; inspr. of schools, March, 1915; on mil. service, Nov., 1917, to April, 1919; offg. inspr. of training institutions Oct., 1926; confid., Feb., 1930; offg. dir. public instrn., Mar., 1930; confid., July, 1931; C.I.E., June, 1935; retd., Jan., 1935.

SANDES, EDWARD WARREN CAULFIELD, D.S.O., M.C., Lt.-Col. R.E. (retd.) (b. 13th Feb., 1880).—First commn. dated 22nd Nov., 1899; in mil. employ to 4th Oct., 1910; prof., Roorkee, Oct., 1910; in mil. employ from 6th April, 1915, to 31st Jan., 1920; prof., Roorkee, Feb., 1920; prinpl., Thomason Coll., Oct., 1921; retd., Aug., 1931.

SANDES, JOHN DRUMMOND, M.D., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., retd. (b. 5th Mar., 1883).—Joined the service, 2nd Feb., 1907; in mil. employ to Apl. 1910; offd. as resdt. physician and surgn., med. coll. hospital, Calcutta, April, 1911, to April, 1913; offg. civil surgn., June to Aug., 1914; surgn. to the govr. of Bengal, April, 1917; prof. materia medica, and 2nd physician, med. coll. hosp., Calcutta, March, 1920; jail supt., Rajahahi, Nov., 1923; prof., medical coll., Calcutta, April, 1925; retd., Dec., 1935.

SANDYS, ULRIC CAPEL, V.D., Indian State Railways (dep. ch. comml. manager, E.I. Rly.) (b. 1st Dec., 1881).—Joined the service, 17th Aug., 1901; asst. traffic supt., April, 1905; dist. traffic supt., April, 1910; temp. dep. chief comml. manager, E.I. Rly., July, 1925; supt., ditto, Jan., 1928; offg. dep. ch. comml. manager, July, 1935; confd., Apl., 1936.

SANGAL, HARA NARAYAN, B.A., Indian State Ryis. (exec. engr., E.B. Rly.) (b. 21st Nov., 1886).—Asst. eng., Oct., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; exec. engr. (prov.), Nov., 1935.

SANGHAM, LAL, M. B. B. S. (Punj.), F.R.C.S. (Eng.), L.R.C.P. (Lond.), D.O.M.S. (Lond.), Capt., I.M.A. (D.M.O., Madras).—(b. 25th Sept., 1901).—First commn., 13th May, 1931; in milty. employ until 13th Nov., 1934; dist. medl. offcr., Nov., 1934.

SANJANA, BEHRAM NAVROJI, B.A., LL.B., late Bombay C.S., Judl. Branch (b. 27th Oct., 1874).—Joined the service as sub-judge, 26th Oct., 1904; asst. judge and asst. sess. judge, July, 1923; jt. judge and addl. sess. judge, Sept., 1926; judge and sess. judge, Nov., 1927; retd., Oct., 1931.

SANJANA, BOMAN S., Dept. of Industries, Bihar (b. 18th Sept., 1887).—Apptd. prof., Bihar coll. of engrg., 7th July, 1925.

SANJANA, KAIKOBAD EDALJI JAMSHEDJI, B.A., Barr., Khan Bahadur, late Central Provs. C.S. (b. 11th May, 1883).—Joined the service as extra asst. commr., 3rd Jan., 1908; offg. dep. commr., Mar., 1927; confd., Sept., 1928; retd., May, 1938.

SANJIVA RAO, BENEGAL, M.A., late Indian Educ. Service (b. 12th Dec., 1883).—Joined the service as princpl., Queen's inter. coll., Benares, 1st July, 1922; retd., Dec., 1938.

SANJIVA ROW, KODIKAL, C.I.E., M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (addl. jt. secty., fin. dept., govt. of India) (b. 18th Mar., 1890).—Joined the service, 3rd Sept., 1914; pers. asst. to contr. of currency, Jan., 1925; supt. fin. dept., Dec., 1925; asst. secty. to the govt. of India, fin. dept., Dec., 1932; offg. budget officer, fin. dept., variously from Apl., 1931; confd., Mar., 1933; C.I.E., June, 1935; apptd. representative of the Govt. of India, applicn. ctee. for the Indo-Burma finl. award, Jan., 1936; dep. secty., fin. dept., govt. of India, Apl., 1936; addl. jt. secty., ditto, Apl., 1937.

SANJIVI PILLAI, TIRUPATTUR GANGADHARAM PILLAI, B.A. (Hons.), Rao Bahadur, Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 28th Dec., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Madras, 1st Sept., 1922; offg. dist. supt., Mar., 1929; confd., Sept., 1932.

SANKARA AYYAR, TIRUNELVELI SELLA-MIER, C.I.E., B.A., B.E. (b. 1st Dec., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. examr., 17th Aug., 1909; asst. acct.-genl., U.P., Mar., 1914; asst. auditor, N.W. rly., June, 1918; dep. auditor, E.B. Rly., Oct., 1921; govt. examr. of accts., M. & S.M., & S.I. Ryis., Nov., 1922; ditto B. and N.W. & R. & K. Ryis., July, 1924; divl. audit officer, N.W. Rly., Nov., 1924; dep. acct.-genl., posts and tels., March, 1925; offg. dep. auditor, N.W. Rly., Nov., 1926; asst. auditor, ditto, Dec., 1926; dep. ch. accts. officer, E. I. Rly.,

March, 1928; offg. dir. of finance, rly., bd., Nov., 1930; confd., May, 1931; dir., rly., bd., Apl., 1932; offg. finl. commr. of ryis., Oct., 1935; C.I.E., June, 1938.

SANKARA MENON, KIZHAKEPAT, B.A., Barr., late Madras Civil Service (Judicial Bch.) (b. 21st May, 1881).—Apptd. dist. and sess. judge, 27th June, 1921; offg. judge, high ct., Madras, variously from Apl., 1935; retd., May, 1936; offg. judge, high ct., Madras, July, 1936.

SANKEY, GEOFFREY CHARLES, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bengal) (b. 28th April, 1884).—Educ. at Rugby, and Queen's Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1907; arrived, 23rd Nov., 1908, and served in E. Bengal and Assam as asst. mag. and collr., and asst. settlt. offr.; asst. commr., Assam, April, 1912; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal, July, 1917; jt. judge, Assam, Aug. to Oct., 1917, and from Jan. 1919, to May, 1920; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Bengal, Nov., 1921; confd., Sept., 1922; retd., Aug., 1931.

SANSBURY, WILLIAM HENRY, India Office (higher clerical officer, public and judl. dept.) (b. 16th June, 1882).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, 20th Nov., 1902; minor staff clerk, Jan., 1919; higher clerical officer, April, 1922.

SANSON, ADAM JOHN WALKER, M.C., Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 28th May, 1897).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, 11th Nov., 1923; offg. supt., Apl., 1929; confd., Mar., 1936; dep. commr., Bombay (divs.), Apl. to Aug., 1937.

SANT PRAKASH SINGH, SARDAR, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 1st May, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 14th April, 1920; offg. supt., Nov., 1926; confd., May, 1929.

SANT RAM, LALA, Rai Bahadur, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 5th May, 1880).—Joined the service, 7th Nov., 1904; asst. engr., Nov., 1904; exec. engr., Dec., 1912; offg. supt. engr., March, 1928; confd., Feb., 1931; offg. ch. engr., and secty. to govt., p.w.d., Punjab, June, 1933; retd., May, 1935.

SANT SINGH, SARDAR BHADUR, Punjab Police (dist. supt., Central Provs.) (b. 15th July, 1886).—Held non-gaz. appt. from 1st Jan., 1908; dept. supt. (temp.), Mar., 1923; Sardar Sahib, Jan., 1924; confd., Dec., 1925; Sardar Bahadur, Jan., 1935; on depn. to I.P. contingent at H.M.'s Coronation, Mar., 1937; dist. supt. of police, Cent. Provs., and Berar, May, 1938.

SANTOS, JOHN, B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 19th Jan., 1890).—Joined the service, 2nd Nov., 1914; asst. acctnt.-gen., Sept., 1925; examr., outside audit, Bombay, June, 1926; offg. asst. secty., fin. dept., Apl., 1929; offg. under secty., ditto, Nov., 1932; dep. acct. genl., Bombay, Apl., 1933.

SANYAL, SUSIL KUMAR, M.A., B.Sc., Indian Police (b. 29th Nov., 1903).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Central Provs., 26th May, 1927.

SAPRE, KESHAV ANANT, LL.B., late Bombay Civil Service (Judicial Branch) (b. 8th Oct., 1877).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 1st Apl., 1902, to 19th Apl., 1912; sub-judge, Apl., 1912; offg. asst. judge, Oct., 1927; offg. judge and sess. judge, June, 1929; asst. judge, Dec., 1930; retd., Oct., 1933.

SAPRU, ANAND NARAYAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 31st March, 1901).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 23rd Dec., 1924, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr., jt. mag., July, 1927; offg. dep. commr., April, 1928; services at disposal of A.G.G., Punjab States, for employment in Patiala State Apl., 1931; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1932; offg. excise commr., U.P., Mar., 1935, and inspr.-genl. of regn. in addn., Apl., 1935.

SAPRU, Sir Tej., Bahadur, P.C., K.C.S.I., LL.D.—Educ. Agra Coll.; member United Provs. legl. council, 1916-20; law member of govr.-genl.'s exec. council, 1920-23; represented govt. of India at Imperial Conference, 1923; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1923; British-India delegate to Round Table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; 2nd Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; 3rd Session, Nov., 1932; P.C., Jan., 1934.

SARAN, REDHA KANTA (see Redha Kanta Saran).

SARDA SHANKAR BAJPAI (see Bajpai, S. S.).

SARDAR SINGH, M.A., Indian Police (b. 1st Feb., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 27th May, 1927; offg. supt., Apl., 1933.

SARDARI LAL, MALHOTRA, Lala, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 2nd Dec., 1901).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 24th Oct., 1924; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1925; exec. engr., Oct., 1934.

SARDHANA, MADAN GOPAL (see Madan, G. S.).

SARDESAI, VIDYADHAR NARHAR, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. coll., Bombay) (b. 28th July, 1905).—Educ. at University of Bombay and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, Dec., 1929, and served as asst. coll. Bombay.

SARKAR, BASANTA BIHARI, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 5th Aug., 1901).—Educ. at Univ. of Calcutta, Univ. College, London, and Jesus College, Cambridge; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1926; arrived, Nov., 1926, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magte. and dep. collr., Dec., 1927; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Mar., 1932; offg. mag. and collr., Sept., 1933.

SARKAR, BHABADEV, RAI BHADUR, B.A., Bihar C.S. (mag. and collr.) (b. 16th May, 1883).—Joined the service, 18th April, 1903; dep. mag. and dep. collr., April, 1905; offg. mag. and collr., Mar., 1931; confd., July, 1934; secty., bd. of rev., June, 1934.

SARKAR, HIRENDRA NATH, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal) (b. 18th Jan., 1905).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 1st May, 1928; confd., Sept., 1930; offg. addl. supt., Feb., 1934.

SARKAR, Sir JADU NATH, Kt., C.I.E., M.A., late Indian Educl. Service.—Joined the service, 30th June, 1898; prof. of history, Ravenshaw Coll., Cuttack, July, 1919; ditto, Patna coll., Oct., 1923; C.I.E., Jan., 1926; vice-chancellor, Calcutta Univ., 1926; Kt., June, 1929.

SARKAR, SUBODH CHANDRA, Judicial Dept., Bengal (judge, Calcutta small cause ct.) (b. 1st Sept., 1886).—Joined the service, 24th May, 1915; dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1928; judge, Calcutta small cause ct., Jan., 1934.

SARMA, ANANTANARAYANA, A.N. (see Anantanarayana, S. A. N.).

SARMA, DURGESHWAR, B.L. (commr. of income-tax) (b. 18th Feb., 1885).—Joined the service, 5th May, 1911; extra asst. commr., May, 1911 to 1924; sub-div. offcr., 1924 to Mar., 1935; dep. commr., Mar., 1935; dir. of land records and commr. of income-tax, Assam, Apl., 1936.

SARMA, G. K., SESHADRI (see Seshadri Sarma, G. K.).

SARMA, TIRNOSTIYUR RAMASWAMI AIYAR VRIIDHAGIRI, B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 16th Nov., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. examr., 12th Aug., 1907; asst. audit officer, July, 1920; dept. acct.-genl. (posts and tels.), Sept., 1920; audit officer, Bombay Development Scheme, May, 1923; dep. auditor, O. & R. Rly., April, 1924; asst. auditor, E.I. Rly., Dec., 1925; govt. examr. of accts., June, 1926; offg. dep. auditor genl., N.W. Rly., March, 1928; dep. ch. accts. officer, N.W. Rly., Apl., 1929; offg. dep. auditor-genl., Apl., 1931; govt. ext. of accts., S. & S.M. & R.I. rlys., Dec., 1931; ch. auditor, rly. clearing accts., July, 1935; ditto, N.W. Rly., Apl., 1938.

SARRE, LIONEL W., Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 17th April, 1909).—Joined the service as probty. asst. supt., Bombay, 18th Jan., 1930; confd., Aug., 1931; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1938.

SARUP SINGH, BHAI, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 27th Apl., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 27th Nov., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1928.

SASTRI, K. S. R. (see Ramaswami Sastri, K. S.).

SASTRI, S. KUPPUSWAMI (see Kuppuswami, Sastri S.).

SATARAWALA, DADABHAI RATANJI, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bombay) (b. 6th Aug., 1876).—Joined the service, 15th April, 1901; exec. engr., April, 1910; offg. supt. engr., July, 1923; confd., May, 1926; offg. ch. engr., May, 1928; ret'd., Aug., 1931.

SATHE, DATTATRAYA LAXMUN, M.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (consvr., Madras) (b. 27th May, 1889).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 14th March, 1914; dep. consvr., March, 1919; offg. consvr., Aug., 1933; confd., Jan., 1935.

SATHE, JAGANNATH LAKSHMAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 20th April, 1886).—Educ. at Bombay Univ. and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 8th Oct., 1910, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., April, 1917; mag. and collr., Dec., 1924; employed as secy., bd. of rev., from Nov., 1923; offg. excise commr., April, 1927; confd., May, 1928; dir., bureau of statistics and economic research, Apl., 1932; secty., finance dept., United Provs., Apl., 1933.

SATHE, SHANKAR GOPAL, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (Bombay) (b. 12th Oct., 1875).—Joined the service, 14th May, 1919; prof. of logic and moral philosophy, Deccan Coll., May, 1919; ditto, Elph. Coll., Bombay, Oct., 1924; ret'd., Oct., 1930.

SATHIANATHAN, WILLIAM RATNAM SAMUEL, Indian C.S. (collr. and d.m., Madras) (b. 15th March, 1900).—Educ. at Madras Univ., Peterhouse Coll., Cambridge, and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 15th Nov., 1924, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-coll. March, 1928; dir. of land records, Madra, Dec., 1931; collr. and dist. magte., June, 1934; estate collr., Vizianagram, Oct., 1935.

SATOW, CHARLES FRANCIS, A.M.I.C.E. late Indian State Rlys. (E.I. Rly.) (b. 4th Oct., 1881).—Joined the service as junr. engr., 28th Jan., 1905; resdt. engr., June, 1917; dist. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. divl. supt., Feb., 1925; retd., Jan., 1929.

SATTANATHAN, ARMUGA NAYAKAR, B.A. (Hons.), Imperial Customs Service (asst. collr.) (b. 15th May, 1905).—Joined the service, May, 1928; asst. collr. of customs, 1929.

SATYANARAYANCHOWDARY, CHELSANI, Rao Sahib, B.A., B.L., Judl. dept., Madras (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 28th Nov., 1898).—Joined the service, Feb., 1937; apptd. dist. and sess. judge on probn., Feb., 1937; confd., Feb., 1938.

SATYAWADI, SHEO CHARAN, M.A., Indian Customs Service (asst. collr. of customs) (b. 5th Nov., 1894).—Joined the service, 6th Oct., 1911; asst. collr., Oct., 1913; offg. coll. for customs, Chittagong; Mar., 1924; ditto, Rangoon, Nov., 1931; ditto, Calcutta, June, 1933.

SATYAMURTI, R., M.A., M.L. (master, high ct., Madras) (b. 1st Sept., 1889).—Joined the service, Jan., 1919; dist. munssif, Oct., 1922; asst. regr., July, 1930; dep. regr., July, 1934; master, Mar., 1938.

SAUDAGAR SINGH, RAI BAHADUR, M.A., B.L., Bihar C.S. (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 3rd Jan., 1885).—Joined the service, 14th Jan., 1913; sub-judge, Nov., 1929; offg. dep. regr., high ct., Patna, June, 1930; offg. regr., ditto, Jan., 1932; dist. and sess. judge, Aug., 1935.

SAUDAT-UL-LAH KHAN, Indian Agricultural Service (b. 14th Apl., 1898).—Joined the service as dep. dir. of agric., Madras, 24th Jan., 1922 with govi. of Baluchistan as agricil. officer, Quetta, Apl., 1930.

SAUMAREZ SMITH, WILLIAM HANBURY, Indian C.S. (under-secty., home dept., Bengal).—Educ. at Winchester and Trin. Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, 3rd Dec., 1934, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magte. and dep. collr., May, 1936; under-secty., home dept., Bengal, Jan., 1938.

SAUNDERS, CHARLES HUMPHREY AUGUSTUS, Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 8th Mar., 1886).—Joined the service as temp. engr., 26th Sept., 1914; asst. engr., 27th Jan., 1917; on milty. service from 2nd Oct., 1917, to 2nd Oct., 1919; resdt. engr., Oct., 1919; exec. engr., Sept., 1930.

SAUNDERS, Rt. Rev. CHARLES JOHN GODFREY, M.A., Bengal Eccles. Dept. (Bishop of Lucknow) (b. 15th Feb., 1888).—Joined the service, 23rd Feb., 1917; junr. chaplain, Feb., 1919; Bishop of Lucknow, July, 1928.

SAUNDERS, CYRIL SIVEWRIGHT, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 23rd Jan., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1909; exec. engr., Oct., 1917; offg. suptg. engr., May, 1925, and again, March, 1926; retd., Aug., 1932.

SAUNDERS, HENRY HUME, O.B.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 23rd June, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. loco. supt., 21st Oct., 1913; in milty. employ from 7th Aug., 1915, to 31st March, 1920; offg. dist. loco. supt., April, 1920; offg. asst. agent, Feb., 1924; offg. works manager, loco., Oct., 1926; divl. rolling stock officer and offg. supt. mechanical workshops, March, 1928; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., Jan., 1930; offg. divl. supt. (mechl.), E.I. rly., Mar., 1935; O.B.E., June, 1935; dep. ch. mechl. engr., July, 1935; retd., Dec., 1936.

SAUNDERS, HOWARD FAUNTLEROY, M.A., Indian Educl. Service (dep. dir. of public instrn., Madras) (b. 15th Apl., 1885).—Joined the service, 21st March, 1919; inspr. of schools, Feb., 1922; dist. educl. officer, Jan., 1923; addl. dep. dir. of public instrn., Nov., 1927; dep. dir., Feb., 1932; offg. inspr. of European schools, Feb., 1932; offg. dir. of public instrn., Dec., 1934.

SAUNDERS, JOHN ALFRED, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 28th May, 1887).—Educ. at Mount St. Mary's Coll., Chesterfield, and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 19th Nov., 1910, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transf. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912, as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. settl. offr., Oct., 1913; jt. mag. and dep. collr. and ditto, April, 1917; settl. offr., N. Bihar, April, 1918; sec., Bihar and Orissa Legve. Council, April, 1922; offg. dist. and sess. judge, March, 1925; confd., Dec., 1927; offg. supt. and remember. of legal affairs and secty. to govt., judl. dept., Mar., 1931; addl. judge, high ct., Patna, variously from July, 1933; offg. judge, ditto, July, 1934; and again, July, 1935; retd., Mar., 1938.

SAUNDERS, JOHN FREDERICK, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub. collr. and jt. magte., Madras) (b. 21st Apl., 1910).—Educ. at Dunstable Grammar Sch., and Selwyn College, Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub. collr. and jt. magte., Apl., 1937.

SAUNDERS, LAWRENCE EDWARD, late Indian Police (b. 27th Aug., 1889).—Joined the service, Nov., 1909; asst. supt., Sept., 1919; supt., April, 1925; retd., Aug., 1935.

SAUNDERS, PERCY TUNSTALL, O.B.E., M.R.C.V.S., Indian Vety. Service (dir. of vety. services, Madras) (b. 8th Sept., 1884).—Apptd. prof. of surg., vety. coll., Madras, July, 1923; prinpl., Madras Vety. Coll., July, 1925; offg. dir. of vety. services, Madras, Oct., 1929; confd., Dec., 1930.

SAUNDERS-JACOBS, RUSKIN ATKINSON, B.Sc., Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.I. Rly.) (b. 20th May, 1897).—Joined the service, 19th Aug., 1921; asst. engr., Jan., 1924; exec. engr. (provl.), Apl., 1936.

SAVAGE, GERALD ROBERT, Indian Police (b. 1st Aug., 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., Dec., 1937.

SAVARA, A. N. (see Amar Nath S.).
